1.1: Iroakdihn dihkan ma lel Jesus Christ kadaudok in David, kadaudok in Abraham:
1.2: Abraham ioar jemen Isaac; Isaac jemen Jacob; Jacob jemen Judah pel riahkan.
1.3: Judah ioar jemen Perez apel Zerah, ma inanki Tamar; Perez ioar jemen Hezron; Hezron jemen Ram;
1.4: Ram jemen Amminadab; Amminadab jemen Nahshon; Nahshon jemen Salmon;
1.5: Salmon jemen Boaz (ma inanki Rahab); Boaz jemen Obed (ma inanki Ruth); Obed jemen Jesse;
1.6: Jesse ioar jemen Nahmwarki David. David ioar jemen Solomon, ma inanki pahien Uriah;
1.7: Solomon jemen Rehoboam; Rehoboam ma jemen Abijah: Abijah jemen Asa;
1.8: Asa jemen Jehoshaphat: Jehoshaphat jemen Jehoram; Jehoram jemen Uzziah
1.9: Uzziah jemen Jotham; Jotham jemen Ahaz; Ahaz jemen Hezekiah;
1.10: Hezekiah jemen Manasseh; Manasseh jemen Amon; Amon jemen Josiah;
1.11: Josiah jemen Jechoniah pel riahkan nehn anjoauwo irai kaliplipla Babylon.
1.12: Mwerin kaliplipla Babylon: Jechoniah ioar jemen Shealtiel; Shealtiel jemen Zerubbabel;
1.13: Zerubbabel jemen Abiud; Abiud jemen Eliakim; Eliakim jemen Azor;
1.14: Azor jemen Zadok; Zadok jemen Achim; Achim jemen Eliud;
1.15: Eliud jemen Eleazar; Eleazar jemen Matthan; Matthan jemen Jacob;
1.16: Jacob jemen Joseph; pahien Mary, ma noaisikihdi Jesus; ma adanki Christ.
1.17: Ohroj ma insingdi me ioar di eijek pahu jang Abraham lel David, di eijek pahu jang David lel kalipliplahng Babylon, di eijek pahu jang kalipliplahng Babylon lel Christ. Doahr Noaisikdihn Jesus Christ (Luke 2:1-7)
1.18: Me ioar mwomwen en Jesus Christ noaisikdi: Ah nohno Mary inoauwen pwoapwoaud oang Joseph, a mwohn ara paspene, diarekda pwa ih lijaian jang Ngen Joaroawi.
1.19: A Joseph nehn ah wia woal lelpoak apel pwung men johpwa nimen koauwehla oadoan Mary mwohn armaj kan, lemehda pwa ih en mweijang ih in rir.
1.20: A mwerin ah lemehda me, Sohnloang in Koaunno men pwokkoang ih nehn ah oarmoan pwehng ih, “Joseph nihn David, joah mijik in oaloa Mary wiahkihla pahioamw, pwa dahkij ih lijaiankihda jang Ngen Joaroawi.
1.21: Ih pirin noaisikihdi jermwein men, koah en kioang oadoa Jesus , pwa Ih pirin doaroahla Nah armaj jang nehn diparaihok.”
1.22: Mehpwiai ohroj wiawi pwa en pwoaida da ma Koaunno pwa jang ipen joukohppo,
1.23: “Meipwonno pirin lijaianda, noaisikihdi jermwein men, ma irai pirin kioang oadoa Emmanuel,” (woahwoahki “Koahs pwilpwili kisai”).
1.24: Nehn en Joseph pwohrda ih wia da sohnloang in Koaunno pwehng ih. Ih ken oaloa Mary painkihla.
1.25: Joseph johpwa suhwoang Mary in palwar oaroh liho noaisikihdi nah jermweinno. Ih kioang oadoa Jesus.

2.1: Mwerin en Jesus noaisikdi nehn Bethlehem wein Judea, nehn mwein Nahmwarki Herod; woal loalkoanngok jang palimese indoa Jerusalem
2.2: kalkalelpoak wija ma Jeri siksikko noaisikdi mine, nahmwarkihn mihn Jew kan. Irai pwa, “Kamai kapangda Ah ujuhwo palimese in loannge ioar kamai indoahng pwongi Ih.”
2.3: Nehn en Nahmwarki Herod rongda me, ih jalohkihda pwilihkihoar sohn Jerusalem ohroj.
2.4: Ih panginpene jamwrou laplappok apel jounpadahk in kojonneddok, ih kalelpoak iparai “Ia wija Messiah pirin noaisikdi?”
2.5: Irai japoang pwa, “Nehn Bethlehem nehn wein Judea, pwa ioar mehwa joukohppo insingehdi:
2.6: ‘Koah, Bethlehem, nehn wein Judah, jaudi koawoa, keiou siksik nehn pwungen koaun in Judah kan, pwa jang ipoamw emen koaun pirin indoa ma pirin apwali noai armaj in Israel kan.’ ”
2.7: Doar Herod kapokonihpene in rir woal loalkoanngok pwa ih en woahwoahkihda ngehd uhdahn anjoauwo ujuhwo pwokda,
2.8: ih kadarla irai Bethlehem pel pwehng irai, “Alwe rapahki mwehu jeriho. Anjoauwa kamwai kapangda Ih, kamwai pakairkihdohng ngoahi, pwa ngoah en pel pwili alwe pwongi Ih.”
2.9: Mwerin irai rong mehpwiai irai ken dauluhlla; a ujuhwa ma irai kapang palimese in loannge pel pwuroahng pwokda kahlwa irai oaroh lel wijahu ma jeriho mine.
2.10: Anjoauwo irai kapangda ujuhwo, irai inenin malauda.
2.11: Nehn irai dilda nehn ummwo kapangda Jeriho apel Ah nohnohu, Mary, irai poadpwomwla pwongi Ih. Doar irai kihda arai kijakij kajampwallok kijakijkihoang Ih kohl, frankincense pel myrrh.
2.12: Anjoauwo irai japahllahng nehn arai wei, irai wud nehn apas al sohrohr pwa Koahs ne kaperki irai nehn oau oarmoan pwa irai en joah pwurla ipen Herod. Kaula Egypt
2.13: Nehn irai ne inla, sohnloang in Koaunno men pwokkoang Joseph nehn ah oarmoan. Sohnloanngo pwehng ih, “Pwohrda oaloa jerihen pwilihki inahu kaukihdihla ara Egypt. Mine oaroh Ngoah kapwa pwehng koawoa, ngehd kamwai en japahldo, pwa Herod raprapahki jerihen pwa ih en kojukdi.”
2.14: Inpwonngohr Joseph pwohrda oaloa jeriho pwilihki inahu irai inla Egypt,
2.15: mine o oaroh lel en Herod mehdi. Me ne kapwaihahda dahkij ma Koaunno ne pwa jang ipen joukohppo, “Ngoah pangin Noai Jermweinno jang Egypt.” Kojkojdihn jerihkan
2.16: Nehn en Herod kidalda pwa woal loalkoanngok ne kapweipweidi ih, ih inenin lioas. Ih ruwojla pwa jeri woal ohroj ma mahki johnpar riau apel pehnangin ma minmine nehn Bethlehem apel kahnihmw ohroj ma koaroannoang en kojkojdi; me jang in ah rong jang pwihnin woal loalkoanngok sapin irai kapangda ujuhwo.
2.17: Me ne pwoaida dahkij joukohp Jeremiah kohpda:
2.18: “Ngilloau indoa joang nehn Ramah, ngilen joang koalik, Rachel ma joangjoangjoangki nah jerihok, johpwa nimen injenmwahula, pwa jerihok ne mehdi.” Japahlla Nazareth
2.19: Mwerin Herod mehdi, sohnloang en Koaunno men pwuroahng pwokkoang Joseph nehn ah oarmoan nehn Egypt,
2.20: “Pwohrda,” Sohnloanngo pwehng ih, “oaloa jerihen apel inahn kamwai japahlla Israel, pwa irai ma jongjong in kojukdi jerihen ne mehdi.”
2.21: Joseph pwohrda, oaloa jeriho apel inahu japahlla Israel.
2.22: A nehn ah kidalda pwa Archelaus nihn Herod, koaun kapwin Judea ioar ih mijikin inla o. Mwerin ah ne pel oaloa kaweid nehn ah oarmoanno, ih inla nehn wein Galilee.
2.23: Peneineiho inla koaujoanla nehn kahnihmw oau adanki Nazareth. Me ne pel pwoaida dahkij ma joukohppok ne kohpda: “Ih pirin wiahla mihn Nazareth.”

3.1: Nehn rehn pwiok John jounpoapdaij indoa padpadahk nehn japwsoahn in Judea,
3.2: ih pwa, “Kamwai koaluhla pwa Wein nehnloannge ne koaroando.”
3.3: John ioar woalwa ma joukohppa Isaiah pwa: “Ngilloau ma kin poangpoangpoang nehn japwsoahn: ‘Kamwai koaunopda alin Koaunno, kamwai kainenehla Ah al kan ma Ih pirin alu loaloa!’ ”
3.4: En John likkoauwok wiawihda jang winen kamel, ih kangirki kilin kahu nehn lopkoa. Kanah mwinge ioar padda apel jukehn loanglap in nehn woallo.
3.5: Armaj jang Jerusalem, jang koujapw ohroj nehn wein Judea apel wijahkan ohroj koaroannoang Pillap Jordan indoa pwa,
3.6: irai en woahkda diparai kan, a ih poapdaijihla irai nehn Pillap Jordan.
3.7: A nehn a kapang dirin Pharisee apel Sadducee allaluhdo ipoa pwa en poapdaij, ih pwehng irai, “Kamwai sinekpwi, inje pwehng kamwai pwa kamwai kak pisjang koaloklok in Koahs ma nimenoar lel kamwai?
3.8: Kamwai wiahda siahk kan ma pirin kajalehda amwai ne koaluhla apel wiliakapwla.
3.9: Kamwai joah lemleme pwa, ‘Kamai jamanki Abraham,’ pwa Ngoah pwehng kamwai pwa Koahs kakkoar wiahjang in sakai pwiai nihn Abraham jeri!
3.10: Jiloahu ne onopdahng poaloahdi sipin suhkoa ohroj ma johkin kihda wah mwehu, en poalpoaldi peidekla nehn oaiho.
3.11: Ngoah poapdaijihki kamwai pil pwa en kajalehda amwai koaluhla, a Ih ma pirin indoa mwerin ngoahi pirin poapdaijihki kamwai Ngen Joaroawi apel oai. Ih inenin laplapjang ngoahi; ngoah johpwa warroang wa Ah sandellok.
3.12: Ih kol nah poahkko, onopdahng pwa en kasohrohrihpijoang liporrohn wihd kan jang in kilinnok. Ih pirin nekidla wah kan nehn johkohu, a okojla kilinnok nehn oaiho ma johkak kunla.” En Jesus Poapdaijla (Mark 1:9-11; Luke 3:21,22)
3.13: Jesus ken injang Galilee inla Pillap Jordan pwa en poapdaijla ipen John.
3.14: A John jong en kauhdi, pwehng Ih, “Ngoah anahne koawoa en poapdaiji ngoahi, a koawoa ken indoa ipoai?”
3.15: Jesus japoang, “Joah kauhdi, pwa ioar koajoandi wa me, pwa ioar ma koanoahng kisa kapwaihahda kupwuren Koahs.” John ken pwungkihla.
3.16: Jesus ken poapdaijla, Ih doauda jang nehn pillo; anjoauwo nehnloannge risda, Ih kapang Ngenin Koahs indihdo in mwomwen mwurei men jokdi pohn Ih.
3.17: Ngilloau jang nehnloannge pwa, “Me ioar Noai Jermwein kajampwalwa, ma Ngoah keiou ipwilki.”

4.1: Ngen Joaroawi kahlwahla Jesus nehn japwsoahn pwa en kajongjong ipen Jehsen.
4.2: Mwerin Ah joah mwinge rehn pahijek pel pwong pahijek, Ih mwakohkohla.
4.3: Joun Kajongjonngo indoa pwehng Ih, “Ma Koah Nihn Koahs, pwehng sakai pwiai en wiahla pilahwa.”
4.4: Jesus japoang, “Ne insingdi nehn Puk Joaroawi: ‘Jaudi pilahwahr doari armaj kak mourki pwa Mahjan ohroj ma kin indoa jang ipen Koahs.’ ”
4.5: Jehsenno ukla Ih nehn Jerusalem, kahnihmw joarwiho, kihdi oang Ih pohn koadkoan Umw Joarwiho,
4.6: pwehng Ih, “Ma Koah Nihn Koahs, lujdihwe pwa ne insingdi nehn Puk Joaroawi: ‘Ih pirin ruwoj Nah sohnloanngok doahr Koawoa, irai pirin kolkihda Koawoa poahrai pwa ehmmwen kan en joah ohla pohn sakai.’ ”
4.7: Jesus japoang ih, “Ne pel insingdi: ‘Joah kajongjongi Koaunno oamw Koahs.’ ”
4.8: Jehsenno pel ukdahla Ih pohn dol illoahioau, kajalehng Ih wein jampah ohroj apel doahr ahr ling.
4.9: Jehsen pwehng Jesus, “Mehpwiai ohroj ngoah pirin kioang Koawoa, ma Koah rukdi pwongi ngoahi.”
4.10: Jesus pwehng ih, “Alwe jang Ngoahi, Jehsen! Pwa ne pel insingdi, ‘Pwongi Koaunno oamw Koahs, papah Ih kalahpwuk.’ ”
4.11: Doari Jehsenno injang Ih, a sohnloanngok indoa jeuweje Ih. Jesus sapda padahk (Mark 1:14,15; Luke 4:14,15)
4.12: Anjoauwo ma Jesus rongda pwa John ne mine nehn kalpwuhj, Ih pwurla Galilee.
4.13: Ih joah koaujoan nehn Nazareth, Ih inla wud mine Capernaum, ipen jed in Galilee, nehn wein Zebulun apel Naphtali.
4.14: Me wiawi pwa en kapwaihahda kokohp en Isaiah:
4.15: “Nehn wein Zebulun apel Naphtali, ipen jeddo, oaloap Pillap Jordan, nehn Galilee wija ma mihn likin dir mine!
4.16: Armaj ma mine nehn ros pirin kapang maram koalik oau. Iraihok ma mine nehn japw ros apel mehdi, marammo pirin dakarda.”
4.17: Jang anjoauwo inla Jesus sapda padahk, “Kamwai koaluhla, pwa Wein nehnloannge ne koaroando.” Jesus Pangin Sohnloakjid pahmen (Mark 1:16-20; Luke 5:1-11)
4.18: Rehn oau Jesus allaluhla pohn poahrinjedin Galilee Ih kapangda riari oau, Simon ma pel adanki Peter apel riah Andrew. Ara loakloakjidki nihra ukko nehn jeddo, pwa ara sohnloakjid roahmen.
4.19: Jesus pwehng ara, “Kamwa indoa pwilihla Ngoahi, a Ngoah pirin wiahkihla kamwa sohnloakjidi armaj.”
4.20: Anjoauwohr ara kihdi nihra ukko pwilihla Ih.
4.21: Pel aluhla ekij Ih kapangda pel oau riari, James apel John, nihn Zebedee, mwindi nehn wararai pohsso pwili ara pahpa Zebedee, winwina nihrai ukkok. Ih pangin ara en pel indoa.
4.22: Anjoauwohr ara kihdi pohsso apel ara pahpa, pwilihla Ih. Jesus Kemwehuwihla johmwehu (Luke 6:17-19)
4.23: Jesus allaluhjili nehn Galilee ohroj, padpadahk nehn jinakoke kan, kapahrakki doahr Rongmwehu in Weiho, kemwehuwihla joangoan johmwehu ohroj ipen armaj kan.
4.24: Rongin Ih lel wija ohroj nehn Syria, armaj kan wahdohng Ih ohroj ma johmwehuki joangjoangoan johmwehu, irai kan ma anki moadoak koalik, irai kan ma ngen jaus dilloang loaloa, pel irai kan ma anki epilepsi apel mwoasor — Ih kemwehuwihla ohroj.
4.25: Pokon koalik pwilihla Ih wija ma Ih inla — armaj jang Galilee, jang Decapolis, jang Jerusalem, jang ohroj Judea, apel jang palimese in Pillap Jordan.

5.1: Nehn en Jesus kapangda pokonno, Ih indahla pohn dol oau mwindi; Nah sohnpadahkkok pokondo Ipoa.
5.2: Ih ken sapda padahki irai pwa: Pai mehlel (Luke 6:20-23)
5.3: “Meid pai irai kan ma anahne ngen, pwa irai pirin johjohki Wein nehnloannge.
5.4: Meid pai irai kan ma joang, pwa Koahs pirin kainjenmwahuwihla irai.
5.5: Meid pai irai kan ma aksiksik, pwa irai pirin johjohki jampah.
5.6: Meid pai irai kan ma kin ngoangki me pwung, pwa Koahs pirin kaisarihla irai.
5.7: Meid pai irai ma kin kadek, pwa irai pel pirin diar kadek.
5.8: Meid pai irai ma mwakelkel nehn mohngiongirai, pwa irai pirin kapang Koahs.
5.9: Meid pai irai ma kin wihwia doadoahk in kamwahu nehn pwungen armaj kan, pwa irai pirin adanki jerihn Koahs.
5.10: Meid pai irai ma kin loklokki pwung jang in irai mohmohmourki Koahs, pwa irai pirin anki Wein nehnloannge.
5.11: “Meid pai kamwai ma armaj lahlahwe, apel koalkoa kamwai, apel karaunihki kamwai joang likamw apel japwung ohroj pwa Ngoahi.
5.12: Kamwai injenmwahu apel malau pwa kijakij koalik joujowi kamwai nehnloannge, pwa ioar pel joangwahr irai wiahng joukohppok mwohn kamwai.” Jed apel Maram (Mark 9:50; Luke 14:34,35)
5.13: “Kamwai ioar jed in jampah. A ma nimen jeddo johla nime, joh mehkij kak en wiawihoang pwa en pwuroahng minehda nime. Johla kaspoan jeddo, ioarroar en kerpwihekla pwa armaj kan en alu puwoa.
5.14: “Kamwai ioar maram in jampah. Kahnihmw oau ma mine pohn dol oau johkak oakkoakla.
5.15: Armaj pel johkak okojda lahm oau kioang pehn pwohl oau. A irai en kioang pohn dohiahu pwa en kamarami ohroj nehn ummwo.
5.16: En pel doahr amwai maram en janjalda mwohn armaj, pwa irai en kapang amwai wihwia mwehu kan apel kapngahki Jamamwai nehnloannge.” Padahki doahr Kojonned
5.17: “Joah lemleme pwa ngoahi indoahng koauwehla Kojonned in Moses ke pel padahk in Joukohppok; Ngoah joah indoahng koauwehla arai padahk kan, a Ngoah indoahng kapwaihahda.
5.18: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, ma nehnloannge apel jampah johla, insing siksik oau ke mwei siksik kij in Kojonneddo johkak joaloangla oaroh audoapoa ohroj en pwoaida.
5.19: Emen ma koauwehla oau in kojonneddok, mihndahr ma kojonnedwahr ma keiou siksik apel padahkihoang epwi en pel wia doahroar, pirin keiou siksik nehn Wein nehnloannge. A inje ma kin kapwaihahda apel padahkki kojonned pwiai pirin laplap nehn Wein nehnloannge.
5.20: Ngoah pwehng kamwai, ma amwai wihwia mwehu joah mwehu jang en jounpadahk in Kojonned apel Pharisee-ok kamwai uhdahn johkak dilda nehn Wein nehnloannge.” Kojarmaj
5.21: “Kamwai ne rong padahkkok ma mihn mehjjok oaloa, ‘Joah kojukdi armaj; emen ma kojukdi armaj pirin lelloang kadeik.’
5.22: A Ngoah pwehng kamwai: ma emen lioas oang riah pirin lelloang kadeik. Pel oau, emen ma pwehng riahu, ‘Pweipwei men koawoa,’ pirin pel wijiklahng Mwoalen Koapwung. A emen ma pwa, ‘Koah iahk!’ ih kak lel oang nehn keper in oaiho nehn ehl.
5.23: Ma koah wia oamw meiroang in mwoallo a koah samanda pwa rioamw men injinjuwed oang koawoa,
5.24: kihdi oamw meiroanngo ipen mwoallo. Inla koapwungla nehn pwungamwa, japahldo wia oamw meiroanngo.
5.25: “Ma mine emen pirin wahlahng koawoa nehn mwoalen koapwung, pispis koajoanehdi nehn pwungamwa mwohn ah wahla koawoa ipen jounkoapwung kan, doar koawoa ken wijikla nehn kalpwuhj.
5.26: Ngoah pwehng koawoa in mehlel, koah johkak pisla oaroh ngehd koawoa en dupukla pwaipwanid ohroj.” Kamwahl
5.28: A apkas Ngoah pwehng kamwai emen ma kapang lihmen apel mwehukihda, ih ne kamwahl nehn mohngiongin.
5.29: Ma pwoaroan mijoammwen loap moaun kahrehioang koawoa en wiahda dihp, dipoaljang kerpwihla. Ma ekij in palwoaroamwen kerpwihekla mwehujang ma palwoaroamwen ohroj kerpwihekla nehn ehl.
5.30: A ma poahmmwen loap kidal kahrehioang koawoa en wiahda dihp, poaloahjang kerpwihla. Mwehuwoang koawoa en luhjjang ekij in palwoaroamwen jang palwoaroamwen ohroj en kerpwihekla nehn ehl.” Mweipijoang (in pwoapwoaud) (Matthew 19:9; Mark 10:11,12; Luke 16:18)
5.31: “Kamwai ne kidal da kojonneddo pwa, ‘Emen ma mweijang pahioahu en kioang ih kijilikoau in kamweid.’
5.32: A Ngoah pwehng kamwai, ma woalmen mweijang pahioa, jang in kahrpoahioau likin kamwahl, ih ne kahrehioang liho nehn kamwahl ma ih pwuroahng pwoapwoaudla; a ma emen woal painkihda liho, ih ne mine nehn dipen kamwahl.” Kahula
5.33: “Kamwai ne rong da ma ne pweiekkoang mihn mehjjok. ‘Joah koauwehla oamw kahula, a kolkol oamw inoau oang Koaunno.’
5.34: A ngoah pwehng kamwai, joah kahula nehn amwai kin wiahda inoau. Joah kahukihla nehnloannge pwa ioar mwoalen Koahs wa.
5.35: Joah pel kahukihla ke jampah pwa ioar dohn ehn wa; ke Jerusalem pwa ioar kahnihmw in Nahmwarki Laplap.
5.36: Pel joah kahukihla moangoammwen, pwa koah johkak wiahng apas pisen moang en korohrohla ke soalla.
5.37: Amwai sikesik en kin mine in ‘Eh’ ke ‘Joah’; a ma daulihla a kin sapjang ipen me juweddo.” Pwoaroan maj oau oang Pwoaroan maj oau (Luke 6:29,30)
5.38: “Kamwai ne pel rong pwa. ‘Pwoaroan maj oau dupukki pwoaroan maj oau, a ngihpas dupukki ngihpas.’
5.39: A Ngoah pwehng kamwai, kamwai en joah pallan armaj men. Ma emen pokihdi joapoamwen loap moaun, pel kioang ih oaloap.
5.40: A ma emen panglahng koawoa mwoal en koapwung en kihjang oamw jehsso, pel kioang ih oamw joakidden.
5.41: Ma emen ipong oang koawoa en alu ki mwail oau, a koah en pwili aluhkihla mwail riau.
5.42: Ma emen poaki koawoa mehkij koah mweidoahng, ma emen poaki koawoa mehkij pwa ih en kajpahlihdo mwuhr pel mweidoahng.” Ipwilki Imwinsihsi (Luke 6:27,28,32-36)
5.43: “Kamwai ne pel rong Ih ne pwa, ‘Ipwilki mihn ipoamw’ a lioassoang oamw imwinsihsi.
5.44: A Ngoah pwehng kamwai: Ipwilki amwai imwinsihsi kan apel kapkapki irai ma kin koalkoa kamwai,
5.45: pwa kamwai en kak wia jerihn Jamamwaiho nehnloannge. Pwa Ih ma wiahng joauwo en dakda pohn me nauna apel pohn me mwehu, Ih kadardo wud pohn armaj pwung apel armaj japwung.
5.46: Ma kamwai ipwilki irai ma ipwilki kamwai, kijakij dahioau kamwai nen oaloa? Jounrik daksis kan joah kin pel wia doahroar?
5.47: Ma kamwai pel kajamwo rioamw kan oar doari, dahioau kamwai wia koalik jang epwi? Armaj rosros kan joah kin pel wia doahroar?
5.48: Kamwai en unjek doahroar Jamamwaiho nehnloannge ma unjek.”

6.1: “Kanaihoang kamwai en joah wia pwa amwai wihwia mwehu kan en janjal mwohn armaj pwa irai en kapang kamwai. Ma kamwai wia me, nen joh amwai kijakij jang Jamamwaiho nehnloannge.
6.2: “Doari, nehn amwai pirin kijkijoa emen ma anahne, joah kalohkihjili doahr mwalaun kan kin wia nehn jinakoke kan pel nehn al kan pwa armaj en kapnga. Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, irai ne oaloa dupkoan irai doadoahk ohroj.
6.3: A nehn amwai en kijkijoa emen ma anahne, joah mweidoahng loap jehjoa in poahmmwen en kidal da loap kidal wihwia,
6.4: pwa oamw kijakij en wiawi in rir. Doar oamw Pahpa, ma kin kapang mehkan ma kin wiawi in rir, pirin kijkijoa koawoa.” Kapkap (Luke 11:2-4)
6.5: “Nehn amwai kin kapkap, joah wia doahr mwalaun, pwa irai kin perenki kapkap, uhda nehn jinakoke kan apel nehn koaimw in al kan pwa armaj en kapang. Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, irai ne oaloa dupkoaraiwa pwon.
6.6: A nehn oamw en kapkap, inla nehn oamw perehu, risingdi wanihmmwo, koah kapkap oang oamw Pahpa, ma koah joh kak kapang. Doar oamw Pahpa, ma kin kapang da ma wiawi in rir, pirin kijkijoa koawoa.
6.7: “A nehn amwai kapkap, joah pwurur doahr armaj rosros kan, pwa irai kin lemleme pwa arai kohs kan nen rong irai pwa dir irai lallok.
6.8: Joah doahroar irai pwa Joamoammwo kidal da koah anahne mwohn oamw poaki Ih.
6.9: Doar me, ioar doahr oamw pirin kapkap: ‘Jamamai nehnloannge, oadoammwen en joaroawi,
6.10: oamw wei en pwoaida, kupwuroamwen en wiawi pohn jampah doahroar nehnloannge.
6.11: Kihdoa rehnnoauwe kanmai mwingehn oauwoau rehn.
6.12: Mahkoahng kamai amai japwung kan, doahroar amai kin mahkoahng irai kan ma wia japwung oang kamai;
6.13: joah kahlwahng kamai nehn jongjong, kapisla kamai jang ipen ih ma naunahu. [Oamw mwei ioarroar Mwei, Manman apel Lingwa allaluhla. Amen.]’
6.14: “Pwa ma kamwai mahkoahng irai kan ma wia naunahng kamwai, Jamamwai nehnloannge pirin pel mahkoahng kamwai.
6.15: A ma kamwai johpwa mahkoahng arai japwung kan, Jamamwai nehnloannge pel jehpirin mahkoahng kamwai.” Kaijihjol
6.16: “Nehn amwai kin kaijihjol, kamwai joah wia mwomw doahroar mwalaunnok kin wia, pwa irai kawikla mwomwoarai en kajalehda pwa irai kaijihjol. Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, irai ne oaloa dupkoarai.
6.17: A nehn oamw kaijihjol, salipla pel duhpla mijoammwen,
6.18: pwa en joah janjal oang armaj pwa koah kaijihjol, a oang oar Joamoamw, ma kisai johkak kapang, a joamoamw, ma kin kapang mehkan ma wiawi in rir, pirin kijkijoa koawoa.” Pai nehnloannge (Luke 12:33,34)
6.19: “Joah nekidpene oang pein koawoa oamw pai kan nehn jampah, wija woahd apel insahn pahrang koauwehla, pel jounpirap kan kak dilda pirapoahla.
6.20: A nekidpene oamw pai kan nehnloannge, wija woahd apel mer johkak koauwehla, apel jounpirap kan johkak dilda pirapoahla.
6.21: Pwa wija oamw pai kan mine, ioar mohngiongimmwen pel mine.” Mihn Joaroa Palwar (Luke 11:34-36)
6.22: “Maj ioar lahm in palwar. Ma pwoaroan mijoammwen kan mwehu, palwoaroamwen nehn dirin maram.
6.23: A ma pwoaroan mijoammwen kan nauna, palwoaroamwen nehn pel ros. Doar ma marammo nehn koawoa ros, ia woahr koalikin rossoauwe!” Koahs apel Koapwoahn Jampah (Luke 16:13; 12:22-31)
6.24: “Joh emen kak papah koaun roahmen, pwa ih pirin lioassoang emen a ipwilki emen; ih pirin kajampwalki emen, a mwamwahlki emen. Doari, kamwai johkak papah Koahs apel mwani.
6.25: “Ioar Ngoah pwehngki kamwai, joah pwunodki amwai mour, da kamwai pirin kang ke nim; ke oang palwoaroamwaikan, da kamwai pirin likkoauki. Mour joah kajampwal jang mwinge? Ke palwar joah kajampwal jang likkoau?
6.26: Kapang mahnsang in nehn woahwoa kan: irai johkin poadokdi, pel johkin doli, pel johkin nekid nehn wehraus kan, a Jamamwaiho nehnloannge kin kamwinge irai. Kamwai joah kajampwaljang irai?
6.27: Inje in kamwai jang in pwunod kak karoairoaihla ah mour awahioau?
6.28: “Mihnda kamwai pwunodki likkoau? Kamwai kapang kiepw in nehn japw kan, nehn irai kin koapkoapda; irai johkin doadoahk ke wiahda arai likkoau.
6.29: A kamwai en kidal pwa pel Nahmwarki Solomon, nehn ah koapwoahpwoa, joh kin kapwaski likkoau ling doahroar apas rohs pwiai.
6.30: Ma ioar doahr en Koahs kapwasihda mo in nehn mohj kan, ma mine rehnnoauwe a lakapw nehn oaiho, ih joah nen kapwasihda kamwai mwehu jang? Ia woahr siksikin amwai pwojon!
6.31: Doari, joah pwunod, pwa, ‘Da kisai en kang? Ke da kisai en nim? Ke da kisai en kol?’
6.32: Armaj rosros kan kin pwunpwunodki mehpwiai ohroj, a Jamamwaiho nehnloannge kidal pwa kamwai anahne mehpwiai.
6.33: Doar rapahki mijkoalkoal Wein Nehnloannge apel Ah pwung, a mehpwiai ohroj nen liklikkoang kamwai.
6.34: Doari, joah pwunodki lakapw, pwa lakapw kapwa pwen pwunodki pein ih. Johpwa anahne kapsahng apwal kan ma oauwoau rehn kan kin wahdo.”

7.1: “Joah kadeik armaj kan, pwa doar Koahs kadeikda kamwai.
7.2: Pwa Koahs nen kadeikda kamwai doahr kamwai kadeikda epwi, apel Ih nen jongki kamwai mihn jonngohr ma kamwai jongki epwi.
7.3: Amwda koah ke soahk dipoar siksik kij nehn mijen rioammwo a koah joah injinohki pwilein suhkoahn nehn mijoammwen?
7.4: Ia mwomwen oamw en kak pwehng rioammwen, ‘Menlau, mweidoahng ngoahi en kihjang dipoar siksik kij nehn pwoaroan mijoammwen,’ ma anjoauwohr pwilein suhkoahioau mine nehn pwoaroan mijoammwen?
7.5: Mwalaun men koawoa, keiou kihjang pwilein suhkoa nehn pwoaroan mijoammwen pwa koah en kak kapang mwehu, koah en kak kihjang dipoar siksik nehn mijen rioammwo.
7.6: “Joah kioang doahk mehkij ma Joaroawi; pwadoar ih pwurdo koahdi kamwai; kamwai joah kerpwihla nihmwai sakai kajampwal kan oang pij kan, pwa ioarroar irai nen wia siakpijoang.” Poaki, Rapahki, Lesles (Luke 11:9-13)
7.7: “Poaki a kamwai pirin oaloa; Rapahki a kamwai pirin diar; lesles a wanihmmwo pirin risdahng kamwai.
7.8: Pwa inje ma poaki pirin oaloa; apel inje ma kin rapahki pirin diar; apel wanihmmwo pirin risdahng inje ma lesles.
7.9: Inje in kamwai ma nah jeri poaki pilahwa a ih kioang sakai?
7.10: Ke ma ih poaki mwumw a ih kioang sinek?
7.11: Ma nehn amwai nauna, kamwai kidal kioang nihmwai jerihkan kijakij mwehu, ia woahr mwehuwin kijakijjo Jamamwai nehnloannge pirin kioang irai ma poaki Ih!
7.12: “Wiahng epwi da ma kamwai nimen irai en wiahng kamwai, pwa me oaroahpene Kojonned apel padahk in Joukohp kan.” Wanihmw Soahsiksik pel Wanihmw Sahlaplap (Luke 13:24)
7.13: “Dilda nehn wanihmw Soahsiksik. Pwa wanihmmwo inlahng ehl pwen sahlaplap pel allo pwen koalik apel moangoai a armaj dir alu loaloa.
7.14: A wanihmmwo inlahng mour pwen soahsiksik, allo pwen apwal doar armaj jipid diarda.” Suhkoa pas pel wehn suhkoahu (Luke 6:43,44)
7.15: “Kamwai mwajahni mwehu joukohp likamw kan. Irai indoa ipamwai in mwomwen jihpw, a loaloarai doahr wolf ingkelpwi.
7.16: Kamwai nen kidalki arai wahrai kan. Kak armaj en doli grape jang suhkoa dokdok, ke fig jang suhkoa karak?
7.17: Suhkoa mwehu kihda wah mwehu, a suhkoa nauna kihda wah nauna.
7.18: A suhkoa mwehu pas johkak kihda wah nauna, a suhkoa nauna johkak kihda wah mwehu.
7.19: Suhkoa ohroj ma joah kihda wah mwehu pirin poalpoaldi kerpwihekla nehn oaiho.
7.20: Ioar, jang in wah kan kamwai nen kidalki joukohp likamw kan.” Sohnpadahk Mehlel (Luke 13:25-27)
7.21: “Jaudi ohroj ma panginki Ngoahi, ‘Koaun, Koaun’ pirin dilda nehn Wein nehnloannge, a araihokkoar ma kin kapwaihahda kupwuren Joamoaiho ma mine nehnloannge.
7.22: Rehnin kadeikko armaj dir pirin pwehng Ngoahi, ‘Koaun, Koaun, jaudi kamai ma kin wia kokohp in oadoammwen, pel in oadoammwen kamai kin kaujjang ngen jaus pel wia joangoan manman dir?’
7.23: A Ngoah pirin pwehng irai, ‘Ngoah jehjoa kamwai. Alwehjang ipoai, kamwai armaj nauna!’ ” Sohn Kou Umw Roahmen (Luke 6:47-49)
7.24: “Doari emen ma kin rong Oai Mahjan pwiai apel peikkoang, ih doahroar woal loalkoanngo ma kouda umwahu pohn sakai.
7.25: Wuddo mwoardi, lapakehda, enngo koaldo pohk ummwo, a ih johpwa mwoardi, pwa ih poahjoanda pohn sakai.
7.26: “A emen ma rong Oai Mahjan pwiai a johpwa peikkoang ih doahroar woal pweipweiho ma kouda umwahu pohn pik.
7.27: Wuddo mwoardi, lapakehda, enngo pohk ummwo, ummwo kipla mwoarpijoang.” Manman en Jesus
7.28: Nehn en Jesus ne doari Ah Mahjan, pokonno inenin pwuriamweikihla mehlel joangoan padahk oauwo,
7.29: pwa manman in Ah padahk johpwa doahroar en jounpadahk in Kojonneddok arai padahk.

8.1: Nehn Ah indi jang pohn dollo pokon koalik oau pwilihdo Ih.
8.2: Woalmen johmwehu lepa indoa ipen Jesus, poadpwomwla pwehng Ih, “Maing, ma koah nimen, koah kak kamwkelehda ngoahi.”
8.3: Jesus kailla poah pukkoang woallo, Ih pwa, “Ngoah nimen. Ken mwakelkelda!” Anjoauwohr woallo mwehula jang ah lepa.
8.4: Jesus pwehng woallo, “Kapang! Pwa koah en johpwa pwehng emen. Inla kajalehioang jamwrou a koah wia oamw meiroang joanngo ma Moses koajoanehdi, en wia oamw mihn kadehde oang irai.” Jesus Kemwehuwihla en Koaun in Jounpei men ah Lidu (Luke 7:1-10)
8.5: Nehn en Jesus lel Capernaum, laplap in jounpei men indoa ipoa, poaki jauwaj.
8.6: “Maing,” ih pwehng Ih, “noai sohn papah men mine in ummwo, mwoasorla apel inenin weiroak.”
8.7: Jesus pwehng woallo, “Ngoah pirin inla kemwehuwihla ih.”
8.8: Laplap in jounpeiho pwehng Jesus, “Maing, ngoah joah warroang Koawoa en indoa nehn umwoaiho. Pwen lalloar, ah noai liduhwo ne mwehula.
8.9: Pwa ngoah armaj men ma mine pehn koaun pwi, ngoah pel koaunda jounpei pwi. Nehn Oai kin pwehng emen irai, ‘Inla,’ ih kin inla; a oang emen, ‘indoa,’ ih indoa; a oang oai lidu, ‘Wiahda me,’ ih kin wiahda.”
8.10: Nehn en Jesus rong me, Ih pel pwuriamweikihla pwehng irai ma pwilpwili Ih, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, Ngoah kahjik diar emen nehn Israel ma anki joangoan pwojon koalik doahr me.
8.11: Ngoah pwehng kamwai pwa armaj dir pirin injang palimese apel palikapi, mwindi nehn dohiarai pwili Abraham, Isaac pel Jacob nehn Wein nehnloannge.
8.12: A sohn Weiho pirin kerpwihekla likin, oang nehn rosso, wija ma irai pirin joang apel keikeikeisakai.”
8.13: Doari Jesus pwehng laplap in jounpeiho, “Alwe in umwoammwo, da ma koah kamehlele en wiawi.” Nah liduhwo mwehula anjoauwohr. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Johmwehu dir (Mark 1:29-34; Luke 4:38-41)
8.14: Anjoauwo Jesus lel nehn umwen Peter-o, Ih kidalda pwa inen pahien Peter-o johmwehu karkar.
8.15: Jesus koldi poahn liho, karkarro injang ipen liho; ih ken pwohrda sapda papah Ih.
8.16: Injoausikdi, armaj dir ma ngen jaus sihda pohrai wijikdohng Jesus. Jesus kajroahjang ngen jaus iparai ki lal, apel kemwehuwihla ohroj ma johmwehu.
8.17: Me en kapwaihahda da me joukohp Isaiah pwa: “Ih oaloahda asai jasihkei kan pel wahda asai johmwehu kan.” Dupkoan Pwilihla Jesus (Luke 9:57-62)
8.18: Anjoauwo ma Jesus kapangda uhwen koalikin pokonnoauwo pwilpwili Ih, Ih pwehng nah sohnpadahkkok pwa irai en jeila oaloap jed in Galilee.
8.19: Jounpadahk in kojonneddo men indoa ipoa pwehng Ih, “Jounpadahk, ngoah en pwili koawoa wija ohroj koah inla.”
8.20: Jesus japoang, “Fox kan mine arai lipw, apel mahnsang kan mine arai paj, a Nihn-Armaj joh wija Ih en koammoaldi.”
8.21: Emen sohnpadahk pel pwehng Ih, “Maing, mweidoahng ngoah en inla jaripdi oai pahpahu mijkoalkoal.”
8.22: A Jesus pwehng ih, “Pwili Ngoahi, a mweidoahng irai kan ma ne mehdi en pein jaripdi arai mehdi kan.” Jesus Kamoaloailoaihdi Melmel (Mark 4:35-41; Luke 8:22-25)
8.23: Jesus doaudahng nehn pohsso, Nah sohnpadahkkok pwili Ih.
8.24: Anjoauwohr melmel oau pwokda pohn jeddo, nohk jaujaudo nehn pohsso. A Jesus moair.
8.25: Sohnpadahkkok inla panginda Ih pwehng Ih, “Maing, doaroahla kisai! Kisain ken mehdi!”
8.26: Ih japoang, “Siksik amwai pwojon, Amwda kamwai ke majpwehk.” Ih uhda ruwoje enngok apel nohk en uhdi, anjoauwohr melmello ken molundi.
8.27: Sohnpadahkkok pwuriamweila, idoak nehn pwungarai, “Armaj dahmen me? Ma eng apel no kin peikkoang!” Kemwehulahn Woal Roahmen ma Ngen Nauna Dilda Nehn Ara Mour (Mark 5:1-20; Luke 8:26-39)
8.28: Anjoauwo ma Jesus lel oaloap jeddo, nehn koujapw in Gadara, woal roahmen suhwoang Ih ma indoa jang nehn joaujoauwok. Woal roahmen ne ma ngen jaus mine nehn ara inenin keper doar joh armaj kin wud nehn alloauwo.
8.29: Anjoauwohr ara wering Jesus pwehng Ih, “Koah Nihn Koahs, da Koah nimen wiahng kama? Koah indoahng koalkoa kama mwohn anjoauwo?”
8.30: Mine pwihnin pij koalik oau mwingmwinge joah dohla.
8.31: Ngen jaussok poaki Jesus, “Ma Koah pirin kajroahla kamai, kadarla kamai nehn pwihnin pijjo.”
8.32: “Inla!” Jesus pwehng irai. Doar irai ken inla dilloang nehn pijjok, nehn anjoauwohr pijjok kijoudihla in dokdokko duhla nehn pillo.
8.33: Sohn apwali pijjok kaula inla nehn koaujoanno pwehng me ohroj, pwilihki da ma wiawihoang armajjok ma ngen jaussok mine pohra.
8.34: Sohn koaujoanno ohroj inlahng suhwoang Jesus. Anjoauwo irai suhwoang Ih, irai poaki Ih en injang nehn arai wijahu.

9.1: Jesus doaudahng pohn pohsso jeila oaloap jeddo, nehn Ah koaujoanno .
9.2: Woalpwi wahdohng Ih woal mwoasor men mine pohn rohp oau. Anjoauwo ma Jesus kapang arai pwojon, Ih pwehng woal mwoasorro, “Koapwoarpwoar, noai jeri! Dipoamw kan ne lapwda.”
9.3: A epwi jounpadahk in kojonneddok ma mine o lemlemehki pwa “Woal mene lahlahwe.”
9.4: Jesus kidal arai lamlam, doar Ih ken pwa, “Amwda kamwai ke lamlam nauna nehn mohngiongimwai kan?
9.5: Ia minno moangoai, Ngoah en pwa, ‘Dipoamw kan ne lapwda,’ ke, ‘Uhda alu’?
9.6: A Ngoah en kamehlele oang kamwai en kidal pwa Nihn-Armaj anki manmanin mahkoahng dihp pohn jampah.” Ih pwehng woal mwoasorro, “Uhda, oaloa kioammwen koah inla nehn umwoammwo.”
9.7: Woallo ken uhda inla in umwahu.
9.8: Nehn en pokonno kapang me irai inenin majpwehkda; irai kapnga Koahs ma kioang armaj joangoan manman oauwo. Jesus pangin Matthew (Mark 2:13-17; Luke 5:27-32)
9.9: En Jesus injang o nehn Ah allaluhla, Ih kapangda woal men, adanki Matthew, jounrik daksis, ma onnonohn nehn ah oahpisso. Jesus pwehng ih, “Pwilihla Ngoahi.” Doar ih ken uhda pwilihla Ih.
9.10: Nehn en Jesus mwingmwinge nehn umwen Matthew-o, jounrik daksis apel armaj dipan dir indoa pel mwinge pwili Ih apel Nah sohnpadahkkok.
9.11: Pharisee pwi kapang me pwehng Nah sohnpadahkkok, “Amwda amwai Jounpadahkken ke pwili jounrik daksis pel armaj dipan kan mwinge?”
9.12: Nehn Ah rongda me, Jesus pwa, “Jaudi armaj sihkei ioar anahne jounwini, a armaj johmwehu.
9.13: Inla woahwoahkihda woahwoahn mehkije jang nehn Puk Joaroawi: ‘Ngoah mwehuki kadek, jaudi meiroang in mahn.’ Ngoah joah indoahng pangin armaj pwung, a armaj dipan kan.” Peidekki doahr Kaijihjol (Mark 2:18-22; Luke 5:33-39)
9.14: Doar nihn John jounpoapdaij sohnpadahkkok indoa idoak oang Jesus, “Amwda kamai apel Pharisee-ok kin dod amai kaijihjol a nihmw sohnpadahk kan ken johkin kaijihjol?”
9.15: Jesus japoang, “Imdoahr, kamwai lemleme ma sohnkapar in kamdipw in koapwoapwoaud oau en injinjuwed nehn en woal kamwohddo ah minmine iparai? A oau anjoau ma pirin indoa ma woal kamwohddo pirin wijik jang irai; doari, ioar anjoauwo irai pirin kaijihjol.
9.16: “Joh armaj kin doahng dipwin likkoau kapw kij in likkoau dehn oau, pwa dipwin likkoau kappwo nen pworpene doapwdoapwjang in likkoau merinngo, nehn kakoalikihla soahroakko.
9.17: Joh armaj kin widekihoang wain kapw nehn dohn wain dehn. Pwa dohn wainno nen pwokpijoang, wainno widekla, dohn wainno ohla. Wain kapw en widekihoang nehn dohn wain kapw, a kapwa nekidekla.” Jerpein Mehdi men apel Li Johmwehu men (Mark 5:21-43; Luke 8:40-56)
9.18: Nehn Ah pwahpwahpwa me, koaun in mihn Jew men indoa poadpwomwla mwohn Jesus pwehng Ih, “Noai jerpeinno kapwehsen mehdi. A indoa kioang poahmmwen puwoa, pwa ih en mourda.”
9.19: Jesus uhda pwilihla ih, pwilihki nah sohnpadahkkok.
9.20: Anjoauwo lihmen ma anki johmwehu in insa pwilpwil johnpar eijek riau indoa likinjarkin pukkoangdi ikin Ah likkoauwo.
9.21: Liho pwehng pein ih, “Ma ngoah pwen kodurroar Ah likkoauwo, ngoah nen mwehula.”
9.22: Jesus jipwoalla pwehng ih, “Koapwoarpwoar, Noai jerpein, oamw pwojon ne kasihkeida koawoa.” Liho mwehula anjoauwohr.
9.23: Anjoauwo ma Jesus dilda nehn umwen koaunno Ih kapang jounkoajoanngok apel armaj kan loakloakoa,
9.24: Ih pwehng irai, “Kamwai dilla, jerpeinne johpwa mehdi, a ih moair.” A irai uruhrki Ih.
9.25: Mwerin armajjok dilla, Ih dilda loaloa koldi poahn jerpeinno, ih pwohrda.
9.26: Rong oauwe lohk pijoang nehn wija ohroj. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Woal Majkun Roahmen
9.27: Jesus daudauluhlla jang wijahu, woal majkun roahmen kaujla Ih, poangpoang, “Jeuweje kama, nihn David!”
9.28: Nehn Ah ne dilda nehn umw, woal majkunnok indoa Ipoa, a Ih peidek oang ara, “Kamwa kamehlele pwa Ngoah kak kemwehuwihla kamwa? “Eh, Koaun,” ira japoang.
9.29: Doar Ih jair mijara pwa, “Me en wiawi jang in amwa pwojon;”
9.30: ira pwuroahng kapangda wija. Jesus pwehng ira, “Kapang pwa johpwa emen en kidal mehkije.”
9.31: A ira inla likin kalohkihjili wijahu ohroj. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Woal Loahsoang men
9.32: Nehn ara allaluhla, woal loahsoang men ma ngen jaus dilingla ih wijikdohng Jesus.
9.33: Anjoauwo ma ngen jausso diljang ipoa, woal loahsoanngo lallalda. Pokonno inenin pwuriamwei pwa, “Kahjikkoar mehkij doahre wiawi nehn Israel.”
9.34: A Pharisee-ok pwa, “Koaun in ngen jaus kan ma kioang Jesus manman in kajroahjang ngen jaus.” Sohn Doadoahk Jipid
9.35: Jesus allaluhjili nehn kahnihmw apel koujapw ohroj, padpadahk nehn jinakoke kan, kalohkihjili Rongmwehu in Weiho, kemwehuwihla joangoan johmwehu ohroj ipen armaj kan.
9.36: Nehn Ah kapang pokonno, Ih ipwilkihda irai, pwa irai injinjuwed apel joh jauwajparai, doahroar jihpw ma ne joh jiloapoarai.
9.37: Doar Ih pwehng Nah sohnpadahkkok, “Roakke koalik a sohndoadoahk jipid.
9.38: Kamwai en kapkap poaki koaun in roakke pwa Ih en kadardohng sohndoadoahk nehn Ah roakke.”

10.1: Jesus panginpene Nah sohnpadahk eijek roahmenno, kioang irai manman en kajroahjang ngen jaus apel kemwehuwihla joangjoangoan johmwehu ohroj.
10.2: Me ioar oadoan wahnpoaroan eijek roahmenno: Keiou Simon (ma pel adanki Peter) a riah Andrew; James nihn Zebedee, apel riah John;
10.3: Philip apel Bartholomew; Thomas apel Matthew, jounrik daksis men; James nihn Alphaeus, apel Thaddaeus;
10.4: Simon mihn Zealot, apel Judas Iscariot, ma pangla Jesus. Jesus kadarla Woaroak Eijek Roahmen (Mark 6:7-13; Luke 9:1-6)
10.5: Woaroak eijek roahmenno Jesus kadarla kioang irai kaweid pwiai: “Johpwa inla nehn pwungen mihn likin kan ke inla nehn koaujoan in mihn Samaria kan.
10.6: A kamwai inlahng jihpw joaloanglahk ipen mihn Israel kan.
10.7: Kamwai inla padahki pwa: Wein nehnloannge ne koaroan.
10.8: Kemwehuwihla johmwehu kan, kamourda min mehdi kan, kamwkelehda irai kan ma anki johmwehu lepa, kauj jang ngen jaus kan. Doar amwai oaloa in joh dupkoa, kamwai pel kihwei in joh dupkoa.
10.9: Johpwa wa kohl, silper, ke kapa nehn amwai pwuko kan;
10.10: johpwa wijik pehk nehn oamw jeiloak, ke joakid riau, ke ju ke jokon; pwa sohndoadoahk men warroang oaloa dahkij arai anahne.
10.11: “Nehn amwai dilda nehn oau koaujoan ke koujapw, rapahkihda armaj men ma nimen kamwai en mine nehn umwahn oaroh kamwai pwur.
10.12: Nehn amwai en dilda nehn umw oau, amwai rahnmwahu en doahroar me; popohl oang sohn ummwoauwe.
10.13: Ma sohn ummwo kajamwo kamwai, amwai popohl en minmine iparai, a ma joah, amwai popohl en japahldohng kamwai.
10.14: Ma mine umw oau ke koaujoan oau joah nimen kajamwo kamwai, ke rong amwai padahk, diljang wijahu jiped jang pwirejpar in pwoalkoamwai.
10.15: Ngoah pwehng kamwai pwa in mehlel, Rehn in Kadeikko Koahs pirin kajalehda Ah kalahngan oang sohn Sodom apel Gomorrah koalik jang koaujoan pwiai. Koaloklok kan ma pirin Leldo (Mark 13:9-13; Luke 21:12-17)
10.16: “Kamwai Rongmwehu Ngoah kadarwe kamwai doahroar jihppwi nehn pwungen wolf. Kamai uhdahn pirin kanaihoang kamwai doahroar sinek kan apel maid doahroar mwurei kan.
10.17: Kamwai mwajahn pwa armaj kan pirin joalihdi kamwai apel pangla kamwai mwohn Mwoalen Koapwung kan, apel woswos sihkei kamwai nehn jinakoke kan.
10.18: Pwa Ngoahi, kamwai nen wijikla mwohn koaun apel nahmwarki kan, pwa kamwai en kadehdehng irai apel mihn likin kan doahr Rongmwehu.
10.19: Nehn irai pirin panglahng kamwai koapwung, kamwai joah pwunodki da kamwai pirin pwa, ke ia mwomwen amwai pirin pwa; nehn anjoauwo pirin lel, nen mweimweioang kamwai da kamwai pirin pwa.
10.20: Pwa lal kan ma kamwai pirin pwa jaudi amwai a Ngenin Jamamwaiho pirin kalallali kamwai.
10.21: “Woal kan pirin kihla riarai kan pwa irai en kojkojdi, jahm kan pirin pel wiahng joanngohr ipen nihrai jerihkan; Jerihkan pirin uhwoang arai nohno apel pahpa kan, apel kihlahng irai pwa irai en kojkojdi.
10.22: Armaj ohroj pirin lioassoang kamwai ki Oadoaihoa. A emen ma kolkol oaroh lel imwin pirin mourla.
10.23: A ma kamwai koaloklok nehn oau koaujoan, kaulahng nehn oau koaujoan. Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, kamwai nen johpwa koarjoahla koaujoan in Israel kan mwohn Nihn-Armaj pirin pwurdo.
10.24: “Joh sohnpadahk men laplap jang ah jounpadahkko: joh lidu men laplap jang ah koaun.
10.25: Sohnpadahk men en pel isarki en doahroarla ah jounpadahkko, apel liduhmen en pel doahrla ah koaunno. Ma moangoan peneinei oau poangpoangki Beelzebul, ia woahr nauna in ad ma emen sohn peneineiho en poangpoangki! Inje Koah en Mijik (Luke 12:2-7)
10.26: “Kamwai en joah mijik armaj. Me ohroj ma kin oakkoakla, uhdahn pirin janjalda, ke me rir ohroj pirin janjalda.
10.27: Da ma Ngoah pwehng kamwai in rir, kamwai en kajalehda nehn pokon janjal; a me ma Ngoah ngudngudkihoang kamwai, kamwai en pakairkihda pohn umw kan.
10.28: Johpwa mijik irai kan ma kak kojukdi palwar a johkak kojukdi pali ngen. A mijik Ih ma kak koauwehla ara, ngen apel palwar nehn ehl.
10.29: Send oau kamwai kak dupukda mahnsang siksik roahmen, a emen joh kak kipdi pohn pwirej likin koajoandi en Jamamwaiho.
10.30: A pel oang kamwai ohroj, pisen moangoamwai kan ohroj ne pel wadwaddi.
10.31: A doar joah mijik; kamwai kajampwaljang mahnsang dihrdir! Kadehdehda Christ mwohn Armaj (Luke 12:8-9)
10.32: “Emen ma pohneje Ngoahi mwohn armaj, Ngoahi pel pirin pohneje ih mwohn Joamoaiho nehnloannge.
10.33: A emen ma kahmahmki Ngoahi mwohn armaj, Ngoahi pel pirin kahmahmki ih mwohn Joamoaiho nehnloannge. Jaudi Moaloailoai Ngoahi Indoahki a Kodlaij (Luke 12:51-53; 14:26,27)
10.34: “Johpwa lemleme pwa Ngoah indoahng wahdo moaloailoai pohn jampah. Ngoah joah indoahng wahdo moaloailoai, a kodlaij.
10.35: Pwa Ngoah indoahng ukudla jermwein men en uhwoang jamah, jerpein men en uhwoang ah nohno, lihmen uhwoang inen pahioa.
10.36: En emen ah imwinsihsi pirin wia sowoa mehlel in nehn umwahu.
10.37: “Emen ma ipwilki jamah ke inah koalik jang ah ipwilki Ngoahi johpwa warroang Ngoahi; emen ma ipwilki nah jermwein ke jerpein koalik ah ipwilki Ngoahi johpwa warroang Ngoahi;
10.38: emen ma johpwa wahda ah lohpwu pwili ngoahi johpwa warroang Ngoahi.
10.39: Emen ma nimen kolkol ah mour nen luhj jang, a emen ma luhj jang ah mour ki Ngoahi nen kolkol ah mour. Dupkoan wihwia Mwehu (Mark 9:41)
10.40: “Emen ma kajamwo kamwai kin kajamwo Ngoahi, a emen ma kajamwo Ngoahi kin kajamwo ih ma kadardo Ngoahi.
10.41: Emen ma kajamwo joukohp en Koahs men pwa ih joukohp en Koahs men pirin oaloa kijakij in joukohp men, a emen ma kajamwo armaj pwung men pwa ih armaj pwung men pirin oaloa kijakij in armaj pwung men.
10.42: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, ma emen kioang mwoak in pil mwolou oau oang pwilihoai siksik pwiai, ih nen uhdahn oaloa kijakij.”

11.1: Anjoauwo ma Jesus ne doari Ah kioang kaweiddok oang Nah sohnpadahk eijek roahmenno, Ih inla jang o pwa Ih en padahk apel kapahrak nehn arai koaujoan kan.
11.2: John jounpoapdaij, mine nehn kalpwuhj, rongda pwa da Christ wihwia, kadarla nah sohnpadahkkok ipen Jesus, kalelpoak.
11.3: “Koah oar ma John jounpoapdaij ma pirin indoa, ke kamain pel kajkajik emen sohrohr?”
11.4: Jesus japoang, “Pwurla pwehng John da ma kamwai rong apel kapang:
11.5: Majkun kan kapangda wija, mwoasor kan alu, irai kan ma anki lepa mwehula, pongpong kan rongda wija, mehdi kan mourda, Rongmwehu ne pel kalohk oang armaj joamwoahmwoa kan.
11.6: Meid pai emen ma johpwa pwurjang Ngoahi.”
11.7: Anjoauwo ma nihn John sohnpadahkkok pwurpwurla, Jesus sapda siksikoahng pokonno doahr John: “Da kamwai inlahki nehn japwsoahn ipen John pwa kamwai en kapang? Alek pas ma kin jahjahjahkki enngo?
11.8: Ma jaudi, da kamwai inlahng kapang? Woal men kapwasda inenin mwehu? Irai ma kin kapwasda mwehu kin mine nehn soahnpaj in nahmwarki kan.
11.9: Doari da kamwai inlahng kapang? Joukohp men? Eh, Ngoah pwehng kamwai, pel koalikjang joukohp men.
11.10: John ioar ma puk joaroawi pwa: ‘Koahs pwa, Ngoah pirin kadarwe Noai jounpakairro mwohn koawoa, ma pirin koaunopda allo mwohn koawoa.’
11.11: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel: Johpwa armaj men ma mour nehn jampah laplap jang John jounpoapdaij; a ih ma keiou siksik nehn Wein nehnloannge laplapjang John.
11.12: Jang nehn rehn kan ma John kapkapahrak leldo apkas, Wein nehnloannge inenin apwalkihda mwoakidpwi, apel iraihok ma wia mwoakid pwiai jong en koldi.
11.13: Mwohn John jounpoapdaij, Joukohp kan ohroj apel kojonned en Moses sikoa doahr Wein Nehnloannge.
11.14: A ma kamwai nimen kamehlele, John ioar Elijah ma kokohppok sikoa ma pirin indoa.
11.15: Armaj men ma mine sioa mihn rongrong, a ih en rong!
11.16: “Da Ngoah kak karjahkihoang armaj en rehn pwiai? Irai doahroar jerihkan mwindi nehn market kan poangpoanglahng epwi:
11.17: ‘Kamai koajkoajoang in malau oang kamwai, a kamwai johpwa nimen kahlek; kamai koaulki koaul en mehdi, a kamwai johpwa nimen joang!’
11.18: John indoa, ih kaijihjol apel johpwa nim wain, a armaj ohroj pwa, ‘Ih dirkihla ngen jaus.’
11.19: Anjoauwo ma Nihn-Armaj indoa, Ih mwinge apel nimnim, armaj ohroj pwa, ‘Kapang woal menen! Ih mijen mwinge apel sohn nim jakau men, Ih pirienki jounrik daksis apel armaj jekenken kan!’ En Koahs loalkoang kadehdehda ah wihwia pwung kan.” Apwal oang Kamwai, Kahnihmw riau ma joah Wikla (Luke 10:13-15)
11.20: Doar Jesus sapda kajalehda Ah japwungki koaujoannok ma Ih wiahda loapdirin Ah manmannok, pwa sowoahk johpwa koaluhla apel wiliakapwla.
11.21: Ih pwehng irai, “Inenin nauna oang koawoa, Chorazin! Pel nauna oang koawoa, Bethsaida! Pwa manmannok ma ne wiawihoang kamwa, wiawihoang Tyre apel Sidon, irai ne likkoaukihda likkoaun injinjuwed pel kamwroahdihoang moalkoahr pohrai, pwa en kajalehda irai ne koaluhla apel wiliakapwla.
11.22: A Ngoah pwehng kamwa, Ngoah nimen kamwahn kidal, pwa nehn rehnin kadeikko Koahs pirin kajalehda Ah kalahngan oang sohn Tyre pel Sidon koalik jang kamwa.
11.23: A koah, Capernaum, koah ma nimen leldahla nehnloannge, koah nen jinoakekdihla nehn ehl! Pwa manmannok ma ne wiawihoang koawoa, wiawihoang sohn Sodom, irai nen minehr lel rehnnoauwe.
11.24: Ah koah en kidal pwa rehnin kadeikko, Koahs nen kajalehda Ah kalahngan oang Sodom koalik jang oang koah!” Koammoal oang armaj pwunod (Luke 10:21,22)
11.25: Anjoauwo Jesus pwa, “Ngoah kapnga koawoa, joamoai, Koaun in nehnloannge apel jampah! Ngoah kapnga ki koawoa, oamw kajalehng irai joaloalkoanngok mehkan ma koah oakihjang iraihok ma koahiok apel loalkoang in jampah.
11.26: Joamoai, me ne wiawi pwa ioar mehwa koah pwungki.
11.27: “Joamoai ne kioang Ngoahi me ohroj. Johpwa emen kidal Nahu likin Jamahu, pel johpwa emen kidal Jamahu likin Nahu apel irai kan ma Ih pilda en kajalehioang.
11.28: “Kamwai indoa ipoai, kamwai ohroj ma koakoahkla apel soausoaukihla amwai wijik kan; Ngoah en kakoammoalihla kamwai.
11.29: Kamwai oaloa aproahda Oai mihn wijikke, apel sukuhl jang Ngoahi, pwa Ngoahi ma aksiksik apel nehn kapehd karkarahk, kamwai nen diar koammoal nehn ngenimwaikan.
11.30: Pwa Oai mihn wijikke ma Ngoah pirin kioang kamwai, moangoai apel marahra.”

12.1: Mwerin anjoaukij Jesus aluhla nehn mwoaswel oau Sabbath. Nah sohnpadahkkok mwakohkohda irai dolihdi wehn wihdpwi irai kang.
12.2: Anjoauwo Pharisee-ok kapang irai, irai pwehng Jesus, “Kapang! Nihmw sohnpadahkkok wia me ma uhwoang kojonned in Sabbath.”
12.3: Ih japoang, “Kamwai johkin wadek da David wia anjoauwo ma ih apel pwilihoahk mwakohkohla?
12.4: Ih dilda nehn Umwen Koahs, pwilihoahk kangla pilahwa joarwiho — ma uhwoang kojonned irai en wia, pwa jamwrouwok oar kin kang.
12.5: Ke kamwai kahjik wadek nehn kojonned en Moses-ok ma pwa Sabbath ohroj jamwrouwok nehn Umw Joaroawi koauwehla kojonned in rehn joaroawi a irai johpwa dipanki?
12.6: Ngoah pwehng kamwai pwa mine armaj men ma laplap jang Umw Joarwiho.
12.7: Puk Joaroawi pwa, ‘Kadek mwehujang meiroang in mahn.’ Ma kamwai woahwoahki lal kamwai nen johpwa koauwe armaj joh dipoa.
12.8: Pwa Nihn-Armaj ioar Koaun in Sabbath.” Woal men ma mwoasor oaloap poah (Mark 3:1-6; Luke 6:6-11)
12.9: Jesus injang o, inla nehn jinakokehu,
12.10: woal men ma mwoasor oaloap poah mine o. Armajpwi pel mine o ma jongjong en kadpoahki Jesus Ah japwung. Irai idoak oang Ih, “Johpwa uhwoang asai kojonned Koah en kemwehuwihla armaj johmwehu Sabbath?”
12.11: Ih pwehng irai, “Ma emen in kamwai nainki jihpw men a ih kipdihoang nehn lipw oau Sabbath, kamwai joah nen pwoakda ih jang nehn lippwo?
12.12: Ia woahr kajampwalin armaj men jang jihpw men! Doari mwehu en wia me mwehu Sabbath.”
12.13: Doar Ih pwehng woal mwoasor poahu, “Kailwe poahmmwen.” Doar ih kailla poah doari ken mwehula douluhl, doahrla loap mwehuwo.
12.14: A Pharisee-ok ken injang o pilahnehda irai en kojukdi Jesus. Nihn Koahs Lidu Pilpildahu
12.15: A Jesus kidal pwa da irai pilpilahne, Ih injang wijahu, armaj dir kaujla Ih. Ih kemwehuwihla johmwehu ohroj iparai,
12.16: a Ih pwehng irai en johpwa pwa inje Ih.
12.17: Me kapwaihahda dahkij Isaiah kokohpki doahr Ih:
12.18: “Noai liduhwa, ma Ngoah ne pilda. Ih ioar Ngoahi ipwilki, apel perenki, ngoah pirin kihdahng Ngenihoa puwoa, Ih pirin kalohkihda kadeik oang wei kan.
12.19: Ih jehpirin akmai ke rahrahu; Ih jehpirin kapahrak nehn al kan.
12.20: Ih jehpirin sipwangdi alek piroakla kan, ke kakunihla lahm oau. Ih pirin sihkeiki pwa pwung paiai en pwoaida.
12.21: Sohn wei ohroj pirin koapwoarpwoarkihla oadoa.” Jesus apel Beelzebul (Mark 3:20-30; Luke 11:14-23)
12.22: Doari woal men ma ngen jaus dilingla ih, ma pel majkun pel jehjoa lallal, wijikdohng Jesus. Ih kemwehuwihla woallo doar ih ken kak lallal pel kapangda wija.
12.23: Pokonno pwuriamweikihla, “Audi Ih ma nihn David wa me?”
12.24: A anjoauwo ma Pharisee-ok rongda me, irai pwa, “Kamwai johpwa pwuriamweiki Ah kak kauj jang ngen jaus. Ih kihjang ah manman ipen Beelzebul, koaun in ngen jaus.”
12.25: Jesus ne kidal da arai lemleme, ioar Ih pwehngkihoang irai, “Wei oau ma uhpene apel peipene nehn pwungarai jehpirin mour woaroai. Kahnihmw oau ke peneinei oau ma sowoa kan pel uhpene nehn pwungarai nen uhdahn mwoarpijoang.
12.26: A doar ma oau pwihn mahwin oang oau pwihn nehn wein Jehsen, woahwoahki pwa wein Jehsen ne pwalpijoang, doar nen pispis mwoarpijoang.
12.27: Kamwai pwa Ngoahi kin kauj jang ngen jaus kan pwa Beelzebul ma kioang Oai manman. A inje ma kioang nihmwai sohnpadahk kan manman in kauj jang ngen jaus kan? Pein nihmwai sohnpadahk kan nen kadehdehng kamwai doahr amwai japwung!
12.28: Joah, jaudi, a Ngenin Koahs ma kioang Ngoahi manman in kaujjang ngen jaus kan, a ioar me ma kadehdehda pwa Wein Koahs ne lel kamwai.
12.29: “Joh emen kak koauwehla umwen woal sihkei men pwa en pirapoa ah koapwoa kan ma ih johpwa koldi piroahpene woal sihkeiho. Ioar wioapoawahr doari ih kak pirapoa ah koapwoa kan.
12.30: “Emen ma johkin pwili Ngoahi, kin uhwoang Ngoahi, a emen ma johkin jeuweje Ngoahi rikpene, kin kamwroahpijoang.
12.31: Me ioar kahrpoahwa Ngoah pwehng kamwai, dihp ke lahlahwe ohroj kak mahkla — a lahlahwe Ngen Joaroawi ioar johkak mahkla.
12.32: Emen ma lahlahwe Nihn-Armaj, kak mahkla, a lahlahwe Ngen Joaroawi pwanah johkak mahkla — apkas ke pel allaluhla. Suhkoa pas apel Wah kan (Luke 6:43-45)
12.33: “Ma kamwai poadokdi suhkoa mwehu pas, a wah pirin mwehu. Ma kamwai poadokdi suhkoa nauna pas, wah pirin nauna. Pwa kamwai pirin kidal suhkoa kan ki wahrai kan.
12.34: Kamwai doahroar sinek! Imdoahr armaj nauna doahr kamwai kak pwa mehkij mwehu? Pwa dahkij ma kamwai pwa ioar kin kajalehda audoapoan nehn kapehdimwaikan.
12.35: Armaj mwehu men kin pwahla lal mwehu jang nehn ah mohngiong mwehu, a armaj nauna men kin pwahla lal nauna jang nehn ah mohngiong nauna.
12.36: “Doari, kamwai en kidal pwa nehn Rehnin Kadeikko armaj ohroj uhdahn pirin pwukoahki arai lallal mwahl ohroj.
12.37: Pein amwai sikesik kan ma pirin kadeikda kamwai ma kamwai mwakelkel ke dipan.” Kilel in Jonah (Mark 8:11,12; Luke 11:29-32)
12.38: Jounpadahk in Kojonned apel Pharisee pwi indoa ipen Jesus pwehng Ih, “Jounpadahk, kamai nimen Koawoa en kajalehng kamai oau manmanno.”
12.39: Jesus japoang, “Ia woahr nauna apel rosros in armaj in anjoaukije! Kamwai poaki manman oau jang Ipoai! A jehpirin aluhwoang kamwai, ioarroar kilel manman in joukohp Jonah.
12.40: Pel doahr en Jonah minmine nehn kapehdin mwumw koalikko rehn jiluh apel pwong jiluh, ioar doahr, Nihn-Armaj, pirin mine pehn jampah rehn jiluh apel pwong jiluh.
12.41: Nehn Rehnin Kadeikko mihn Nineveh pirin uhda kadipoa kamwai, pwa ahr koaluhla apel wiliakapwla nehn ahr rong en Jonah kapahrakkok. A apkas emen ma laplapjang Jonah mine me.
12.42: Nehn Rehnin Kadeikko Li nahmwarki in Sheba pirin uhwoang kamwai apel kadeikda kamwai, pwa ih jeiloakdo jang in imwin jampah pwa en rong doahroar en nahmwarki Solomon kaweid loalkoang. A apkas mine emen ma laplap jang Solomon mine me. Japahldohn Ngen Nauna (Luke 11:24-26)
12.43: “Nehn en ngen jaus men kin diljang nehn armaj men, ih kin allaluhjili nehn japwsoahn, rapahki wijahn koammoal a nehn ah johkin diar.
12.44: Doar ih ken pwehng pein ih, ‘Ngoah en pirin pwurlahng nehn umwoaiho.’ Doar ih pwurla diarda pwa umwahu ne soahnda, mwakelkel, apel joan.
12.45: Doar ngen jausso pel pwurla rapahkihda pel ngen jaus ijimen ma nauna jang ih, irai ohroj dilda koaujoanla wijahu. A doari armajjo a kapwa nauna jang mijkoalkoal. Ioar joangoan mour wa me nen wiawi oang armaj nauna in rehn pwiai.” Inen Jesus apel Riah kan (Mark 3:31-35; Luke 8:19-21)
12.46: Nehn en Jesus siksikesik oang pokonno, inahu apel riahk mine likin, nimen lal oang Ih.
12.47: [Armaj men pwehng Ih, “Inoammwo apel rioammwok minmine likinno, irai nimen lal oang Koawoa.”]
12.48: Jesus japoang, “Inje inoai? Inje rioai kan?”
12.49: Doar Ih doklahng nah sohnpadahkkok Ih pwa, “Irai pwiai ioar inoai apel rioaikoa.
12.50: Emen ma kin wia kupwuren Joamoaiho nehnloannge ioar rioai woal, rioai li apel inoai.”

13.1: Rehnnohr Jesus injang in ummwo Ih indihla in oaroahrin jeddo, wijahu ma Ih mwindi pwa en wia ah padahk.
13.2: Pokonin armaj koalikkoau pidekihpene Ih. Ih ken doaudahng nehn pohs oau, mwindi, a pokonno uhda pohn oaroahrin jeddo.
13.3: Ih doadoahkki karajraj pwa en pwehng irai me dihrdir. “Armaj men mine ma inlahng kamwroa ah liporrohk.
13.4: Doari, nehn ah kamwkamwroa ah liporrohk, epwi mwoardi oang nehn al siksik in nehn mwoaswello, mahnsang pwi sangdo kangjang.
13.5: Epwi liporro kipdi nehn wija sakaikai ma pwirejjo poadpoad. Liporrohk pispisin koapda pwa pwirejjo poadpoad.
13.6: A anjoauwo ma joauwo dakda, suhkoahk pispisinnoar mengla pwa koalohraiok johpwa lel nehn wija loal.
13.7: Epwi liporrohk kipdi nehn pwungen suhkoa soaksoak. A suhkoa soaksoakkok koapda kajasihkeihla irai.
13.8: A epwi liporrohk kipdi nehn pwirej mwehu uhwahda, epwi min epwiki, epwi weneijek, a epwi jilihjek.
13.9: “Armaj men ma mine sioa mihn rongrong, a ih en rong.” Kahrpoan Karajrajjok (Mark 4:10-12; Luke 8:9,10)
13.10: Nah sohnpadahkkok indoa ipen Jesus idoakkoang Ih, “Amwda koah ke kin doadoahkki karajraj nehn oamw kin lalloang armaj kan?”
13.11: A Jesus japoang irai, “Kamwai ne mweimweioang en woahwoahkihla me rir in Wein nehnloannge, a irai joah.
13.12: Pwa armaj men ma anki mehkij, ekij nen pel aluhwoang, pwa ih en anki koalikjang. A oang ih ma joh ah mehkij, dahkij ma mine ipoa nen pel kihekjang.
13.13: Ioar kahrehda Ngoah kin padahk oang irai in karajraj, pwa armaj kin kapang da Ngoah wia, a irai johkin soahk, irai rong da ngoah kin pwa, a irai johpwa nimen rong ke woahwoahki.
13.14: Me ioar kokohp in Isaiah, pwoaida iparai ma pwa: ‘Kamwai pirin rongrongrong, a johpwa woahwoahki; kamwai pirin kapkapang a joah dehdehki.
13.15: Pwa mohngiongin armaj pwiai ne koapsakaila, siarai kan pongpongla, a irai moairpene, pwa mijarai kan en joah kapang, a siarai kan johkak rong, a mohngiongirai johkak woahwoahki, a irai johkak okdekdohng Ngoahi pwa Ngoah en kemwehuwihla irai.’
13.16: “A kamwai, meid pai kamwai ma mijamwaikan kak kapang, apel siamwaikan kak rong.
13.17: Ngoah en kadehdehng kamwai pwa joukohp dir apel armaj pwung dir nimen kapang da ma kamwai kapkapang apel rong da ma kamwai rongrongrong, a irai johkak. Jesus Kawoahwoahda Karajraj in Jounkamwoaroawo (Mark 4:13-20; Luke 8:11-15)
13.18: “Kamwai rong apel padahkihdi woahwoahn karajraj in Jounkamwoaroawo.
13.19: Irai kan ma rong mahjan in Wein nehnloannge a johkin woahwoahki, irai doahroar liporrohk ma mwoardi pohn allo, Ngen nauna kan indoa jerkihjang dahkij ma ne poaddi nehn mohngiongirai.
13.20: Liporro ma kin mwoardi oang nehn wija sakai woahwoahki irai kan ma kin rong oaloahda apel perenkihda.
13.21: A johkin soangdi iparai, ma apwal oau ke kojkoj kin lel irai pwa Mahjanno, a irai kin pispis in lohdi.
13.22: Liporrohk ma mwoardi oang nehn pwungen suhkoa soaksoakkok doahroar iraihok ma rong apel oaloahda Mahjanno, a nen johpwa kos Mahjanno nen johla mine iparai pwa jang in pwunod in jampah apel ipwilki pai in jampah nehn arai mour, kahrehda arai joh kak kihda wahrai.
13.23: Liporrohk ma koapda nehn pwirej mwehuwo ioar kajalehda mohngiongin iraihok ma rong apel woahwoahkihla Mahjanno, doar uhwahda dir pehn epwi min epwiki, epwi weneijek, a epwi jilihjek.” Karajraj in Dipwdipw
13.24: Jesus pwehng irai apas karajraj: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar jounkamwoaroa men ma kamwroahdi ah liporrohk mwehu nehn ah mwoaswello.
13.25: Oau pwong armaj ohroj moair, ah imwinsihsi indoa kamwroahdi suhkoa dipwdippwi nehn pwungen suhkoahn wihd.
13.26: Anjoauwo ma suhkoahk sapda koap pwa en uhwa, dipwdippwok pel koapda.
13.27: Nihn woal nah liduhwok indoa pwehng ih, ‘Maing, jaudi liporro mwehupwi koah kamwroahdi nehn oamw mwoaswello? Ia injang dipwdipw pwiai?’
13.28: Jounmwoaswello pwehng irai, ‘Imwinsihsi men ioar wia men.’ Irai idoak, ‘Kamain inla wijdahjang dipwdippwok?’
13.29: Ih japoang, ‘Joah, kamwai nen pel koauwehla suhkoa mwehuwok.
13.30: Mweidoahng ohroj en koapda lel anjoau in doddol. A ngoah kapwa pwehng joundoddol kan irai en kasohrohr jang dipwdipw kan irai pwidengihla a min mwehu kan irai en kioang nehn oai johkohu.’ ” Karajraj in Liporrohn Mustard (Mark 4:30-32; Luke 13:18,19)
13.31: Jesus pwehng irai apas karajraj: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar liporrohn mustard oau poaddi nehn ah mwoaswello.
13.32: Me ioar liporrohwa ma keiou siksik jang liporro ohroj, a koapda wiahla suhkoahwa keiou koalik nehn mwoaswello, nehn ah ne wiahla suhkoa koalik pas, mahn kan kin sangdo, koammoaldi pohn rah kan.” Karajraj in Yeast (Luke 13:20,21)
13.33: Jesus pwehng irai apas karajraj: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar me: lihmen oaloa yeast kij doaloahkihda pilahwa koalik kij. Pilahwa ohroj ken pwoaipijoang.” Doahr en Jesus Doadoahkki Karajraj (Mark 4:33,34)
13.34: Anjoau ohroj Jesus kin doadoahkki karajraj doahr me oang pokonnok; Ih johkin sikesik oang irai joah doadoahkki karajraj.
13.35: Me kapwaihahda kokohppo jang joukohppo ma pwa: “Ngoah pirin doadoahkki karajraj nehn oai pirin sikesik oang irai. Ngoah pirin kajalehng irai joang kan ma johpwa janjal jang anjoauwo jampah wiawihda.” Jesus Kawoahwoahda Karajraj in Dipwdipw
13.36: Anjoauwo Jesus injang pokonno, inla dilda nehn ummwoau. Nah sohnpadahkkok sohdo ipoa pwehng Ih, “Maing, kawoahwoahng kamai karajrajin dipwdippwok nehn mwoaswello.”
13.37: Ih japoang irai, “Woallo ma poadokdi liporro mwehuwo ioar Nihn-Armaj.
13.38: Mwoaswello ioar jampah; a liporro mwehuwok ioar armaj ma sohn Weiho; dipwdippwok ioar armaj koa ma nihn Jehsen;
13.39: a imwinsihsiho ma poadokdi dipwdippwok ioar Jehsen. Anjoau in doddol wehn suhkoahu ioar imwin jampah, a joundoddollok ioar sohnloanngok.
13.40: Doahroar dipwdippwok kasohrohrla apel jirepla, ioar doahr da pirin wiawi imwin jampah.
13.41: Nihn-Armaj, pirin kadarla nah sohnloanngok, pwa en kihpene irai ohroj jang nehn Ah Weiho ma kin kahrehng armaj nehn dihp apel ohroj ma kin wia me nauna kan,
13.42: irai pirin kerpwihla irai nehn oai pwidenngo, wijahu ma irai pirin joangjoangjoang apel keikeikeisakai.
13.43: A irai kan ma pwung pirin lingla doahroar joauwo nehn Wein Jamaraiho. Armaj men ma mine sioa, en rong! Karajrajin Pai Kajampwallo ma Oakkoakla
13.44: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar me. Woal men kidalda pai kajampwaloau ma oakkoakla nehn japwoau. Nehn ah kidalda, ih pel pwuroahng jaripdi nehn pwirejjo ih ken perenda inla noaskihla ah koapwoa ohroj, ih japahlla dupukda jappwo. Karajrajin Sakain nehn Pwaihoau
13.45: “Pel oau, Wein nehnloannge doahroar me. Woal men roaproapoan sakain nehn pwai ling.
13.46: Nehn ah kidalda oau ma inenin ling, ih noaskihla me ohroj ih anki ih dupukkihda sakaiho. Karajrajin Nehkko
13.47: “Pel oau, Wein nehnloannge doahroar me. Nehk in loakjiddoau ma jojohdi nehn jeddo pwa en koldi joangoan mwumw ohroj.
13.48: Anjoauwo ma nehkko ne dir, irai warahkihdahla poahrinjeddo, mwindi, nehkpijoang mwummwok. Mwumw mwehuwok, irai kioang nehn arai pwukohk, a min naunahk kerpwihekla.
13.49: Me ioar pirin doahroar imwin jampah. Sohnloanngok pirin indoa kasohrohrihpijoang armaj naunahk jang ipen armaj mwehuwok,
13.50: kerpwihla armaj naunahk nehn oai pwidenngo, wijahu ma irai pirin joangjoangjoang apel keikeikeisakai.
13.52: Ih pel pwehng irai, “Jounpadahk in kojonneddo ohroj ma ne wiahla sohnpadahk in Wein nehnloannge, doahroar armaj men ma kihjang nehn ah johkohu me kapw apel me dehn.” Jesus Johla Kenken Nehn Nazareth (Mark 6:1-6; Luke 4:16-30)
13.53: Anjoauwo ma Jesus ne doari Ah siksikoahng irai karajrajpwiai, Ih injang wijahu.
13.54: Ih japahllahng uhdahn Ah wijahu. Nehn Ah padpadahk nehn jinakoke, ohroj ma rong Ih inenin pwuriamweikihla. Irai idoak, “Ia Ih kihjang Ah loalkoang apel manman?
13.55: Jaudi Ih ioar nihn daiksanngo jermweinwa me? Jaudi Mary ioar Ah nohnohwa, jaudi riah woalkoa James, Joseph, Simon, apel Judas?
13.56: Jaudi riah lihkan ohroj ma kin pel koaujoan ipasai? Ia Ih kihjang mehpwiak?”
13.57: Doari, irai ken johla nimen kamehlele Ih. Jesus pwehng irai, “Joukohp men kin woaun wija ohroj, a jaudi nehn pein ah wija apel nehn ah peneinei.”
13.58: Doari Ih wia manman jipidpwihoar wijahu pwa jang in irai joah pwojon.

14.1: Anjoauwo ma Herod Antipas koaun in Galilee rongda doahr Jesus,
14.2: ih pwehng nah papahk, “Me uhdahn John jounpoapdaij ne pwuroahng mourda. Ioar kahrehda ih kak wia joangoan manman pwiai.”
14.3: Pwa Herod ne koldi John jounpoapdaij, piroahpene, kioang ih nehn kalpwuhj, ih wia me oang Herodias, pahien riahu Philip.
14.4: Pwa John kin pwehng Herod, “Johpwa pwung koah painkihla Herodias!”
14.5: Herod uhdahn nimen kojukdi John, a ih mijik mihn Jew pwa irai kin wiahki John joukohp men.
14.6: Rehnin en Herod noaisikdiho nihn Herodias jerpeinno uhda, kahkahlek mwohn pokonno. Herod inenin malaukihda,
14.7: ih inoaukihdi apel kahukihoang jerpeinno, “Ngoah pirin kioang koawoa me ohroj ma koah poaki.”
14.8: Jang in kaweid in ah nohnohu, jerpeinno poaki Herod, “Kihdoahng ngoahi wijahkije apel apkas moangoan John jounpoapdaij nehn oau pileis en!”
14.9: Nahmwarkiho injinjuwedkihla, a jang in kahula apel inoau ma ih wiahda mwohn sohn kamdippwo ohroj, ih pwa en jerpeinno poakpoakko en pwoaida.
14.10: Moangoan John ken poalpoaljang nehn kalpwuhjjo.
14.11: Moangoan John wijikdo nehn pileis oau, liklikkoang jerpeinno; ih uhda wahlahng ah nohnohu.
14.12: Nihn John sohnpadahkkok indoa oaloa palwoaroa wahla jaripdi; Irai ken inla pwehng Jesus. Jesus Kamwinge Woal Limekid (Mark 6:30-44; Luke 9:10-17; John 6:1-14)
14.13: Nehn en Jesus rongda rongin John, Ih inla jang wijahu, Ih doauda pohn pohs oau, jeilahng kalahpwukla wijahkij. Armajjok rongda me, irai injang nehn ahr koaujoannok wud nehn japw kaujla Ih.
14.14: Nehn en Jesus doaudihjang pohn pohsso, Ih kapangda pokon koalik oau, nehn kapehdin ipwilkihda irai, Ih kemwehuwihla armaj johmwehuwok iparai.
14.15: Injoausik pene Nah sohnpadahkkok indoa ipoa pwehng Ih, “Maing, ne rospene, a wijahkije japwsoahn oau. Kadarla pokonno pwa irai en kak inla nehn kahnihmw dupukda kanrai mwinge.”
14.16: A Jesus japoang irai, “Irai johpwa anahne inla. Kamwai kapwa kamwinge irai.”
14.17: Irai pwehng Ih, “Mehwahr mine ipamai, lopwonin pilahwa limoau apel mwumw roahmen.”
14.19: Ih pwehng pokonno en mwindi pohn mohk. Ih oaloa lopwonin pilahwa limoauwo apel mwumw roahmenno, jardahla nehnloannge, kapingkalahngan oang Koahs, sipwangpijoang pilahwa, kioang Nah sohnpadahkkok, sohnpadahkkok wud nehk oang pokonno.
14.20: Armaj ohroj mwinge oaroh moadla, sohnpadahkkok dowihda luhwen mwinge wiahda kiam eijek riau.
14.21: Dirin woal ma pwili mwinge, woal 5000 (limekid), li apel jeri johpwa pwili wadwaddoang. Jesus Alu Pohn Jed (Mark 6:45-52; John 6:15-21)
14.22: Jesus pwehng Nah sohnpadahkkok irai en doauda pohn pohs oau jeila oaloap jeddo, pwa Ih en kadarpijoang pokonno.
14.23: Mwerin Ah kadarpijoang armajjok, Ih indahla kalahpwukla pohn dol oau, pwa en kapkap. Ih minmine wijahu kalahpwuk oaroh rospene.
14.24: Ioar anjoauwo ma pohsso ne dohla mine nehn pwungen jeddo okdekkihjili nohk pwa enngo sihkei koaldohng pohsso.
14.25: Nehn pwungen kiloak jiluh apel wonou injohrehn, Jesus inla iparai, alu pohn jeddo.
14.26: Nehn en sohnpadahkkok kapang Ih alu pohn jeddo, irai inenin majpwehkda. “Eni men!” Irai pwa apel rahrahuki arai majpwehk.
14.27: Jesus pispisinnoar lallahng irai, “Kamwai sihkei!” Ih pwa, “Ngoah me, kamwai joah majpwehk.”
14.28: A Peter pwehnglahng ih, “Maing, amai Koaun, ma uhdahn koawoa men, pwehng ngoahi en alwe ipoamw, alu pohn jed.”
14.29: “Koa, indoa,” Jesus pwehng ih. Doar Peter kerdihjang pohn pohsso, alu pohn jeddo inla ipen Jesus.
14.30: A nehn ah poahmda sihkeilahn enngo, ih majpwehkda, sapda pwuhpwuhrdi. Ih pwa, “Maing, Doaroahla ngoahi!”
14.31: Anjoauwohr Jesus pukla, koldi ih, pwehng ih, “Amwda oamw pwojon ke siksik! Amwda koah ke joh kamehlele?”
14.32: Ara doaudahng pohn pohsso, a enngo uhdi.
14.33: Sohnpadahkkok pohn pohsso pwongi Jesus, pwehng Ih, “Mehlel oar pwa koawoa uhdahn Nihn Koahs!” Jesus Kemwehuwihla Armaj Johmwehuwok nehn Gennesaret (Mark 6:53-56)
14.34: Irai kosehla jeddo lellahng japw wijahkij oadoa Gennesaret.
14.35: Nehn en armaj in wijahu kidalda Jesus, irai ken iloaklahng armaj johmwehuwok in wijahu apel wija koaroannok ohroj en wijikdohng ipen Jesus.
14.36: Irai poaki Ih en mweidoahng armaj johmwehuwok en pukkoang ikin Ah likkoauwo; doar ohroj ma pukkoang kin sihkeida.

15.1: Pharisee pwi apel jounpadahk in Kojonnedpwi indoa jang Jerusalem indoa ipen Jesus, idoak oang Ih,
15.2: “Amwda nihmw sohnpadahkkok kin joah kapwaihahda asai siahk koadoaudoaudo jang jamasai mihn mehjjok? Irai joh kin amwunla poahrai mwohn arai mwinge!”
15.3: Jesus japoang, “A amwda kamwai ke japeik oang kojonned in Koahs nehn amwai kin pein daur amwai padahk kan?
15.4: Pwa Koahs pwa, ‘Woaunki joamoamw apel inoamw, a ma armaj men lahlahwe jamah ke inah, en kojkojdi.’
15.5: A kamwai kin padahki, ma armaj men ma anki mehkij ma ih kak jeuweje ki jamah ke inah, a ih pwa, ‘Me en Koahs,’
15.6: Irai johpwa anahne woaunki jamarai, ioar doar amwai kin mwamwahlki Mahjan in Koahs, pwa kamwai en daur pein amwai padahk kan.
15.7: Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Mehlel oar pwa uhdahn pwung oang kamwai dahkij joukohp Isaiah ne kohpda oang kamwai nehn ah pwa,
15.8: ‘Koahs pwa, armaj pwiai kin woaunki Ngoahi jang in arai lal a mohngiongirai inenin dohjang Ngoahi.
15.9: Johpwa kaspoan ahr kin joarwihoang Ngoahi, pwa irai kin padahkki kojonned in armaj, a irai karaunki pwa en Koahs Kojonned.’ ” Da ma kin kajaminihla armaj (Mark 7:14-23)
15.10: Doar Jesus ken pangindo pokonno Ipoa, pwehng irai, “Kamwai rong apel woahwoahki mwehu me:
15.11: Johpwa mehkij ma kin aluhwoang nehn oawoan armaj ma kin kajaminihla armaj, pwa me ma kin injang nehn oawoa.”
15.12: Doar sohnpadahkkok indoa Ipoa pwa, “Koah kidal pwa Pharisee-ok lioaski dahkij ma Koah pwahla?”
15.13: Jesus japoang, “Suhkoa ohroj ma Joamoaiho nehnloannge johpwa poadokdi nen wijwijdahjang,
15.14: joah injinohki irai! Jounkaweid majkunpwi arai. Doar ma armaj majkun men kahlwa emen armaj majkun ara nen kipdihoang nehn lippwo.”
15.15: Peter pwehnglahng Ih, “Kawoahwoahda woahwoahn karajraj pasen.”
15.16: Jesus japoang irai, “Kamwai kahjik oar loalkoangla, doahr iraihok ma joaloalkoang?
15.17: Kamwai johpwa woahwoahki? Mehkij ma koah kangla indihla nehn kapehdimwen kin pel injang nehn palwoaroamwen.
15.18: A me ma injang nehn oawoa, kin sapda jang nehn mohngiong, ioar kin kajaminihla armaj.
15.19: Lamlam nauna kin injang nehn mohngiong, ioar kin kahrehda, kojarmaj, kamwahl, nenek, pirap, likamw, karaun mwahl, pel lahlahwe.
15.20: Mehpwiai ioar kin kajaminihla armaj. A jaudi mwinge johpwa amwumwla!” En Lihmen Ah Pwojon (Mark 7:24-30)
15.21: Jesus injang wijahu inla wijahkij ipen kahnihmw in Tyre apel Sidon.
15.22: Lihn Canaan men, ma kin koaukoaujoan wijahu, indoa ipoa, ngil koalik poangpoanglahng Ih, “Maing, koah ma nihn David, kadek oang ngoahi! Noai jerpein men mine ma ngen jaus ne dilingla; ih kin minmine nehn apwal koalik.”
15.23: A Jesus johpwa pwahla lal oau oang ih. Nah sohnpadahkkok sohla Ipoa, engdehn poaki Ih, “Kadarla lihen! Ih kadroapwoa kisai ki ah poakpoak en.”
15.24: A Jesus japoang liho, “Ngoah, koadoaddoardohng ipen jihpw joaloangla in mihn Israel oar doari.”
15.25: A liho sohla ipoa dairukdihoang in pwoalkoa, “Maing, jeuweje ngoahi!”
15.26: Jesus japoang, “Johpwa pwung en kihjang kenen jerihkan mwinge peidlahng doahk kan.”
15.27: “Mehlel, Maing,” liho japoang, “a doahk kan kin pel kang mwoarmwoarin mwinge kan ma mwoardi pehn en laplappok sehpil.”
15.28: Doar Jesus ken japoang ih, “Koah lihmen ma anki pwojon inenin koalik! Dahkij ma koah poaki nen pwoaihoang koawoa.” Nehn anjoauwohr nah jerpeinno mwehuda. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Armaj Dihrdir
15.29: Jesus injang wijahu, alu paianla poahrinjedin Galilee. Ih doauda pohn dol oau mwindi.
15.30: Pokon koalik oau indoa Ipoa, wahdohng Ih armaj mwoasor, armaj majkun, armaj dangpel, armaj loahsoang, apel dir ma anki joangjoangoan kahpwal in palwar, irai wahdo kihdi ipen ehn Jesus. Ih kemwehuwihla ohroj.
15.31: Pokonno pwuriamweikihla ahr kapangda doahr armaj loahsoanngok kakla lallal, armaj dangpellok mwehula, armaj mwoasorrok ne kakla alu, apel iraihok ma majkun ne kapangda wija. Irai kapngahki Koahs in Israel. Jesus Kamwinge Armaj Pahkid (Mark 8:1-10)
15.32: Jesus panginpene nah sohnpadahkkok ipoa Ih pwehng irai, “Ngoah ipwilkihda armaj pwiai pwa irai minminehki Ipoai rehn jiluh, doar ne pel rojla kanrai mwinge. Ngoah johpwa nimen kadarpijoang irai nen irai johpwa mwinge, pwadoar irai mwehlehlla nehn allok.”
15.33: Sohnpadahkkok idoakkoang Ih, “A ia wija kamai kak kihjang mwinge nehn japwsoahn oauwe ma en isar oang pokon oauwe?”
15.34: Jesus idoak oang irai, “Lopwon in pilahwa doapoa mine ipamwai?” Irai japoang, “Lopwon ijuh, apel mwumw siksik jipidpwi.”
15.35: Jesus pwehng pokonno en mwindi pohn pwirej.
15.36: Doar ih oaloa lopwon ijuhwo pwilihki mwummwok, kapingkalahnganki oang Koahs, sipwangpijoang, kioang nah sohnpadahkkok, sohnpadahkkok wud nehk oang pokonno.
15.37: Irai ohroj mwinge oaroh moad. Sohnpadahkkok rikda luhwen mwingehk wiahda kiam ijuh.
15.38: Dirin irai ma pwili mwinge rehnno, woal 4000 (pahkid), li apel jeri jehpwili waddoang.
15.39: Doar Jesus kadar pijoang armajjok, Ih doauda pohn pohs oau, jeilahng ipen koaujoan in Magadan.

16.1: Pharisee-pwi apel Sadducee-pwi indoa ipen Jesus pwa irai en lidipihdi Ih, ioar kahrehda irai pwehng Ih en wiahng irai oau manman jang nehnloannge.
16.2: A Jesus japoang, “Nehn en joauwo kin duhla, kamwai kin pwa, ‘Lakapw nen mwehu pwa mijen loannge wahssa.’
16.3: A Inminjoang kamwai kin pwa, ‘Rehnnoauwe pirin wud, pwa mijen loannge wahssa apel soal.’ Kamwai kak kajawihda iren anjoau jang nehn amwai kin kapang mijen loannge, a kamwai joh kak kajawihda kilellok doahr anjoau pwiai!
16.4: Ia woahr nauna apel rosros in armaj in anjoaukije! Kamwai poaki manman oau jang Ipoai! A jehpirin aluhwoang kamwai, ioarroar kilel manman in Jonah.” Doar Jesus ken injang irai inla ekij wija. Yeast in Pharisee apel Sadducee-ok (Mark 8:14-21)
16.5: Nehn en sohnpadahkkok jeila lel oaloap jeddo, irai moalkoahla wahda pilahwa.
16.6: Jesus pwehng irai, “Kamwai mwajahn apel kalikdihjang yeast in Pharisee apel Sadducee-ok.”
16.7: Irai sapda siksikoahpene nehn pwungarai, “Ih pwa me, pwa kisai johpwa wijik pilahwa.”
16.8: Jesus kidal da irai pwahpwahpwa, ioar Ih idoakki iparai, “Dahkij kamwai siksikoahpene nehn pwungamwai pwa joh pilahwa ipamwai? Amwai pwojon inenin siksik!
16.9: Kamwai kahjikkoar woahwoahkihla? Kamwai johpwa lemleme lopwon in pilahwa limoauwo ma Ngoah kamwingehkihla armaj limekiddo? Kiam doapoa kamwai audohda?
16.10: A lopwon in pilahwa ijuhwo oang armaj pahkiddo? Kiam doapoa kamwai audohda?
16.11: Amwda kamwai ke johpwa woahwoahki pwa audi pilahwa ma Ngoah pwahpwahpwa? Kamwai kalkehjang kamwai yeast in Pharisee apel Sadducee-ok.”
16.12: Doari, sohnpadahkkok ken woahwoahkihda pwa audi yeast in nehn pilahwa ma irai en kalkehjang irai, a padahk in Pharisee apel Sadducee-ok. En Peter Kadehde doahr Jesus (Mark 8:27-30; Luke 9:18-21)
16.13: Jesus inlahng wijahkij ipen kahnihmw Caesarea Philippi, wijahu Ih idoak oang nah sohnpadahkkok, “Inje ma armaj kan kin pwahki doahr Nihn-Armaj?”
16.14: Irai japoang, “Epwi kin pwa John jounpoapdaij, a epwi pwa Elijah, apel epwi pwa Jeremiah ke emen in joukohppok.”
16.15: A Jesus pel idoak iparai, “Inje kamwai kin pwahki Ngoahi?”
16.16: Simon Peter japoang, “Koah ioar Messiah, Nihn Koahs mourro.”
16.17: Jesus japoang, “Meid pai koawoa, Simon nihn John, pwa jaudi armaj ma kajalehng koawoa mehlel oauwe. Pwa Joamoai ma minmine nehnloannge.
16.18: Doari, apkas Ngoah pwehng koawoa, pwa koah Peter, paip koalik oau, pohn paip koalikkoauwe Ngoah pirin kouda oai mwomwohdjo. Doar mehdi johpwa pirin kak kalwehdi.
16.19: Ngoah pirin kioang koawoa kihkan in Wein nehnloannge. Me ohroj ma koah kainoapwihdi nehn jampah pirin pel kainoapwdi nehnloannge, apel me ohroj ma koah mweidda nehn jampah pirin pel mweimweida nehnloannge.”
16.20: Doar Jesus pwehng nah sohnpadahkkok, irai en johpwa pwehng emen, pwa Ih ioar ma Messiah. Jesus sikoa Ah Pirin Koaloklok apel Mehdi (Mark 8:31—9:1; Luke 9:22-27)
16.21: Jang anjoauwo inla Jesus sapda sikoa in janjal oang nah sohnpadahkkok, “Ngoah uhdahn pirin inla Jerusalem, oaloa loklok koalik jang ipen koaunnok, jamwrou laplappok, apel jounpadahk in Kojonneddok. Ngoah pirin kojkojdi, a mwerin rehn jiluh, Ngoah pirin iejda.”
16.22: Peter kalahpwukihla Jesus sapda koapwung oang Ih, “Maing oai Koaun, Koahs kainoapwi joanngoauwe,” ih pwa. “Me uhdahn johpwa pirin wiawihoang koawoa!”
16.23: Jesus pwurlahng Peter pwehng ih, “Alwe jang Ngoahi, Jehsen! Koah lidip keper oau oang Ngoahi, pwa oamw lamlam jaudi jang ipen Koahs, a jang ipen armaj.”
16.24: Doari Jesus pwehng nah sohnpadahkkok, “Ma emen in kamwai nimen indoa pwili Ngoahi, en uhdahn moalkoahla pein ih, wahda ah lohpwu, pwilihla Ngoahi.
16.25: Pwa emen ma nimen doaroahla ah mour ih pirin luhj jang; a emen ma mihndahkihla ah mour ki Ngoahi, ih pirin mourla.
16.26: Pirin mine kaspoan oamw en wihnkihda jampah pwon, a luhj jang oamw mour? Joh douluhl, joh mehkij koah kak kihda pwa en japahl oang oamw mour.
16.27: Pwa Nihn-Armaj, pirin indoa nehn ling in Jamahu pwili nah sohnloanngok, pwa en kijkijoa emenemen armaj jang in ah wihwiahk.
16.28: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, pwa epwi kamwai ma mine me nen joah mehdi oaroh irai nen kapang Nihn-Armaj pirin indoa doahr Nahmwarki men.”

17.1: Mwerin rehn wonou Jesus ukda Peter apel riariho, James apel John, ukdahla pohn dol illoahioau pwa irai en kalahpwukla.
17.2: Nehn irai kapkapang, palwoaroan Jesus wikla, mijoa dakda doahr joauwo, apel Ah likkoauwo inenin korohrohla.
17.3: Sohnpadahk jilmenno pel kapangda Moses apel Elijah siksikesik oang Jesus.
17.4: Peter pwehng Jesus, “Oai Koaun, inenin mwehu asai minmine me! Ma Koah mwehuki, ngoah en kouda umpwal jiluh wijahkije, oau umwoamw, oau umwen Moses, apel oau umwen Elijah.
17.5: Nehn anjoauwo ih pwahpwahpwa me, koasoau maram oau pwaindi irai, a ngilloau indihdo jang nehn koasoauwo ma pwa, “Me ioar Noai jermwein kajampwalwa ma Ngoah kin ipwilki, kamwai rong Ih!”
17.6: Nehn en sohnpadahkkok rongda ngillo, irai inenin majpwehkda, ioar kahrehda arai rukdi lel pohn pwirej.
17.7: Jesus indoa pukkoang irai, Ih pwa, “Kamwai uhda, kamwai joah mijik!”
17.8: Nehn irai jarda, joh armaj irai kapang, Jesus kalahpwuk.
17.9: Nehn irai indihdohjang pohn dollo, Jesus inoapwihdi irai en, “Johpwa pwehng emen doahr mwoakiddoauwe ma kamwai kapang oaroh Nihn-Armaj en iejda jang mehdi.”
17.10: Sohnpadahkkok idoak oang Jesus, “Amwda jounpadahk in Kojonneddok pwa Elijah uhdahn pirin sapin indoa?”
17.11: Jesus japoang, “Mehlel, Elijah uhdahn pirin sapin indoa pwa en koaunopda me ohroj.
17.12: A Ngoah pwehng kamwai, Elijah ne indoa, a armaj kan johpwa kidal ih, doar irai wia mwahlki apel wiahng ih injenarai. Nehn doahr irai pirin wiahng Nihn-Armaj, ma pirin pel oaloa koaloklok jang iparai.”
17.13: Sohnpadahkkok woahwoahkihda pwa Ih pwehpwehpwehng irai doahr John jounpoapdaij. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Jermwein Men Ngen Nauna Mine Ipoa (Mark 9:14-29; Luke 9:37-43a)
17.14: Anjoauwo irai lellahng ipen pokonno, woalmen indoa ipen Jesus, poadpwomwla mwohn Ih,
17.15: ih pwa, “Maing, jeuweje noai jermweinno, pwa ih kin johmwehu roarroar koalik ma kin lelloang ih, kapkihdihoang nehn oai ke nehn pil pehn dir.
17.16: Ngoah wahdohng ih ipen nihmw sohnpadahkkok, a irai johkak kemwehuwihla ih.”
17.17: Jesus japoang, “Kamwai inenin joah pwojon apel japwung! Ia woaroai in oai pirin minmine ipamwai? Ia woaroai in oai pirin kanangmahioang kamwai? Wahdo jermweinnen Ipoai!”
17.18: Doar Jesus ruwoj ngen jausso en diljang nehn jermweinno, ngen jausso ken diljang. Anjoauwohr jermweinno mwehula.
17.19: Sohnpadahkkok kalahpwukla ipen Jesus idoak oang Ih, “Amwda kamai ke johkak kaujjang ngen jausso ipen jermweinno?”
17.20: Jesus japoang irai, “Pwa amwai pwojon johpwa isar. Ngoah lal mehlel oang kamwai, ma amwai pwojon inenin sihksik woahroar liporrohn mustard oau, kamwai kak pwehng dollo, ‘mwoakid jang men mwoakidla o!’ ih nen mwoakid. Kamwai nen kak wia me ohroj.
17.21: [A joangoan ngen jaus oauwe joh mehkij koawoa kak kaujkihjang ioarroar kapkap apel kaijihjol.]” Jesus Pwuroahng Sikoa doahr Ah Pirin Mehdi (Mark 9:30-32; Luke 9:43-45)
17.22: Sohnpadahkkok ohroj pokonpene Galilee, Jesus pwehng irai, “Nihn-Armaj pirin ken likliklahng ipen armaj kan;
17.23: ma pirin kojukdi Ih, a rehn jiluh mwerin Ih pirin iejda.” Sohnpadahkkok inenin injinjuwedla. Jesus Kihda Ah Daksis oang Umw Joarwiho
17.24: Nehn en Jesus apel nah sohnpadahkkok lel Capernaum, jounrik daksis in Umw Joarwiho indoa idoak oang Peter, “Imdoahr, amwai jounpadahk en kin pwili dupuk daksis in Umw Joaroawi?”
17.25: “Eh, ih kin pwili dupuk.” Peter japoang. Nehn en Peter inla nehn ummwo, Jesus ken pispis oar pwehnglahng, “Simon, Da oamw lamlam oang irairroauwe? Inje kin nohpwei ke dupuk daksis oang Nahmwarkihn jampahioauwe? Jang ipen nah armaj kan ke jang ipen mihn likin kan?”
17.26: “Jang ipen mihn likin kan,” Peter japoang. “Doari,” Jesus pwa, “Sowoa mehlel in weiho kin jehpwili dupuk daksis.
17.27: A, kisai joah nimen kalioasihda sohn rik daksis pwiai, Doar indihwe nehn jeddo, peiddihwe nihmw ohn. Keiouin mwumw ma koah oapihda, Kihpijoang oawoan mwummwo, koah nen kapangda mwani isar oang dupukla asa daksis.”

18.1: Nehn anjoauwo sohnpadahkkok indoa ipen Jesus idoak, “Inje ma keiou laplap nehn Wein nehnloannge?”
18.2: Doar Jesus pangindo jeri siksik men kihdi nehn pwung irai.
18.3: Ih pwa, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, pwa ma kamwai johpwa wikla doahroarla jeri, kamwai nen johkak dilda nehn Wein nehnloannge.
18.4: Pwa emen ma kin aksiksikla doahrla jeri siksik mene ih pirin keiou laplap nehn Wein nehnloannge.
18.5: Apel emen ma kin kajamwo jeri siksik men doahre in oadoaihoa ih kin kajamwo ngoahi. Kahrehioang Nehn Dihp (Mark 9:42-48; Luke 17:1-2)
18.6: “Ma emen ma kahrehioang en emen jeri siksik pwiai ma kamehlele Ngoah en johla ahr pwojon, mwehu oang en pirapirroang oau sakai koalikko in sipinwoaroa, pwa en sikmehula.
18.7: Ia woahr nauna in oang jampah mihn koauwehla pwiai ma pirin kahrehioang emen en kerpwihla ah pwojon! A joah, joang pwiai pirin pwen mine anjoau ohroj, a ia woahr nauna in oang armaj meno ma mehpwiai sapdahjang ipoa!
18.8: “Ma oaloap poahmmwen ke oaloap ehmmwen kahrehioang koawoa en wiahda dihp, poaloahjang, kerpwihla! Pwa nen mwehuwoang koawoa en dilloang nehn mour joahsukko, ki oaloappoar poahmmwen ke oaloappoar ehmmwen jang poah riau ke eh riau kerpwiheklahng nehn oaiho ma johkin kunla.
18.9: A ma oaloap pwoaroan mijoammwen kin kahrehioang koawoa en wiahda dihp, roahkjang, kerpwihwehjang koawoa! Mwehu ma koah loapin pwoaroan maj dilda nehn mour joahsuk jang pwoaroan maj riau a kerpwiheklahng nehn oai in nehn ehl. Karajraj in Jihpw ma Joaloangla (Luke 15:3-7)
18.10: “Kamwai kanaihoang pwa kamwai en johpwa mwamwahlki emen siksik pwiai. Kamwai en kidal pwa arai sohnloang kin mine ipen Joamoaiho nehnloannge anjoau ohroj.
18.11: [Pwa Nihn-Armaj indoahng koamoaurla irai kan ma ne joaloangla.]
18.12: “Da kamwai lemleme? Ma armaj men nainki jihpw epwiki, emen arai joaloangla, ih joh nen kihdi jihpw duweijek dohmenno arai en mwingmwingehjili pohn nahna, a ih inla rapahki jihpw joaloanglahu?
18.13: A ma ih kapangda, Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, pwa ih nen uhdahn perenki jihpw meno jang jihpw duweijek dohmenno ma johpwa joaloangla.
18.14: Ioar nehn doahr Jamamwaiho nehnloannge, ih johpwa mwehuki emen siksik pwiai en joaloangla. Rioamw Men Ma Wia Dihp
18.15: “Ma rioamw men wiahda dihp oang koawoa, inla ipoa, kajalehioang dipoahu. A me en wiawi in rir. Ma ih rong koawoa, a koah ne kajpahlihdo rioammwo.
18.16: A ma ih joah rong koawoa, a emen ke roahmen armaj en pwilihda koawoa, pwa “kadip ohroj pirin wiawihki kadehdehn armaj roahmen ke jilmen” — doahroar Puk Joarwiho pwa.
18.17: A ma ih pel johpwa nimen rong ira, a koah lelki mwomwohdjo. A ma ih pel johpwa nimen rong mwomwohdjo, a wiahkihla ih mihn likin men ke jounrik daksis men. Manman in Joalihdi apel Lapwadda
18.18: “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, pwa me ohroj ma kamwai joalihdi nehn jampah, a nen pel joaldi nehnloannge; a me ohroj ma kamwai lapwadda nehn jampah, a nen pel lapwda nehnloannge.
18.19: “Apel Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, ma roahmen ipamwai nehn jampah minminkihpene ara kapkap, poaki mehkij, nen uhdahn pirin pwoaidahng ara jang ipen Joamoaiho nehnloannge.
18.20: Pwa wijahkij ma roahmen ke jilmen pokon pene in oadoaihoa, Ngoah kin pwili irai mine wijahu.” Karajraj in Papah Joampoak
