18.21: Peter sohdo ipen Jesus pwehng Ih, “Maing oai Koaun, pehn doapoa ngoahi en mahkoahng rioaiho ma kin wia dihp oang ngoahi? Isar ma ngoah mahkoahng ih pehn ijuh?”
18.22: A Jesus japoang, Ih pwa, “Johpwa isar pehn ijuh, a pehn ijuh wad ijihjek.
18.23: Pwa Wein nehnloannge doahroar nahmwarki men ma lemehda en wia koapwung in pwaipwanid oang nah papahk.
18.24: Nehn ah sapda wia koapwunngo, a emen irai wijikdohng ipoa, ma pwaipwanidki pehk in kohl lopw.
18.25: Papahu johpwa nainki mwani isar in dupukla ah pwaipwaniddo, doar nahmwarkiho pwa ih en noasla, doahroar lidu men, pwilihkihoar pahioa, nah jerihok, apel ah koapwoa ohroj pwa en kak dupukla ah pwaipwaniddo.
18.26: Papahu ken poadpwomwla mwohn nahmwarkiho, ‘Maing, koah en menlau mahkoahng ngoahi, koah en kanangmahioang ngoahi, pwa ngoahi pirin dupukkoang koawoa me ohroj.’
18.27: Nahmwarkiho ken ipwilkihda ih apel mahkoahng ih ki ah pwaipwaniddo doar ken mweidoahng ih en inla.
18.28: “Mwerin a injang wijahu, ih suhwoang emen pwilihoa papah ma pwaipwanidki oang ih mwani silper jipidpwi, ih jipoardi, padikpene sipinwoaroa, pwehng ih, ‘Pispis dupukdo oamw pwaipwanid oang ngoahi!’
18.29: Papahu rukdi mwohn ih poakmahk, ‘Menlau kanangmahioang ngoahi, pwa ngoahi nen dupukkoang koawoa!’
18.30: A ih kia rong, doar ih peiddoang pwilihoahu nehn kalpwuhj oaroh pwilihoahu en dupukla ah pwaipwaniddo.
18.31: Nehn en pwilihoa papahk kapangda dahkij wiawi, irai injinjuwedkihla koalik, inla pwehng nahmwarkiho me ohroj ma wiawi.
18.32: Nahmwarkiho pangindo nah papahu pwehng: ‘Koah papah naunahmen! Ngoah mahkoahng koawoa oamw pwaipwanid ohroj oang ngoahi, pwa koah poakmahk ipoai;
18.33: A da koah ke johpwa mahkoahngki pwilihoammwo, doahroar oai ne mahkoahng koawoa.’
18.34: Doari nahmwarkiho inenin lioas, doari ih peiddoang papahu nehn kalpwuhj pwa ih en loklok oaroh ngehd ih en dupukla ah pwaipwanid ohroj.”
18.35: Doar Jesus pwa, “Ioar joangwa ma Joamoaiho nehnloannge pirin wiahng kamwai, ma emenemen kamwai johpwa mahkoahng riah jang nehn ah mohngiong.”

19.1: Nehn en Jesus kadoarihla Ah sikoa mehpwiai, Ih injang Galilee inla nehn wein Judea oaloap Pillap Jordan.
19.2: Pokon koalik oau kaujla Ih, Ih kemwehuwihla irai wijahu.
19.3: Pharisee pwi indoa Ipoa, jong in lidipi Ih ki ahr peidek, nehn irai idoak, “Imdoahr, asai Kojonneddo mweidoahng woal men en kak mweijang pahioa ki kahrpoa joah lipilpil?”
19.4: Jesus japoang irai, “Kamwai kahjikkoar wadek Puk Joaroawi ma pwa jang oh sapin kawa, ‘Jounkapikpikko, wiahda armaj, woal apel li.’
19.5: Koahs pel pwa, ‘Jang in kahrpoahioauwe woal men pirin mweijang jamah apel inah ih pasoahng pahioahu, ara roahmenne paspene wiahla oau.’
19.6: Ira ne johla wia roahmen a emennoar. Doari joh armaj men en kamweidpijoang da ma Koahs ne kapsahpene.”
19.7: Pharisee-ok idoak ipoa, “A amwda Moses ke kihda kojonneddo pwa woal men kak kihda kijilikoau in kamweid, ih ken kak mweijang pahioahu.”
19.8: Jesus japoang irai, “Moses mweidoahng kamwai en mweijang pahioamwai kan pwa amwai nohn koapsakai. A jang in sapdahu me johpwa kin wiawi.
19.9: A Ngoah pwehng kamwai, ma woalmen mweijang pahioahu in kahrpoa oau ma jaudi kamwahl, a ih painkihla emen li sohrohr ih wiahda dipen kamwahl.”
19.10: Nah Sohnpadahkkok pwehng Ih, “Ma ioar pirin doahr men nehn pwungen woal men apel pahioahu, doar mwehu en pwen joah pwoapwoaud.”
19.11: Jesus japoang irai, “Jaudi ohroj kak oang oaloahda padahkkoauwe, iraihok oar ma mweimweioang jang puwoa.
19.12: Pwa kahrpoahpwi mine ma kahrehda armaj johkak pwoapwoaudkihda. Epwi noaisikdi palwoaroarai johpwa unjek; a epwi jang in arai leklekla, a epwi jang in pein injenarai arai johpwa nimen pwoapwoaud pwa en mwehuwoang Wein nehnloannge. Ma emen kak oaloa padahkkoauwe, a en oaloa.” Jesus Kapaiahda Jeri Siksikpwi (Mark 10:13-16; Luke 18:15-17)
19.13: Jerihpwi wijikdohng ipen Jesus pwa en kihdahng poah pohrai apel kapkapki irai, a sohnpadahkkok lipwoarehda armajjok.
19.14: Jesus pwehng irai, “Mweidoahng jerihkan en indoa Ipoai. Kamwai joah iroahdi irai, pwa Wein nehnloannge ioar wein joangoan armaj pwiai.”
19.15: Ih kihdahng poahk pohrai, doar Ih ken inla jang wijahu. Mwahnkapw Koapwoahpwoa men (Mark 10:17-31; Luke 18:18-30)
19.16: Anjoau kij mwahnkapw men indoa ipen Jesus idoak, “Jounpadahk, joangoan wihwia mwehu da ma ngoahi uhdahn wia pwa ngoahi en oaloahki mour joahsuk?”
19.17: Jesus japoang, “Amwda koah ke idoak oang Ngoahi dahkij mwehu? Emen oar ma mwehu. Kapwaihahda kojonned kan ma koah nimen dilda nehn mour joahsuk.”
19.18: Woallo idoak, “Kojonned dahpwi?” Jesus japoang, “ ‘Joah kojukdi armaj; joah kamwahl; joah pirap; joah karaun likamw;
19.19: woaunki joamoamw apel inoamw; ipwilki mihn ipoamw doahroar oamw kin ipwilki pein koawoa.’ ”
19.20: Mwahnkappwo japoang, “Ngoah ne kapwaihahda kojonned pwiai ohroj. Da ngoahi en pel wia?”
19.21: Jesus pwehng ih, “Ma koah nimen unjekla, alwe noaskihla me ohroj koah anki, kioang dupkoa kan armaj joamwoahmwoa kan, oamw pai nehnloannge nen koalikla; indoa pwilihla Ngoahi.”
19.22: Nehn en mwahnkappwo rong lal pwiai, ih injinjuwedla, ken allaluhla. Pwa woal inenin koapwoahpwoa men ih.
19.23: Doar Jesus pwehng nah sohnpadahkkok, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel: inenin apwal oang armaj koapwoahpwoa en dilda nehn Wein nehnloannge.
19.24: Ngoah en pel pwuroahng pwa: Apwal oang armaj koapwoahpwoa men en dilda nehn wein Koahs jang kamel men en dilda nehn pwokin si pas.”
19.25: Nehn en sohnpadahkkok rong me, irai inenin pwuriamweikihla, idoak, “Doar inje kak mourla?”
19.26: Jesus jipwoallahng irai, japoang, “Me johkak ipen armaj, a ipen Koahs me ohroj kak.”
19.27: Doar Peter pwehng Ih, “Maing, kamai ne kihdi joang ohroj, pwa kamai en pwilihla koawoa. Dahkij kamai pirin anki?”
19.28: Jesus pwehng irai, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, pwa kamwai eijek roahmennen ma kin pwilpwili Ngoah, kamwai pirin pwili mwindi nehn mwoalen kadeikko apel pwili kadeikda kainek eijek riau in Israel, anjoauwo ma Nihn-Armaj pirin mwindi nehn Ah mwoal linngo nehn Ah Mwei Kappwo.
19.29: Apel irai ohroj ma injang umwarai kan, riarai woal, riarai li, jamarai, inarai, nihrai jerihkan, japwarai kan ki Ngoah, pirin oaloa pehn epwiki koalikjang apel pwilihki mour joahsuk.
19.30: A armaj dir ma kin mijoa apkas pirin mwerinla, a armaj dir ma kin mwerin apkas pirin mijoahla.

20.1: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar woal men ma inla inminjoang pwa ih en oaloa armaj in doadoahk nehn ah mwoaswelin wainno.
20.2: Ih pwungkihoang irai pwa ih en dupuk irai mwani silper oau rehn oau, ih kadarla irai en doadoahk nehn mwoaswelin wainno.
20.3: Ih pwuroahng inla nehn wijahn noasnoasso kiloak duwoau minjoanngo, ih pel kapangda epwi armaj onohn mwahl joh me irai wia.
20.4: Ih pel pwehng irai en inla doadoahk a ih en dupuk irai dahkij ma koanoahng.
20.5: Irai ken inla. A ih pel pwuroahng inla kiloak eijek riau apel kiloak jiluh, ih pel wia joanngohr ma ih wia inminjoanngo.
20.6: A injoausik, nimwennoar kiloak limoau ih pwuroahng inla wijahn noasnoasso, ih pel kapangda epwi armaj ma pel onnonohn mwahl. Ih idoak oang irai, ‘Amwda kamwai ke koauwehkihla amwai anjoau onnonohn mwahl, johpwa doadoahk rehn oauwe?’
20.7: Irai japoang, ‘Pwa joh armaj nimen doadoahkki kamai.’ Woallo pwehng irai, ‘Kamwai inla pwili doadoahk nehn mwoaswelin wainno.’
20.8: “Injoausikko woallo pwehng nah jounkohwahu, ‘Panginpene sohn doadoahk kan, koah dupukla irai, sapkihda irai ma indoa mwuhr kan oaroh lel irai kan ma sapin indoa.’
20.9: Woal kan ma sapda doadoahk kiloak, emen oaloa mwani silper oau.
20.10: A anjoauwo ma irai ma sapda doadoahk mijoa indoahng oaloa dupkoarai, irai lemleme pwa irai nen oaloa koalik. A irai pel oaloa mwani silper oau emenemen irai.
20.11: Nehn irai oaloa dupkoaraihok, irai sapda lipahnede jounmwoaswello pwa,
20.12: ‘Armaj pwiai doadoahk awa oauwoar, a kamai koakoahkla doadoahk pehn joauwo rehnnoauwe pokon pehn joauwo, a koah kioang kamai joangoan dopdop oauwoar!’
20.13: Ih japoang emen irai, ‘Oai pirien, johpwa japwung oau ngoah wiahng koawoa, kisa joah pwungkihpene pwa mwani silper oau rehnnoau?
20.14: Oaloa dupkoammwen, koah ken inla in umwoammwo. Pwa injenoai, ma ngoah nimen dupukkoang iraihok ma indoa mwuhr doahroar oai dupuk oang koawoa.
20.15: Imdoahr, ngoah joah anki pwungin doadoahkki pein noai mwanihkai oang pein injenoai? Ke koah pihrinki ki oai kadek?’ ”
20.16: Jesus kadoarihkihla Ah sikesik, pwa, “Armaj in mwuhr pirin mijoahla, a armaj in mijoa pirin mwerinla.” Kajiluh in en Jesus Ah Kohpda doahr Ah pirin Mehdi (Mark 10:32-34; Luke 18:31-34)
20.17: Nehn en Jesus allaluhdahlahng Jerusalem, Ih kasohrohrihla nah sohnpadahk eijek roahmenno wijahkij nehn allo, Ih pwehng irai,
20.18: “Kamwai kidal pwa kisai allaluhdahlahng Jerusalem, wijahwa ma Nihn-Armaj pirin likliklahng ipen jamwrou laplap apel jounpadahk in Kojonned kan. Irai pirin kadeikda Ih pwa Ih en kojkojdi.
20.19: Irai pirin pangla Ih ipen mihn likin kan ma pirin wiahla mihn kapis iparai, pwa en pokpok apel kalohpwuhla; in rehn kajiluh Ih pirin iejda.” Poakpoak in Nohno men (Mark 10:35-45)
20.20: Doari, pahien Zebedee indoa ipen Jesus; pwilihkihla nah jermwein roahmenno, dairukdi mwohn Ih, wia ah poakpoak.
20.21: Jesus idoak, “Da koah anahne?” Liho japoang, “Inoauki oang ngoahi pwa noai jermwein roahmenne en pwili mwindi ipoamw in oamw loap moaun apel oamw loap meing nehn dohioammwo, ma koah pirin nahmwarkihla.”
20.22: Jesus japoang ara, “Kamwa jehjoa pwa dahkij kamwa poakpoakihen! Kamwa kak nim mwoakin loklokko ma Ngoah ne pirin ken nim?” Ara japoang, “Kama kak.”
20.23: Ih pwehng ara, “A doar mwehu kamwa pirin pwili nim nimoai mwoakke. A joh oai oang pilda pwa inje pirin mwindi loap moaun apel loap meing in Ngoahi. Wijahpwiai ne kileldi oang iraihok ma Joamoaiho ne koaunopda.”
20.24: Nehn en sohnpadahk eijekko rongda me, irai inenin lioas oang riariho.
20.25: A Jesus panginpene irai ohroj, pwehng irai, “Kamwai kidal pwa koaun in armaj rosros kan kin anki manman in koaunda nihrai armaj kan, laplap kan ioar kin anki manman ohroj.
20.26: A ih jehpirin doahroar me ipamwai. Inje ma nimen laplap ioar ih pirin papah ohroj;
20.27: a inje ma nimen keiou ioar ih pirin wiahla nihmwai lidu —
20.28: doahroar Nihn-Armaj, ma indoa jaudi pwa armaj kan en papah, a Ih en papah armaj ohroj apel mihndahkihla Ah mour pwa en koamoaurla armaj dihrdir.” Jesus Kemwehuwihla Woal Majkun Roahmen (Mark 10:46-52; Luke 18:35-43)
20.29: Nehn en Jesus apel Nah sohnpadahkkok injang Jericho, pokon koalik oau kauj mwerirai.
20.30: Woal majkun roahmen mwindi imwin allo rongda pwa Jesus allaluhla wijahu, ara sapda rahrahu, “Maing, Koah ma nihn David! Jeuweje kama!”
20.31: Pokonno woarwoarihda ara, pwehng ara en nennenla, a ara kapwa koalikla ara rahrahu, “Maing, nihn David! Jeuweje kama!”
20.32: Jesus uhdi, pangin ara en indoa, idoak ipara, “Da kamwa nimen Ngoah en wiahng kamwa?”
20.33: Ara japoang, “Maing, kama nimen kapangda wija!”
20.34: Jesus ipwilkihda ara, Ih pukkoang mijarahk. Anjoauwohr ara ken kak kapang wija. Doar ara ken kaujla ih.

21.1: Nehn en Jesus apel Nah sohnpadahkkok koaroannoang Jerusalem, irai lel Bethphage pohn Dolin Olip. Jesus kadarla sohnpadahk roahmen mijarai
21.2: pwehng ara “Kamwa alwe nehn kahnihmw en mijoahn, kamwa pirin kapangda ejel men pirapirdi, pwilihki nah pwinihk siksik men mine ipoa; Kamwa lapwadda ara ukdo Ipoai.
21.3: A ma emen idoakkoang kamwa mehkij, kamwa pwehng ih, ‘Koaunno anahne ara,’ nehn anjoauwohr ih nen mweidoahng kamwa.”
21.4: Mehpwiai wiawi pwa en pwoaida da ma joukohppo pwa:
21.5: “Pwehng kahnihmw Zion, Kapang, oamw nahmwarki allalu indoa ipoamw! In aksiksik, mine pohn ejel men, Mine pohn nihn ejel pwinihk pwulopwul men.”
21.6: Sohnpadahkkok ken inla wiahda me ohroj ma Jesus pwehng ara.
21.7: Ara ukdo ejello apel nah pwinihkko, kihdihoang ara likkoauwok pohra; Jesus doauda mwindi puwoa.
21.8: A pokon koalik oau piroakihdi arai likkoauwok nehn allo, a epwi pel poaloahdi rahn suhkoa piroakihoang nehn allo.
21.9: Pokonno ma alu mwohn Jesus apel ihr ma alu mwerin, rahrahuki, “Kapnga Ih ma kijehn David! Koahs en kapaiahda Ih ma indoa in oadoan Koaunno! Kapnga Koahs!”
21.10: Nehn en Jesus dilda nehn Jerusalem, Kahnihmmwo pwon mwoakidkihda Ah dilda. “Inje woal mene?” irai idoak.
21.11: A pokonno kin japoang irai, “Ih ioar Joukohp Jesus, jang Nazareth wein Galilee.” Jesus Dilda nehn Umw Joarwiho (Mark 11:15-19; Luke 19:45-48; John 2:13-22)
21.12: Jesus inla dilda nehn Umw Joarwiho, kajroahjang loaloa irai ohroj ma noaski apel dopdop koapwoa. Ih ukuddi en sohnkawiliali mwanihok arai sehpillok apel koauwehla dohn noaski mwureiok.
21.13: Ih pwehng irai, “Ne insingdi nehn Puk Joaroawi ma Koahs pwa, ‘Umwoaie pirin adanki umwen kapkap,’ a kamwai ne wiahkihla dohn jounpirap!”
21.14: Armaj majkunpwi apel mwoasorpwi indoa ipen Jesus nehn Umw Joarwiho, Ih kemwehuwihla irai.
21.15: Jamwrou laplappok apel jounpadahk in Kojonneddo kan lioaskihla irai kapang manman kapwuriamwei pwiai apel rong en jerihok nehn Umw Joarwiho rahrahuki, “Kapnga oang Ih ma kijehn kadaudok in David!”
21.16: Irai idoak oang Jesus, “A koah rong dahkij jeri pwiai pwahpwahpwa?” Jesus japoang, “Eh Ngoah rong; kamwai kahjikkoar wadek Puk Joaroawi? Ma pwa ‘Koah ne oaloa kaping unjek jang in oawoan jerihkan apel jerihkan ma kin dihdi?’ ”
21.17: Jesus injang iparai, injang nehn kahnihmmwo inla Bethany, wija Ih koammoaldi inpwonngo. Jesus Kariahla Suhkoa Pas (Mark 11:12-14,20-24)
21.18: Inminjoang in rehnno, nehn en Jesus japahllahng in kahnihmmwo, Ih mwakohkohda
21.19: a Ih kapangda suhkoa fig pas imwin allo. Ih inla pwa Ih en kapang ma mine wah, joh wah Ih kapang, a pwen soahr doari. Doar Ih pwehng suhkoahu, “Koah johla pirin pwuroahng uhwa!” Anjoauwohr suhkoahu mengda.
21.20: Sohnpadahkkok kapang me, irai inenin pwuriamweikihla, irai ken idoak, “Imdoahr suhkoa pase kak pispisinnoar mengda?”
21.21: Jesus japoang, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, ma kamwai kin pwojon johpwa peikajal, kamwai kak wiahda da ma Ngoah wiahng suhkoa pase; a jaudihoar mehwahr doari, kamwai pel kak pwehng dolloauwe, ‘Sohjang men, pein peiddihlahng koawoa nehn jeddo,’ a pirin pwoaida.
21.22: Ma kamwai kamehlele, kamwai nen oaloa da ma kamwai poaki nehn amwai kapkap.” Peidek doahr en Jesus Pwungin wiahda Manman (Mark 11:27-33; Luke 20:1-8)
21.23: Nehn en Jesus japahlla nehn Umw Joarwiho, Ih pwuroahng sapda padahk, a jamwrou laplappok apel epwi koaun pwi indoa Ipoa wiahng peidek pase: “En inje manman ma Koah wihwiahki joang pwiai? Inje ma kioang Koawoa manman oauwe?”
21.24: Jesus japoang irai, “Ngoah pirin pel idoak oang kamwai peidek oau; ma kamwai japoangla Ngoah, a, Ngoah pirin pwehng kamwai nehn en inje manman ma Ngoah wihwiahki joang pwiai.
21.25: John jounpoapdaij kihjang ia ah manman in poapdaiji armaj? Jang nehnloannge ke jang ipen armaj?” Irai sapda akmaipene nehn pwungarai pwahpwahpwa, “Ma kisai japoangki, ‘Jang nehnloannge,’ Ih nen pwehng kisai, ‘A da kamwai joah kamehlelehki John?’
21.26: A ma kisai japoangki, ‘Jang ipen armaj,’ me keperroang kisai, pwa armaj ohroj kin wiahki John joukohp men.”
21.27: Doar irai japoangla Jesus, “Kamai jehjoa.” A Jesus wud japoang irai, “Doar Ngoahi pel jehpirin pwehng kamwai jang in en inje manman ma Ngoah wihwiahki mehpwiai.” Karajraj in Jermwein Roahmen
21.28: “A da kamwai lemlemehioang karajraj pase? Woalmen mine ma nainki jermwein roahmen, ih inla ipen jermwein koalikko, ih pwehng, ‘Noai jeri, inla doadoahk nehn mwoaswelin wainno rehnnoauwe.’
21.29: Jermweinno japoang jamahu pwa, ‘Ngoah kia,’ a mwuhr ih koaluhla, ukudla ah lamlam ih inla nehn mwoaswelin wainno.
21.30: Mwahmwahu pel inla ipen jermwein siksikko pwehng joanngohr. Jermwein siksikko japoang jamahu, ‘Eh, ngoah pirin inla.’ A ih johpwa inla.
21.31: Inje in jermwein roahmenno ma kapwaihahda kupwuren jamahu?” Irai japoang, “Jermwein koalikko.” Doar Jesus pwehng irai, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, pwa jounrik daksissok apel lihn noaski palwoaroaraihok nen dilda nehn Wein Koahs mijen kamwai.
21.32: Pwa John jounpoapdaij indoahng kamwai, pwa en kajalehng kamwai alin mourro, kamwai ken joah kamehlele ih, a jounrik daksissok apel lihn noaski palwoaroaraihok kamehlele. A nehn amwai kapang mehpwiak wihwiawi kamwai johpwa nimen ukudla amwai lamlam, kamehlelehla ih. Karajraj in Sohn Mwoaswelin Wainno (Mark 12:1-12; Luke 20:9-19)
21.33: “Kamwai pel rong apkas karajraj: Mine koaun in mwoaswel men ma poadokdi mwoaswelin wain oau. Ih ken kelihpene, jaripda dohn ungudek wain oau loaloa, kouda wijahn iroir oau. Ih kioang sohn mwoaswel pwi pwa irai en kouwahki, ih ken jeiloakla nehn wai.
21.34: Ne lel anjoau in doddol wehn wainno, ih ken kadarla nah liduhpwi ipen sohn mwoaswellok pwa en oaloa pwoaijoa jang nehn mwoaswello.
21.35: A sohn mwoaswellok koldi liduhwok, pokihjili emen, a emen irai kojukdi, a emen irai kasoahki sakai.
21.36: Doari, koaun in mwoaswello pel pwuroahng kadarla liduhpwi ma dir jang pwihn keiouwo. Sohn mwoaswellok wiahng irai joanngohr.
21.37: Apel mwuhr ih kadarla nah jermweinno iparai, lemleme, ‘Mehlel irai uhdahn pirin woaunki noai jermweinno.’
21.38: A nehn en sohn mwoaswellok kapang jermweinno, irai pwahpene nehn pwungarai, ‘Ioar nihn koaun in mwoaswello nah jermweinwa me; koa, kisai kojukdi ih, kisai ken wud japwankihla mwoaswel wainne!’
21.39: Doari irai jipoardi ih, kerpwihla likin mwoaswello, irai kojukdi ih.”
21.40: Jesus idoak iparai, “Anjoauwo ma koaun in mwoaswello pwurdo, da ih nen wia oang sohn mwoaswellok?”
21.41: A irai japoang, “Ih uhdahn pirin kojukdi armaj nauna pwiai. Ih kioang epwi sohn apwali sohrohr nehn ah mwoaswelin wainno, ma uhdahn pirin kioang pwoaijoa anjoau ma koanoahng.”
21.42: Doar Jesus pwehng irai, “Da, kamwai kahjikkoar wadek da ma Puk Joaroawi pwa? ‘Sakaiho ma jounkou umw kan ne kerpwihla, wud wiahla sakain pwukoakoaimw! Koaunno ma wiahda me; mehkij ma kapwuriamwei mehlel oang kisai.’
21.43: “Ioar Ngoahi pwehngkihoang kamwai, pwa Wein Koahs pirin liklikjang kamwai liklikkoang oau wei ma nen kak kapwarahda wehn Wein Koahs.
21.44: [Armaj men ma pirin kipdihoang pohn sakaihoauwe, ih pirin kipdihoar mwoarpijoang, a ma armaj men ma sakai oauwe pirin kipdihoang puwoa pel nen kamwisihdi emen ma ih kipdihoang puwoa, ih pirin lelloar kamwisihpene.]”
21.45: Nehn en jamwrou laplappok apel Pharisee-ok irai rongda en Jesus karajraj pwiai, irai lioaskihla pwa Ih karajrajki irai.
21.46: Doar irai jong en joalihdi ih, a irai mijik pokon in armajjok, pwa irai kin wiahki Jesus joukohp men.

22.1: Jesus pel pwuroahng doadoahkki karajraj nehn a sikesik oang armajjok, Ih pwa,
22.2: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar nahmwarki men ma koaunopda kamdipwin koapwoapwoaud oau oang nah jermweinno.
22.3: Ih kadarla nah liduhwok pwa en pakairkihoang irai ma oaloa lukko en indoa; a irai johpwa nimen pwili sowoahda.
22.4: Doari, ih pel kadarla epwi lidu en pwehng irai, ‘Kamdippwe ne onopda, kahu woal kai apel kahu pwulopwul moad kai ne kojkojdi. Me ohroj ne onopda. Irai enken indoa!’
22.5: A Iraihok ma luk wiawihoang johpwa soahk, a pwen wihwiahr pein irai doadoahk, emen inla nehn ah mwoaswel, emen nehn ah stohwa.
22.6: Epwi koldi nah jounpakairrok koalkoa, apel kojukdi irai.
22.7: Doari, nahmwarkiho inenin lioasla. Ih kadarla nah jounpeihok en kojukdi iraihok ma kojukdi nah jounpakairrok apel okojda arai kahnihmmwok.
22.8: Ih pel pwehng nah liduhwok, ‘Kamdipwin koapwoapwoaudde ne onopda, a irai ma luk wiawihoang joah warroang pwili.
22.9: Apkas inla nehn al kan lukehdo ohroj ma kamwai kapangda.’
22.10: Doar liduhwok ukdo ohroj ma irai suhwoang, armaj mwehu apel armaj nauna doahr oauwoar, kamdippwo ken dirkihla armaj.
22.11: “A anjoauwo ma nahmwarkiho indoahng suhwoang armajjok, ih kapangda woal men ma joah mine nehn likkoauwin koapwoapwoaud.
22.12: ‘Oai pirien, imdoahr oamw dildo nehn ummwe johpwa likkoauki likkoauwin koapwoapwoaud?’ A woallo johpwa japoang.
22.13: Doari, nahmwarkiho pwehng irai ma jeujeuweje ih, ‘Piroahdi poah apel ehn kamwai kerpwihla ih likin wija rosso, wijahu ma joang apel keikeikeisakai.’ ”
22.14: A Jesus koarjoahla karajrajjo pwa, “Dir armaj oaloa lukko, a epwihoar pilpilda.” Daksis oang Caesar (Mark 12:13-17; Luke 20:20-26)
22.15: Pharisee-ok suhpene pwa irai en koajoanehdi doahr irai en lidipihdi Jesus ki mehk ma Ih pwa, pwa irai en kak kadpoahki Ih.
22.16: Irai kadarlahng Ih epwi nihrai sohnpadahkkok pwilihki epwi nihn Herod sohn doadoahkkok, en idoak oang Ih peidek oauwe: “Jounpadahk, kamai kidal pwa Koah armaj mehlel men. Koah padahkki kupwuren Koahs oang armaj johpwa kaspoahki da wiawihoang Koawoa. Koah johkin lipilpilki armaj.
22.17: Apkas pwehng kamai da Oamw lamlam oang me: Pwen pwung en dupuk daksis oang Caesar in Rome ke joah?”
22.18: A Jesus pwen kidal arai lamlam nauna, Ih pwa, “Mwalaun kamwai! Amwda kamwai ke jongjong in lidipihdi Ngoahi?
22.19: Kajalehng Ngoahi oau mwani silperren ma kamwai kin dupukki daksis!” Irai wahdohng Ih mwani silper oau,
22.20: a Ih idoakkoang irai, “Mijen apel oadoan inje me pohn sende?”
22.21: Irai japoang, “Caesar.” Jesus pwa, “Doar ioar; dupukkoang Caesar dahkij ma ah. A dupukkoang Koahs dahkij ma Ah.”
22.22: Nehn irai rongda me, irai pwuriamweikihla, irai ken japahlpijoang. Peidek Doahroar Iejda Jang Mehdi (Mark 12:18-27; Luke 20:27-40)
22.23: Rehnnohr Sadducee-pwi indoa ipen Jesus. (Irai pwa armaj jehpirin iejda jang mehdi.) Irai indoa Jesus idoak,
22.24: “Maing Jounpadahk, Moses pwa, ma woal men mehdi a joh nah jeri, riah woal pirin wud painkihla liho pwa en wiahda kadaudokoan woal mehdiho.
22.25: Doari, riari oau kin minmine ipasai, woal ijimen. Minnohr koalik pwoapwoaudla oaroh mehdi jang pahioahu a joh nihra jeri. A in doahroar siahk oauwe riah woal pel painkihla liohdiho.
22.26: Joanngohr pel wiawihoang karoahmenno, apel kajilmenno. Allaluhdi oaroh lel min kaijimenno.
22.28: Doari nehn rehnno ma armaj mehdi kan pirin iejda, inje in min ijimenno ma ioar pirin pahien liho, nehn irai ohroj ne painkihda ih.”
22.29: Jesus ken japoang irai, “Kamwai inenin japwung, kijehn amwai johkin woahwoahki Puk Joaroawi ke manman in Koahs.
22.30: Anjoauwo ma mehdihok iejda, irai pirin doahrla sohnloang in nehnloannge, jehpirin pwoapwoaud.
22.31: A oang in irair oauwe, kamwai johkin wadek dahkij Koahs pwehng kamwai? Ih pwa,
22.32: ‘Ngoah ioar Koahs in Abraham, Koahs in Isaac, apel Koahs in Jacob.’ Ih ioar Koahs in armaj mour, jaudi armaj mehdi.”
22.33: Nehn en pokonno rong Ih, irai ken pwuriamweikihla Ah padahk. Kojonned ma Keiou Kajampwal (Mark 12:28-34; Luke 10:25-28)
22.34: Nehn en Pharisee-ok rongda pwa Jesus ne kasukihdi en Sadducee-ok ahr peidekkok, irai ken pokonpene.
22.35: Emen in irai, jounkawoahwoahn Kojonneddo nimen lidipihki Jesus peidek oau,
22.36: “Jounpadahk,” ih idoak, “ia kojonned wa ma keiou kajampwal nehn Kojonneddok?”
22.37: A Jesus japoangki, “ ‘Koah en ipwilki Koaunno oamw Koahs ki oamw mohngiong ohroj, ngenimwen ohroj, apel oamw lamlam ohroj.’
22.38: Me ioar kojonned wa ma keiou koalik apel kajampwal.
22.39: A kariau in kajampwal ma pel doahroar me: ‘Ipwilki mihn ipoamw doahroar oamw ipwilki pein koawoa.’
22.40: Kojonned in Moses kan ohroj apel padahk in joukohp kan ohroj poahjoanda pohn kojonned riau pwiai.” Peidekki doahr Messiah? (Mark 12:35-37; Luke 20:41-44)
22.41: Nehn en Pharisee-ok pokonpene; Jesus idoak oang irai,
22.42: “Ia amwai lamlam oang Messiah? Kijehn kadaudokin inje Ih?” Irai japoang, “Ih kijehn kadaudokin David.”
22.43: Jesus pel idoak, “Amwda Ngenin Koahs ke audohkihda David pwa Ih en panginki ‘Oai Koaun.’
22.44: ‘Koaunno pwehng Oai Koaun: Koah en mwindi oang in loap moaun in Ngoah, Oaroh Ngoah kihdihoang Oamw imwinsihsi kan pehn pwoalkoamwen kan.’
22.45: Ma David panginki ih ‘Koaun,’ imdoahr ih en kak wia kadaudokin David?”
22.46: Johpwa emen kak japoangki Jesus mehkij; Jang rehnno inla, johla emen nimen idoakkoang Ih mehkij.

23.1: Doar Jesus kapahrak oang pokonno apel Nah sohnpadahkkok,
23.2: “Jounpadahk in kojonned kan apel Pharisee-ok ioar irai ma anki manman in kawoahwoa kojonned in Moses.
23.3: Doari, kamwai uhdahn pirin pel peikkoang apel kapwaihahda me ohroj ma irai kin padahkihoang kamwai; a kamwai johpwa japjang arai wihwia kan. Pwa irai johpwa kin kapwaihahda dahkij arai kin kapahrakkihwe.
23.4: Irai kin piroahdihoang wijik soausoau pohn armaj. Irai johkin kamwoakid apas jandin poahrai pwa en jeuwejehda wijik soausoau pwiai.
23.5: Me ohroj ma irai kin wia, irai wia pwa en janjal mwehu mwohn armaj. Kamwai soahk mwehu koalik in koakon kan ma mine in soamwoarai apel in poahrai ma iren Puk Joaroawi kan mine loaloa apel roairoai in mihn pirapirin arai likkoauwo.
23.6: “Irai perenki mwindi in moangoan sehpil kan nehn kamdipw apel mine nehn jeia ma keiou kajampwal nehn jinakoke kan!
23.7: Irai perenki armaj kan en rahnmwahuwi irai nehn pokon kan, panginki irai ‘jounpadahk.’
23.8: Kamwai joah kin nimen armaj en panginki kamwai ‘Jounpadahk,’ pwa kamwai ohroj doahroauwoar, apel anki Jounpadahk mennoar.
23.9: Pel johpwa panginki emen pohn jampah ‘Mwahmwa,’ pwa Jamamwai emennoar doari ma mine nehnloannge.
23.10: Kamwai joah pel nimen emen en panginki koawoa koaun, pwa amwai koaun mennoar ioar ‘Christ.’
23.11: Minwa ma keiou laplap nehn pwungamwai kan en wia sohn papah.
23.12: Pwa emen ma nimen laplap pirin siksikla, a emen ma kin aksiksik pirin laplapla.” Jesus Kariahla arai Mwalaun (Mark 12:40; Luke 11:39-42,44,52; 20:47)
23.13: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned kan, apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Pwa kamwai kin risingdi jang wanihmw in Wein nehnloannge, a pein kamwai joh kin dilda ke mweidoahng armaj kan ma kin engdehn in dilda.
23.14: [“Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Kamwai kin jerkihjang umwen liohdi kan nehn amwai kin lioajoahjki amwai kapkap roairoai. Ioar mehwa kamwai nen oaloahki koaloklok koalik.]
23.15: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Kamwai kin joarjoaroakjili nehn jed apel kosehwe weipwi pwa kamwai en ukuddoang lamlamin armaj emen oang in amwai lamlam in mihn Jew; nehn ah ne lohdi kamwai kin wiahng ih en warroang inla nehn ehl pehn riau koalik jang kamwai.
23.16: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounkaweid majkun kan! Kamwai kin padahkihoang armaj kan ma emen ma kin kahukihla Umw Joarwiho johkin pwukoahki, a ma emen ma kin kahukihla kohllo nehn Umw Joarwiho ih ioar pwukoahki ah kahula.
23.17: Armaj majkun pweipweipwi kamwai! Ia mehwa kajampwal in kohl ke Umw Joaroawi ma kin kajarwihla kohl.
23.18: Kamwai pel pwa ma emen ma kahukihla pei joarwiho, jehpirin pwukoahki; a ma emen ma kin kahukihla mihn meiroang in pohn peiho ih ioar pwukoahki ah kahula.
23.19: Ia woahr amwai majkun! Mindahioau ma kajampwal, meiroang ke peiho ma kajarwihla meiroanngo?
23.20: Doari, armaj men ma kin kahukihla pei joarwiho, ih kin kahukihla pei joarwiho apel me ohroj ma mine puwoa.
23.21: Nehn en emen kin kahukihla Umw Joarwiho, koah kahukihla Umw Joarwiho apel Koahs, ma mine loaloa.
23.22: Nehn en emen kin kahukihla nehnloannge, ih kin kahukihla mwoalen Koahs apel Ih ma mine puwoa.
23.23: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Kamwai kin meiroangki oang Koahs eijek kij oau in amwai koapwoahn jampah, apel mihn kioang nimen mwinge ma doahroar mint, dill, apel cumin, a kamwai johkin peikkoang padahk kajampwal kan in kojonneddo ma doahroar pwung paiai, kalahngan apel mehlel. Ioar mehpwiai ma kamwai uhdahn pirin kapwaihahda apel pwilihkihoar minpwiok.
23.24: Jounkaweid majkunpwi kamwai! Kamwai likihla loang jang nehn nimamwai pil pwadoar kamwai japwungla johploahdi kamel?
23.25: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned kan apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai, kamwai kin kamwkelehda likin nihmwai mwoak apel pileis, a loaloa dirkihla dipwjoau ma kamwai kin pein oaloahdi jang in amwai kin roprop oang pein kamwai.
23.26: Pharisee majkun men koawoa! Keiou kamwkelehda nehn mwoakko mijkoalkoal, a likin nen pel mwakelkelda.
23.27: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Kamwai kin mwehuki mwakelkel in likin joaujoau, a loaloa dir in sihn armaj mehdi apel me kajaus ohroj.
23.28: Pel doahr kamwai, kamwai jong en doahroar armaj pwung likimwaikan, a loaloa mohngiongimwai kan dirkihla widing apel mwoarjuwed. Jesus Kohpda doahroar Irai pirin Koaloklok (Luke 11:47-51)
23.29: “Ia woahr apwal oang kamwai jounpadahk in kojonned apel Pharisee kan! Mwalaunpwi kamwai! Kamwai kin wiahda joaujoau mwehu oang joukohp kan apel kalingihda joaujoau in armaj mwehu kan;
23.30: kamwai kin pwa, ‘Ma kamai kin pwili mine nehn mwein jamasaihok, kamai nen jehpwili kojukdi joukohppok.’
23.31: Kamwai ne pein kadehdehda pwa kamwai kijehn kadaudok en iraihok ma kojukdi joukohppok.
23.32: Kamwai doaudoaula kadoarihla dahkij ma jamamwaihok ne sapkihda.
23.33: Sinekpwi kamwai, ipwihpw in sinekpwi kamwai! Kamwai lemleme pwa kamwai kak pisjang kadeik in nehn ehl?
23.34: A doar Ngoah pwehng kamwai pwa Ngoah pirin kadardohng kamwai joukohppwi, woal loalkoangpwi, apel jounpadahkpwi; kamwai pirin kojukdi epwi, kalohpwuhla epwi, poki epwi nehn amwai jinakoke kan apel kauj jang irai nehn koaujoan kan.
23.35: Doari, imwlahn mehpwiai, koaloklok pirin aluhwoang kamwai pwa jang in amwai kojukdi armaj ma joh diparai; sapda jang in kojkojdihn Abel lel kojkojdihn Zechariah nihn Berechiah, ma kamwai kojukdi nehn pwungen Umw Joarwiho apel pei joarwiho.
23.36: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel pwa koaloklok in kojukdi armaj pwiai pirin aluhwoang armaj in rehn oauwe!” En Jesus Ipwil oang Jerusalem (Luke 13:34,35)
23.37: “O Jerusalem, Jerusalem! Koah ma kin kojukdi joukohp kan apel kasoahki sakai jounpakairrok ma Koahs kadardohng koawoa! Pehn doapoa Ngoah nimen jupwurpene nihmw jerihkan doahr jummwa pein men kin kihpene nah pwinihk kan pehn poah, a koah joah nimen mweidoahng Ngoahi!
23.38: A doar, oamw Umw Joarwihn pirin soahnda johla sowoa.
23.39: A Ngoah pwehng koawoa me, koah nen johpwa pwuroahng kapang Ngoahi oaroh koawoa en pwa ‘Koahs en kapaiahda Ih ma indoa in oadoan Koaunno.’ ”

24.1: Nehn en Jesus japjapahljang Umw Joarwiho, Nah sohnpadahkkok kajalehng Ih doahroar mwomwen Umw Joarwiho.
24.2: A Ih pwehng irai, “Kamwai kapang mwehuwi mehpwiai ohroj. Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, joh oau sakai pirin luhwoahdi nehn dohiah, ohroj pirin mwoardi.” Apwal apel Loklok kan (Mark 13:3-13; Luke 21:7-19)
24.3: Nehn en Jesus mwindi pohn Dolin Olip, Nah sohnpadahkkok indoa Ipoa in rir, “Pwehng kamai, pwa ngehd mehpwiai pirin wiawi, a kilel dahpwi ma pirin kajalehda Oamw anjoau in japahldo apel imwin jampah.”
24.4: Jesus japoang irai, “Kamwai kanaihoang kamwai pwadoar armaj kapweipweidi kamwai.
24.5: Armaj dir pirin indoa in oadoaihoa pwa, ‘Ngoahi ioar Messiah!’ Irai pirin kapweipweidi armaj dir.
24.6: Kamwai pirin rong rongin mahwin pirin wiawi wija koaroan apel doh, a joah majpwehkda. Pwa mehpwiai uhdahn pirin wiawi, a jaudi ioar imwin jampah me.
24.7: Wei kan pirin mahwin pene nehn pwungarai. Japw kan pirin uhpene nehn pwungarai. Wija ohroj lehk koalik apel roarroarin japw pirin.
24.8: A mehpwiai ohroj pwen doahroar sapdakoan moadoakin noaisik.
24.9: “Doar kamwai pel pirin joaldi apel, kiheklahng koaloklok apel kojkojdi. Sohn wei ohroj nen lioassoangda kamwai pwa Ngoahi.
24.10: Nehn anjoauwo dir pirin kerpwihla ahr pwojon, epwi pirin pangla, a irai pirin pel lioas pene nehn pwungarai.
24.11: A doar, joukohp likamw dir pirin pel pwokda, kapweipweidi dir armaj.
24.12: Me nauna pirin dirla nehn wijahkan, limpoak in armaj dir pirin siksikla.
24.13: A emen ma kolkol oaroh lel imwin pirin mourla.
24.14: Apel Rongmwehu in Weiho pirin padahk nehn jampah pwon, pwa armaj ohroj en rong; a imwin jampah kapwa leldo. Janjal Kamajpwehk Naunahu (Mark 13:14-23; Luke 21:20-24)
24.15: “Kamwai pirin pel kapang Janjal Kamajpwehk Naunahu ma Joukohp Daniel ne kohpda. Ih pirin uhda nehn wija joarwiho.” (Ma emen wadek me, en woahwoahki!)
24.16: “Doar irai ma mine Judea en kaudahla pohn dollok.
24.17: Ma emen ma mine pohn umwahu en johpwa doaudihla nehn umwahu pwa en oaloa mehkij.
24.18: Emen ma mine nehn japw, en joah pwurla pwa en oaloa ah joakid.
24.19: Ia woahr apwal oang li lijaian apel nohnohk ma kadihdi jeri nehn anjoauwo.
24.20: Kamwai poaki ipen Koahs pwa amwai kaula in pisla en joah wiawi anjoau in kopou ke Sabbath.
24.21: Pwa apwal in anjoauwo pirin koalik jang apwal ma kin wiawi jang mehj leldo apkas; pel joh mehkij pirin doahroar jang me inla.
24.22: Koahs ne kajipidihla rehnnok; pwa ma Ih johpwa wia me, joh armaj emen pirin pisla. Pwa nah armaj pilpil kan ioar kahrehda ih pirin kajipidihla rehnnok.
24.23: “Doari, ma emen pwehng kamwai, ‘Kapang, ioar Messiah wa me,’ ke ‘Ih o,’ johpwa kamehlele.
24.24: Messiah likamw apel joukohp likamw pirin pwokda wia manman kapwuriamwei pwa en kapweipweidi nihn Koahs armaj pilpil kan, ma kak.
24.25: Kamwai rong, pwa Ngoah ne pwehng kamwai mwohn mehpwiai pirin wiawi.
24.26: “Doar ma armaj pwehng kamwai, ‘Kapang, Messiah mine nehn allo!’ — joah inla kapang. Ke, ‘Kapang, ih oakkoakkoak nehn ummwo!’ — joah kamehlele.
24.27: Nihn-Armaj pirin indoa doahroar joarom ma kin kamaramihda mijen loannge pwon.
24.28: “Vulture kin pokonpene wija ma mahn ke palwar mehdi kin mine.” Indoahn Nihn-Armaj (Mark 13:24-27; Luke 21:25-28)
24.29: “Mwerin rehn apwal koalikkok, Joauwo pirin rosla, johnpwonngo johla maramin, ujuhwok pirin kipdi jang mijen loannge, apel manman in nehnloannge pirin mwoakidda jang nehn dohiarai.
24.30: A doar, kilel in Nihn-Armaj Ah pirin indoa pwokda mijen nehnloannge, a kadaudok in jampah ohroj pirin jong nehn irai pirin kapang doahroar Nihn-Armaj Ah pirin alu indoa pohn koasoau in mijen loannge in sihkei apel ling koalihkkoalik.
24.31: Ngilen jowi koalik oau pirin wiawi, a Ih pirin kadarla Nah sohnloannge kan wija ohroj in jampah jang in palimese lel palikapi, pwa irai en kapokonihpene Nah armaj pilpil kan. Padahk jang Suhkoa Fig (Mark 13:28-31; Luke 21:29-33)
24.32: “Ngoah nimen kamwai en oaloa padahk oau jang in suhkoa fig ma rahn suhkoa pase kin krihn kodla apel mwisla doar soah kan ken sapda pouj doar kamwai ne kidal pwa roak ne koaroando.
24.33: Pel doahroar, ma kamwai pirin kapang mehpwiai ohroj wiawi, kamwai pirin kidal pwa anjoau in ne koaroando, ne nimwennoar sapda.
24.34: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel pwa mehpwiai ohroj pirin wiawi mwohn en armaj ohroj ma mour apkas pirin mehdi.
24.35: Nehnloannge apel jampah pirin johrla, a Oai Mahjan kan jehpirin joaloangla. Johpwa Emen Kidal Rehnno apel Awahu (Mark 13:32-37; Luke 17:26-30,34-36)
24.36: “A johpwa emen kidal rehnno ke awahu ma mehpwiai pirin wiawi, sohnloang in nehnloannge apel Nahu jehjoa. Jamahu kalahpwuk kidal.
24.37: Indoahn Nihn-Armaj pirin doahroar ma ne wiawi oh nehn en Noah mweiho.
24.38: Nehn rehnnok mwohn nohlikko armaj kan kamkamdipw, jakjakau, woal kan apel lihkan pwoapwoaud oaroh lel rehnno ma Noah dilloang nehn warihmmwo.
24.39: A irai johpwa kidal pwa da pirin wiawi oaroh lapakehu ne indoa pohkla irai ohroj. Ioar doahr pirin wiawi anjoauwo ma Nihn-Armaj pirin indoa.
24.40: Anjoauwo woal roahmen pirin doaddoadoahk nehn japw oau; emen pirin wijik jang, emen luhwoahdi.
24.41: Li roahmen pirin daulahk pilahwa nehn wijahn wia pilahwa; emen pirin wijik jang, emen luhwoahdi.
24.42: Kamwai anahne onop anjoau ohroj, pwa kamwai jehjoa pwa rehn dahioau Koaunno pirin japahldo.
24.43: Ma koaun in peneinei oau kidal anjoauwo ma jounpirap men pirin indoa, koah nen kidal pwa ih pirin poahd apel johpwa mweidoahng en koauwehla umwahu.
24.44: Ioar mehwa kahrehda kamwai en anahne onnonop anjoau ohroj. Pwa Nihn-Armaj pirin indoa anjoau oau ma koah joah kajik. Lidu Loalpwoas ke Lidu Joaloalpwoas (Luke 12:41-48)
24.45: “Inje jounpapah ma poadidi apel koahiok? Ih ma koaunno pilda pwa en pwukoahki apwali epwi jounpapah kan pwa en nehk oang kanahr mwinge nehn anjoau ma koanoahng.
24.46: Meid pai papahmeno ma koaunno pwurdo in umwahu kidalda pwa ih wia doadoahk mwehu,
24.47: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, koaunno nen kioang jounpapah meno en kohwahki me ohroj ih anki.
24.48: A ma ih jounpapah nauna men, ih pirin pwehng pein ih pwa, ‘oai koaunno jehpirin japahldo anjoau roairoai.’
24.49: Ih ken sapda koalkoa pwilihoa jounpapahk, apel pwili mwinge apel nimnim oang sohn jakauwok.
24.50: Ah koaunno pirin pwurdo oau rehn ma jounpapahu johpwa kajik apel kidal.
24.51: Koaunno pirin poaloa woasiksikihdi ih kihlahng ipen pwihn mwalaunnok wija ih pirin joang apel keikeikeisakai.

25.1: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar me; anjoau kij jerpein eijek wahda nihrai lahmmok inlahng kajamwo woal kamwohddo.
25.2: Limmen in irai pweipwei, a limmen loalkoang.
25.3: Jerpein pweipwei limmenno johpwa wahda pilen nihrai lahmmok,
25.4: a min loalkoang limmenno wahda rumehpwi audohkihda pilen nihrai lahmmok.
25.5: Nehn en woallo kosin indoa, lihok moairla.
25.6: “Lel in lopkoan pwong irai pwohrkihda ngilen poangpoang, ‘Kapang, woalwa ne leldo! Kamwai indoa kajamwo ih!’
25.7: Jerpeinnok ohroj pwohrda onopda nihrai lahmmok.
25.8: Min pweipwei limmenno poaki ipen min loalkoanngok, ‘Menlau kihdoahng kamai ekij pilen nihmwai lahm kan, pwa nihmai lahmkai ne kunla.’
25.9: A jerpein loalkoang japoang, ‘Johkak. Nen johpwa isar oang kisai ohroj. Inla nehn stohwa dupukda nihmwai pilen lahm kan.’
25.10: Anjoauwo irai inla nehn stohwa dupuk nihrai pilen lahmmok, woal kamwohddo ne indoa, irai ma ne onopda pwili ih dilda oang kamdipw in koapwoapwoauddo, wanihmmwo risdi loakdi.
25.11: “Mwuhr, jerpein pweipweihok pwurdo, irai uhda likin wanihmmwo poangpoang, ‘Maing, risingda wanihmmwen oang kamai!’
25.12: A ih japoang, ‘Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, Ngoah jehjoa kamwai!’ ”
25.13: Jesus kadoarihla karajraj pase, “Doar onnonop, pwa kamwai jehjoa rehn ke awa ma Nihn-Armajjo pirin japahldo.” Karajraj in Papah Jilmen (Luke 19:11-27)
25.14: “Wein nehnloannge doahroar woal men ma pirin wia ah jeiloak. Ih pangin pene nah papahk ih nehk oang irai ah koapwoa kan, pwa irai en apwali oang ih.
25.15: Oang emen ih kioang uhwen ah koahiok: Oang emen ih kioang mwani kohl limekid, oang emen ih kioang riekid, a oang emen ih kioang kid doar ih ken jeiloakla.
25.16: Papahu ma oaloa mwani kohl limekid inla kadirihla nah mwanihok pel wiahda mwani kohl limekid.
25.17: Pel doahroar minno ma oaloa mwani kohl riekiddo, pel wiahda mwani kohl riekid.
25.18: A papahu ma ne oaloa mwani kohl kiddo, Ih ken inla jaripda pwoarroau nehn pwirejjo oakihla nihn ah koaunno mwanihok.
25.19: “Mwerin anjoau roairoai, en papahk ahr koaunwa pwurdo pwa en koajoanehdi mwanihok iparai.
25.20: Papahu ma oaloa mwani kohl limekid indoa pel wa mwani kohl limekid ‘Maing, koah kioang ngoahi mwani kohl limekid, kapang pel mwani kohl limekid ngoah ne koadoahkoahda.’
25.21: Koaunno japoang, ‘Doadoahk mwehu, papah lelpoak apel mehlel men koawoa, ki oamw koahiok in koadoahkoahda mehkij siksik, ngoah pirin kioang koawoa mehkij koalik koah en kin appwapwali. Indoa pwili injenmwahuki oai pai.’
25.22: Papahu ma oaloa mwani kohl riekiddo pel indoa pwehng ih, ‘Maing: kapang! Koah kihdoahng ngoahi mwani kohl riekid, a me pel riekid ngoah ne koadoahkoahda,’
25.23: Koaunno pel pwehng ih, ‘Doadoahk mwehu, papah lelpoak apel mehlel men koah, ki oamw koahiok in koadoahkoahda mehkij siksik, ngoah pirin kioang koawoa mehkij koalik koah en appwapwali. Indoa pwili injenmwahuki oai pai.’
25.24: A papahu ma oaloa mwani kohl kiddo, pel indoa pwehng ih, ‘Maing, ngoah kidal pwa koawoa woal joah mahk men; koah kin doli wija ma koah johkin poadok, koah kin nekid pene wija ma koah johkin kamwroahwe.
25.25: Nehn oai mijik koawoa, ngoah inlahr oakihla nihmw mwanihok nehn pwirej. Kapang! Ioar nihmw mwani koa me.’
25.26: A koaunno japoang, ‘Koah papah nauna apel dangahnga men! Koah kidal pwa ngoah armaj apwal men, ma kin doli wija ngoah joah poadok, oaloahjang wija ma ngoah joah koadoahkoa?
25.27: Amwda koah joah nekidla noai mwani kan nehn pangk, pwa ngoah en kak oaloa ohroj pwilihkihla wihnin nehn oai pwurdo?
25.28: Doari, kamwai kihjang mwanihkan ipoa, kamwai kioang papahu ma nainki mwani kohl nenno.
25.29: Pwa oang emen ma anki mehkij, kakoalikpoa pirin pel aluhwoang; a oang ih ma joh ah mehkij, dahkij ma mine ipoa nen pel kihekjang.
25.30: Apkas kerpwihla min joh kaspoa mene likin wija rosso, wijahu ma ih pirin joang apel keikeikeisakai.’ Kadeikpen Wei kan
25.31: “Nihn-Armaj pirin indoa nehn Ah klohri doahroar Nahmwarki men, pwilihki Nah sohnloang kan ohroj, Ih pirin mine nehn Ah mwoalen kadeik linngo.
25.32: A sohn jampah ohroj pirin pokonpene mwohn Ih. Ih pirin kasohrohrihpijoang oang pwihn riau, doahroar jilepen jihpw men kin kasohrohrihpijoang jihpw jang kuhs.
25.33: Ih pirin kihla armaj pwunngok loap moaun a luhwoahk loap meing.
25.34: Doar Nahmwarkiho pwehng irai ma mine loap moaun, ‘Indoa, kamwai ma ne kapaida jang ipen Joamoaiho! Indoa oaloahdi weiho ma koaunopdahng kamwai jang sapin wiawihdahn jampah.
25.35: Pwa nehn Oai kin mwakohkohda, kamwai kamwinge Ngoahi; nehn Oai mareuda, kamwai kihdoa Nimoai pil; a nehn Oai wia mihn keiru men, kamwai kajamwohng Ngoahi nehn umwamwai kan;
25.36: nehn joh Oai likkoau, kamwai kihdoa Oai likkoau; nehn Oai johmwehu, kamwai kin pwokdo apwali Ngoahi; Ngoah joaldi nehn kalpwuhj, kamwai paj Ipoai.’
25.37: “Armaj pwunngok japoang, ‘Maing, ngehd kamai kapang Koawoa mwakohko, kamai kamwinge Koawoa? Ke mareu, kamai kioang Koawoa pil Koah en nim?
25.38: Ke armaj in indoa men, kamai kajamwo Koawoa? Ke joah likkoau, kamai kalikkoauwihda Koawoa?
25.39: Ngehd kamai ne pel kapang Koawoa johmwehu ke joal nehn kalpwuhj, a kamai alwe paj Ipoamw?’
25.40: A Nahmwarkiho pirin japoang, ‘Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, nehn amwai wiahng emen rioai keiou siksik, Ngoahi ma kamwai ne wiahng!’
25.41: “Doari Ih wud pwehnglahng iraihok loap meing, ‘Kamwai alwe jang Ngoahi, kamwai ma riahla kan! Alwehng nehn oaiho ma johkin kunla ma koaunopdahng Jehsen apel ngen jaussok!
25.42: Pwa Ngoahi mwakohko, kamwai joah kamwinge Ngoahi. Ngoah mareu, kamwai joah kanimpili ngoahi.
25.43: Ngoah armajin indoa men, kamwai joah kajamwo Ngoahi oang nehn umwamwai kan. Ngoah joah likkoau, kamwai joah kalikkoauwi Ngoahi. Ngoah johmwehu pel nehn kalpwuhj, kamwai joah indoa Ipoai.’
25.44: “A irai japoang, ‘Maing, ngehd kamai ne pel kapang Koawoa mwakohko ke mareu ke wia armajin indoa men, ke joah likkoau, ke johmwehu, ke mine nehn kalpwuhj, a kamai joah jeuweje Koawoa?’
25.45: A Ih japoang irai, ‘Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, nehn amwai johpwa nimen jeuweje ih ma keiou siksik in rioai pwiai, kamwai johpwa nimen jeuweje Ngoahi.’
25.46: Doar irai pirin inlahng koaloklok joh imwin, a irai ma pwung pirin inlahng mour joh imwin.”

26.1: Anjoauwo ma Jesus ne kadoarihla Ah padahk doahr mehpwiai ohroj, Ih ken pwehng Nah sohnpadahkkok,
26.2: “Mwerin rehn riau, doahroar amwai kin kidal, Joarwihn Passover pirin wiawi, a irai pirin pangla Nihn-Armaj pwa en kalohpwuhla.”
26.3: Jamwrou laplappok apel koaunnok pokon pene in umwen Jamwrou Laplap Caiaphas;
26.4: irai koajoanehdi pwa irai en joalihdi Jesus in joah janjal irai kojukdi Ih.
26.5: Irai pwahpene nehn pwungarai, “Kisai joah wia nehn anjoau in joaroawi laplap oauwe, pwa armaj kan en joah mwoarongkihda.” Jesus Keidi nehn Bethany (Mark 14:3-9; John 12:1-8)
26.6: Nehn en Jesus minmine Bethany nehn umwen woal lepa men ma adanki Simon,
26.7: lihmen indoa Ipoa wahdo lehn wai wai kajampwal oau ma inenin koalik dupkoa. Liho widekihdi oang pohn moangoan Jesus.
26.8: Nehn en sohnpadahkkok kapang me irai lioasla idoak, “Mihnda lehn wai oauwe wiamwahlla?
26.9: Lehn wai wai oauwe kak noasla koalihkkoalik dupkoa, kak kihekkoang armaj joamwoahmwoa kan!”
26.10: Jesus kidal da ma irai pwahpwahpwa, Ih ken pwehng irai, “Da kamwai diroapwkihdahki lihmene? Siahk mwehu oau ih wiahng Ngoah.
26.11: Min joamwoahmwoahk pirin pwen mine ipamwai anjoau ohroj, a Ngoahi joah.
26.12: Pwa nehn ah widekihoang lehi pohioa, ih koaunopda palwoaroaioa oang Oai pirin joajjoardi.
26.13: Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, wijahkij ma padahk in Rongmwehu wiawi nehn jampah, dahkij ih wia pel pirin lohkjili pwa en kasmanda lihmene.” Judas Pwungki en Pangla Jesus (Mark 14:10,11; Luke 22:3-6)
26.14: Doar emen irai eijek roahmenno — ma adanki Judas Iscariot — inla ipen jamwrou laplappok,
26.15: idoak iparai, “Da kamwai pirin kioang ngoahi ma ngoah panngoang Jesus kamwai?” Doar irai wadekla mwani silper jilihjek kioang ih.
26.16: Jang anjoauwo inla Judas kapkapang anjoau mwehu ih en panngoang irai Jesus. Jesus Pwili nah Sohnpadahkkok Kamdipwin Passover (Mark 14:12-21; Luke 22:7-13,21-23; John 13:21-30)
26.17: Rehn keiou in Joarwihn Pilahwa Joah Doal Yeast, sohnpadahkkok indoa idoak oang Jesus, “Ia wija koah nimen kamain koaunopdahng koawoa kamdipw in Passover?”
26.18: Ih japoang, “Alwe nehn kahnihmmwen ipen woal men pwehng ih, ‘Jounpadahkko pwa: Oai anjoau ne lel. Ngoah pwilihki noai sohnpadahkkok pirin kasman Passover nehn umwoammwe.’ ”
26.19: Sohnpadahkkok wiahda da Jesus pwehng ara, ara ken koaunopda kamdipwin Passover.
26.20: Injoausik pene Jesus mwindihoang in sehpillo pwilihki nah sohnpadahk eijek roahmenno mwinge.
26.21: Nehn irai mwingmwinge, Ih pwa, “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel, emen in kamwai pirin pangla Ngoahi.”
26.22: Irai inenin pahsoaula sapda wad emen iddidoak oang ih, “Maing, inje me? Ngoahi me?”
26.23: Jesus japoang, “Inje ma pwili Ngoahi kaduhdi kanah pilahwahu nehn pileisse pirin pangla Ngoahi.
26.24: Nihn-Armaj pirin mehdi doahr Ah ne insingdi nehn Puk Joaroawi. A inenin naunahng ih ma pangla Nihn-Armaj! Mwehu oang oar ma armaj meno joah noaisikdi.”
26.25: A Judas, ma pirin pangla Ih, pwehng Ih, “Mehlel jaudi ngoahi, Jounpadahk?” Jesus japoang, “Eh, ioar koah ma ne pwahda.” En Koaunno Kamdipwin Koamwurmwur (Mark 14:22-26; Luke 22:14-20; Oang Corinth Ⅰ 11:23-25)
26.26: Nehn irai pwen mwingmwinge, Jesus pwoakda pilahwahu, kapkapki, sipwangpijoang, kioang Nah sohnpadahkkok, pwehng irai, “Oaloa, kang, pwa ioar palwoaroaioahwa me.”
26.27: Doar ih pel oaloa mwoakko, kapingkalahnganki oang Koahs, pel kioang irai, pwehng irai, “Nim jang loaloa, kamwai ohroj.
26.28: Pwa insahihoa me, insahn Inoauwo ma pirin widekdi pwa en lapwadda dipen armaj.
26.29: Kamwai en kidal pwa jang me inla Ngoahi johla pirin nim wain oaroh ngehd Ngoahi en pwili kamwai nim wain kapw nehn en Joamoaiho Ah Wei.”
26.30: Doari, irai ken koaulkihla koaul pas irai ken inla pohn Dolin Olip. Jesus Kohpda en Peter pirin Kahmahmkihla Ih (Mark 14:27-31; Luke 22:31-34; John 13:36-38)
26.31: Doari Jesus pwehng irai, “Pwongoauwehr kamwai ohroj pirin kerpwihla Ngoahi apel kaujang Ngoahi; pwa Puk Joaroawi pwa ‘Ngoah pirin kojukdi Jiloapoahu, a pwihnin jihppwok pirin kaupijoang.’
26.32: A mwerin Ngoahi en iejda, Ngoah pirin inla Galilee mwohn kamwai.”
26.33: Peter japoang, “Mihndahr ma ohroj kerpwihla koawoa, ngoah johpwa pirin.”
26.34: Jesus pwehng Peter, “Ngoahi pwehng koawoa in mehlel, mwohn joang jummwa, koah pirin kahmahmki Ngoahi pehn jiluh pwa koah jehjoa Ngoahi.”
26.35: A Peter japoang “Maing, ngoah johpwa pirin kahmahmki koawoa, mihnda ma ngoah pwili Koawoa mehdi.” Ohroj sohnpadahkkok pel pwa me. Jesus Kapkap nehn Mwoaswel Gethsemane (Mark 14:32-42; Luke 22:39-46)
26.36: Doar Jesus pwili Nah sohnpadahkkok inla wijahkij adanki Gethsemane, a Ih pwehng irai, “Mwindi me a Ngoah en inla o Ngoahi kapkap.”
26.37: Ih ukda Peter apel nihn Zebedee woal roahmenno pwili Ih, a Ih sapda pahsoau pel injinjuwed.
26.38: Doar Ih pwehng irai, “Nehn kapehdihoa inenin soausoau apel dirkihla injinjuwed, doahrma pwen pirin kojukdi Ngoahi. Kamwai jowi Ngoahi me apel pwili Ngoahi poahd.”
26.39: Ih ken aluhla pel ekij dohla Ih kipdi mijoa lel pwirej Ih kapkap, “Joamoai, ma kak, kihjang Ngoahi mwoakin loklok oauwe. A jaudi Injenoai, a Oamw koajoandi en pwoaida.”
26.40: Doar Ih pwurla ipen Nah sohnpadahkkok kapangda pwa irai moair. Ih pwehng, “Peter, imdoahr? Kamwai johkak pwili Ngoahi poahd awa oau oar?
26.41: Mwajahn pel kapkap pwa koah en joah lohdi oang kajongjong. Ngen nimen a palwar jasihkei.”
26.42: Ih pel inla kariau pel kapkap, “Joamoai, ma johkak mwoak oauwe en liklikjang Ngoahi ioarroar Ngoahi en pwen nimla, Kupwuroamwen en wiawi.”
26.43: Nehn Ah japahldo, Ih pel pwuroahng kapang irai moair, irai johkak poahdpijoang ki arai nimen moair.
26.44: Ih pel injang irai pwurla kapkap kajilpak, pwuroahng pwahpwahpwa mehwahr.
26.45: Doar Ih pel pwurlahng sohnpadahkkok pwehng irai, “Kamwai pwen moairroar koamkoammoal? Kapang, awahwa ne leldo, Nihn-Armaj ne pirin pangpangla ipen armaj dipan kan.
26.46: Pwohrda, kisai inla! Woalwa ma pirin pangla Ngoahi ne indoa.” Jesus Joaldi (Mark 14:43-50; Luke 22:47-53; John 18:3-12)
26.47: Nehn Ah pwahpwahpwa me, Judas, emen in eijek roahmenno, leldo pwilihki pwihn oau wijik kodlaij apel suhkoa mihn pokpok. Jamwrou laplappok apel epwi koaun in armajjok ioar kadardo irai.
26.48: Judas ne kioang irai kilel oau: “Kamwai nen kidal inje kamwai en koldi jang in oai en inla rahnmwahuwi ih kioang ih kis.”
26.49: Doar Judas inenlahng oar Jesus. “Kajilel, Jounpadahk!” ih pwehng pel kioang Ih kis.
26.50: Jesus pwa, “Oai pirien, ken wia dahkij koah indoahng wia.” Doar epwi irai jipoardi Jesus joalihdi Ih.
26.51: Emen in woallok ma pwili Jesus wijla kodlaij pas poaloahjang oaloap sien liduhwo nihn Jamwrou Laplappo.
26.52: Jesus pwehng ih, “Kihdi nihmw kodlaijjen, pwa armaj ohroj ma pei ki kodlaij pirin mehkihdi kodlaij.
26.53: Koah johpwa woahwoahki pwa Ngoah kak poaki Joamoaiho en kadardo sohnloang kidpwi en jeuweje kisai, Ih pirin kadardo anjoauwohr?
26.54: A ma Ngoah wia, imdoahr Puk Joarwiho ma sikoa dahkij wiawi apkas en kak pwoaida?”
26.55: Jesus wud pwehng pwihnno, “Da Ngoah armaj keper nauna men pwa kamwai en indoa wijik mihn pei doahr kodlaij pel pwilein pok kamwain joalihdi Ngoahi? Amwda kamwai joah joalihdi Ngoahi nehn Umw Joarwiho? Ngoah mine o padpadahk rehn ohroj.
26.56: A me wiawi pwa en pwoaida dahkij joukohppo pwa ma insingdi nehn Puk Joaroawi.” Anjoau kijo sohnpadahkkok ohroj kerpwihla Ih kaujang. Jesus Mwohn Mwoalen Koapwunngo (Mark 14:53-65; Luke 22:54,55,63-71; John 18:13,14,19-24)
26.57: Armajjok ma joalihdi Jesus ukla Ih nehn umwen Caiaphas, Jamwrou Laplappo, wijahu ma jounpadahk in Kojonneddok apel koaunnok ne pokonpene.
26.58: A Peter pel pwilpwilihwe ekij dohlahjang, oaroh lel nehn kelin umwen Jamwrou Laplappo. Ih dilla loaloa mwindi ipen jiloapoahpwi pwa ih nimen kapang imwin mehpwiai ohroj.
26.59: Jamwrou laplappok apel Sohn Mwoalen Koapwung ohroj engdehn oang kadiarekda kadehde likampwi oang Jesus pwa irai en kak kojukdi Ih.
26.60: Doari, johpwa mehkij irai diarda, apel jounkadehde dir kinehng Jesus likampwi. A jounkadehde roahmen pwokda,
26.61: ma pwa, “Woal mene pwa, ‘Ngoah kak koauwehla Umw Joarwihn Koahsso pel pwuroahng kouda mwerin rehn jiluh.’ ”
26.62: Doar Jamwrou Laplappo uhda pwehng Jesus, “Da, joh oamw pajpoang oang kadip pwiai ma uhwoang koawoa?”
26.63: A Jesus pwen nennenlahr. Doar Jamwrou Laplappo pwehng ih, “In oadoan Koahs mourro koah en kahukihoang kamai pwa Koah Messiah wa ma Nihn Koahs.”
26.64: Jesus japoang, “Koah ma pwa. A Ngoah pwehng kamwai ohroj pwa jang me inla kamwai pirin kapang Nihn-Armaj pirin mwindi loap moaunin Wija Laplap ma allaluhdo pohn koasoau kan in pehnloannge!”
26.65: Ki pajpoang oauwe Jamwrou Laplappo ken soahrdi ah likkoauwo lioas, pwehng Ih, “Lahlahwe! Kisai johpwa anahne pel epwi jounkadehde! Kamwai ohroj ne rong Ah lahlahwe!
26.66: Ia amwai koajoandi?” Irai rahuki, “Ih ne dipda. Koanoahng Ih en mehdi.”
26.67: Doari irai sapda andipoa mijoa apel pakiri Ih. A epwi poki Ih,
26.68: kapiski Ih, “Messiah, kajawi oang kamai pwa inje ma poki koawoa.” Peter Kahmahmki Jesus (Mark 14:66-72; Luke 22:56-62; John 18:15-18,25-27)
26.69: Peter onnonohn nehn kelin ummwo, a emen nihn Jamwrou Laplappo nah lidu jerpeinnok indoa ipoa pwehng ih, “Koah, emen ma pwili Jesus mihn Galilee-o.”
26.70: A Peter kahmahmkihla mwohrai ohroj, pwa “Ngoah jehjoa pwa da koah pwahpwahpwa.”
26.71: Mwerin ah diljang nehn kello, emen lidu jerpein kapangda ih pwehng iraihok ma mine wijahu, “Woalmene kin pwili Jesus mihn Nazareth.”
26.72: Peter pel pwuroahng kahmahmkihla, pwa, “Ngoah kahukihla pwa ngoah pwanah jehjoa woal menen!”
26.73: Mwerinno, iraihok ma uhda wijahu sohlahng ipen Peter pwehng, “Uhdahn koawoa emen irai: pwa ngoaroammwen ne kajalehda.”
26.74: Peter kahula, “Ngoah pirin riahla ma ngoah likamw — ngoah jehjoa inje woalmenen!” Anjoauwohr joang jummwa.
26.75: Anjoauwo Peter samanda en Jesus pwehng ih: “Mwohn joang jummwa, koah pirin kahmahmkihla Ngoahi pehn jiluh pwa koah jehjoa Ngoahi.” Ih ken inla jang wijahu kasoahng joangin.

27.1: Oh inminjoang jamwrou laplappok apel koaunnok ne wiahda arai koajoandi pwa irai en kojukdi Jesus.
27.2: Arai joalihdi Ih, ukla jang wijahu ukla ipen Pilate, koapina in Rome. Judas Lohjakla (Wihwia 1:18,19)
27.3: Nehn en Judas, ma pangla Ih, kidalda pwa Jesus ne dipda pwa Ih en mehdi, ih inenin koaluhla mehlel. Doar ih oaloa mwani silper jilihjek kapwurihlahng jamwrou laplappok apel koaunnok.
27.4: Ih pwehng irai, “Ngoah ne wiahda dihp, pwa ngoah pangla woal pwung men.” Irai japoang, “Ia kaspoahng kamai? Men pwen oamw pwukoa.”
27.5: Doar Judas kerpwihdi mwanihkoa nehn Umw Joarwiho ih inla lohjakla.
27.6: Jamwrou laplappo pwoakda mwanihok, pwa “Kisai johkak kioang mwani pwiai nehn wijahn nahk in mwanihn Umw Joarwiho, pwa uhwoang kojonned kisai en oaloa mwani dupkoan kojukdi armaj.”
27.7: Mwerin irai ekij sikoa irai koajoanehdi pwa irai en dupukla japwen jounwia ainpwoahsso, irai wiahkihla pei in armaj in likin.
27.8: Ioar kahrehda mohj oauwo adanki Mohj in Insa.
27.9: Me ne kapwaihahda kokohp in Jeremiah ma pwa, “Arai oaloa silper jilihjek, dopdopla mihn Israel lemleme pwa ioar woahr dupkoa,
27.10: irai dupuk kihda mohjjo en jounwia ainpwoahsso, doahr en Koaunno kaweid.” Jesus Koapwung Mwohn Pilate (Mark 15:2-5; Luke 23:3-5; John 18:33-38)
27.11: Apkas Jesus uhda mwohn Pilate, koapinahn Rome. Ih idoak oang Jesus, “Koah ioar Nahmwarkihn mihn Jew?” Jesus japoang, “Eh, ma koah ne pwa.”
27.12: A anjoauwo ma jamwrou laplappok apel koaunnok kajalehda irai iroahk kadpoahki Ih, Jesus nennenla johpwa lallal.
27.13: Pilate idoak, “Koah johpwa rong dirin arai iroahk ma irai kadpoahki koawoa?”
27.14: A Jesus johpwa pwa mehkij, oang iroahk ma uhwoang Ih, ma inenin kapwuriamwei oang koapinahu. Jesus Kadeikda Pwa En Kojkojdi (Mark 15:6-15; Luke 23:13-25; John 18:39—19:16)
27.15: Nehn anjoau in joarwihn Passover ohroj, koapina kin kapisla emen sohn kalpwuhjjo oang mihn Jew-ok, joah lipilpil emen ma irai pilda.
27.16: Nehn anjoauwo mine woal mwoarjuwed men nehn kalpwuhj oadoa Jesus Barabbas.
27.17: Nehn en armajjok pokonpene mwohn umwen Pilate-o minjoanngo, ih idoak oang irai, “Inje kamwai nimen ngoahi en mweidoahng kamwai — Barabbas ke Jesus ma adanki Messiah?”
27.18: (Ih woahwoahki mwehu pwa koaun in mihn Jew-ok joalihdi Jesus jang in pihrin.)
27.19: Anjoauwohr, nehn en Pilate ah minmine nehn ah jeiahn koapwung, pahioahu kadardohng ih rong pas, “Mweidla woal pwung menen, pwa ngoah loklok koalik nehn oai oarmoane ih pwohng.”
27.20: Jamwrou laplappok apel koaunnok kaweidki pokonno en poaki Barabbas en lapwda, a Jesus en kojkojdi.
27.21: Koapinahu pel pwuroahng idoak, “Inje in ara roahmenne kamwai nimen ngoahi en mweidoahng kamwai?” Pokonno rahukihla japoang ih, “Barabbas!”
27.22: Pilate pel pwuroahng idoak, “A da ngoah en wiahng Jesus ma adanki Messiah?” Arai ohroj pel rahukihda, “Kalohpwuhla Ih!”
27.23: Pilate idoak, “Kahrpoa? Dihp da ih wiahda?” A irai kapwa kakoalikihla ngilarai, “Kalohpwuhla Ih!”
27.24: Pilate ne kidalda pwa ih johpwa kak wia mehkij ma en kak kauhdi pwa pingpinngo ne koalkoalikla. Doar ih pwa oau pwohl in pil en wijikdo ih amwunla poah mwohn pokonno, pwehng irai, “Ngoah pijekjang insahn Woal mene. Kamwai wud pwukoahki.”
27.25: Armajjok ohroj pel rahukihla, “Kamai pirin pwukoahki Ah mehdi — kamai apel nihmai jerihkan.”
27.26: Doari, Pilate kadarla Barabbas oang irai. Ih koajoanehdi irai en poki Jesus ki joal pahrang imwin pas, irai kioang jounpeihok en kalohpwuhla Ih. Jounpeihok Koauwe Jesus (Mark 15:16-20; John 19:2,3)
27.27: Epwi nihn koapina jounpeihok wahla Jesus oang nehn arai soahnpaj en koapinahu a pangindo pwihnin jounpeiho ohroj.
27.28: Irai kihjang Ah likkoau a pwainkihdi Ih robe wahssahioau.
27.29: Irai wiahda pwoahu ma soaksoak ingkoang roairoai oau kamwarmwarihkihdi moange, a irai kioang suhkoa pas nehn poah en wia kilel in manman. Doar irai poardi jang Ih nehn irai kapiski Ih, rahrahuki, “Kapang! Nahmwarkihn mihn Jew kan!”
27.30: A irai andipoa Ih pel doapwoa jang suhkoahu nehn poah pokihki nehn moange.
27.31: Nehn irai ne lok in wia mwahlki Ih, irai kihjang robe-o irai wud kioang pein Ah likkoauwok. Doar irai ukla Ih en lohpwuhla. Jesus Kalohpwuhla (Mark 15:21-32; Luke 23:26-43; John 19:17-27)
27.32: Nehn irai allalu jang nehn kahnihmmwo, ihr koanoahdi woal in Cyrene men adanki Simon, irai ipong oang ih en wahda en Jesus lohpwuhwo.
27.33: Irai inla lel wijahkij adanki Golgotha (woahwoahki wijahn sihn moang).
27.34: Irai kioang Jesus wain doal kihda ad kasik pwa en nim, a mwerin Ah jong ekij, Ih johpwa nimla.
27.35: Mwerin irai poanihdi Ih oang in lohpwuhwo, irai wijwijki Ah likkoauwo pwa inje en anki, irai ken nehkpijoang nehn pwungarai.
27.36: Irai ken mwindihoang wijahu jiljiloa Jesus.
27.37: Pohn moange in lohpwuhwo ihr poanihdihoang insing oau ma kawoahwoahda kahrpoan Ah kalohpwuhla. Insinngo pwa, Ioar Jesus me, Nahmwarkihn mihn Jew.
27.38: Jounpirap roahmen pel pwili Ih lohpwuhla, emen mine loap moaun, a emen loap meing.
27.39: Armajjok ma kin dauli wijahu kin mwasmwasoahki irai kapiski Jesus, pwahpwahpwa,
27.40: “Ioar koawoa ma pirin koauwehla Umw Joarwiho pel pwuroahng kouda mwerin rehn jiluh! Pein kapisla koawoa, ma koah Nihn Koahs! Doaudi jang in lohpwuhwen!”
27.41: Jamwrou laplappok, apel jounpadahkkok in Kojonneddo, apel epwi koaunnok pwili kapiski Jesus,
27.42: “Ih kapisla epwi, a Ih johkak kapisla pein Ih! Jaudi Ih ioar nahmwarki in Israel? A Ih en kerdihjang in lohpwuhwen, a kamai nen kamehlele Ih.
27.43: Ih koapwoarpwoarki Koahs; doari, Koahs en kapisla Ih en kajalehda Ah pwungki Ih! Ih pwahla pwa, Ih Nihn Koahs.”
27.44: Jounpirappok ma pwili Ih lohpwuhla; ara pel pwili lahlahwe Jesus. Jesus Mehdi (Mark 15:33-41; Luke 23:44-49; John 19:28-30)
27.45: In jauwaj, roasoahdi oau wiawi pohn jappwo pwon, oaroain awa jiluh.
27.46: Koaroan oang kiloak jiluh mwerin jauwaj, Jesus ngil koalikda pwa, “Eli, Eli, lema sabachthani?” ma woahwoahki, “Oai Koahs, Oai Koahs, amwda Koah ke moalkoahla Ngoahi?”
27.47: Epwi armajjok ma uhuhu wijahu ken rongda, irai pwa, “Ih pangpangin Elijah!”
27.48: Emen irai pispis kijoula pwoakda spwoanj oau kapwuhrihdi wain kasik, kioang in mijen suhkoa pas kihdahlahng Ih pwa Ih en nim.
27.49: A epwi irai pwehng Ih, “Jowi. Kisai kapang ma Elijah nen indoa kapisla Ih.”
27.50: A Jesus pel pwuroahng ngil koalikda, doar Ih ken mweidla ngenin.
27.51: Anjoauwohr kahdenngo ma poaroa mwoal joarwiho nehn Umw Joarwiho soahroakpijoang in riau, jang puwoa lel pah. Jampah roarda, sakai kan pwalpijoang,
27.52: joaujoau kan rispijoang. Palwoaroan nihn Koahs armaj dihrdir ma ne mehdi iejda.
27.53: Irai injang nehn ahr joaujoau kan; a mwerin en Jesus Ah iejda, irai pwokda nehn Kahnihmw Joarwiho pwokkoang armaj dir.
27.54: Laplap in jounpei apel jounpeihok ma pwili jiljiloa Jesus inenin majpwehkda nehn irai kapang roarroarin jappwo apel joang ohroj ma wiawi. Irai pwa, “Mehlel minmene uhdahn Nihn Koahs.”
27.55: Li dir ma pel pwilihdo mine wijahu, pwili kapkapang mehkan ma wihwiawi, a irai mine ekij doh jang wijahu; ioar irai koa ma pwili Jesus jang Galilee apel kin papah Ih.
27.56: Mary mihn Magdala, Mary inen James apel Joseph apel inen nihn Zebedee jermweinnok ma pwili mine ipen lihok. Palwoaroan Jesus Neknekid oang nehn Joaujoau (Mark 15:42-47; Luke 23:50-56; John 19:38-42)
27.57: Injoausikdi, woal koapwoahpwoa men jang Arimathea ma adanki Joseph, ih pel sohnpadahk in Jesus men.
27.58: Ih inla ipen Pilate poakihda palwoaroan Jesus. Pilate koajoanehdi pwa en mweimwei oang ih.
27.59: Joseph oaloa palwarro kidimkihpene likkoau roairoai oau.
27.60: Ih wahlahng nehn pein ah joaujoau kapw, ma kapwehsene wiawihda nehn sakai. Ih kasahpwroahng sakai koalik oau nehn wanihmw in joaujoauwo ih injang.
27.61: Mary mihn Magdala apel emen Mary mwindi koaroannoang kapkapang joaujoauwo. Jilepen Joaujoauwo
27.62: Rehnwa mwerin, ioar rehn keiou in kasman in Passover — jamwrou laplappok apel Pharisee-ok pokonpene ipen Pilate.
27.63: Irai pwehng ih, “Maing, kamai samanda en min likamw meno Ah pwa anjoauwo Ih pe mour: ‘Ngoah pirin pwuroahng mourda mwerin rehn jiluh.’
27.64: Koah en ruwoj pwa irai en jiloa ah joaujoauwo oaroh lel kajiluh in rehn, pwadoar nah sohnpadahk indoa pirapoahjang palwarro, ken pwehng armaj pwa ‘Ih iejdahjang mehdi.’ Pwa likamw pase pirin nauna jang minin mijkoalkoallo.”
27.65: Pilate pwehng irai “jiloapoahwa men, alwe jiloahdi mwehu joaujoauwo uhwen amwai kak.”
27.66: Irai inla pinahla joaujoauwo ki sakai oau apel kioang jiloapoahpwi pwa en jiljiloa.

28.1: Mwerin Sabbath, injohrehn in Rehn Joaroawi, Mary mihn Magdala apel emen Mary inlahng kapang joaujoauwo.
28.2: A nehn anjoauwohr jampah roarda; sohnloang en Koaunno men indihdo jang nehnloannge kasahpwroahjang sakaiho, ih mwindihoang puwoa.
28.3: Mwomwe inenin ling, doahroar lingin joarom, ah likkoauwo korohro doahroar sinoh.
28.4: Jiloapoahk inenin jalohda douluhl apel roarroarkihda irai majpwehkda, irai ken kipdihoang nehn pwirej doahroar armaj mehdihpwi.
28.5: A sohnloanngo pwehng lihok, “Kamwa joah mijik, pwa ngoah kidal pwa kamwa raprapahki Jesus ma kalohpwuhla.
28.6: Ih joh me! Ih ne iejda, doahroar Ah pwehng kamwaiho. Kamwa indoa, kadehde wijahu ma Ih neknekid.
28.7: A apkas, kamwa pispis alwe pwehng Nah sohnpadahkkok pwa ‘Ih ne iejda jang mehdi, Ih pirin inla Galilee mijen kamwai. Ioar wijahwa ma kamwai pirin kapang Ih.’ Kamwa samsaman da ma ngoah pwehng kamwa.”
28.8: Ira ken pispis pwurla jang in joaujoauwo, ira inenin majpwehk apel peren, ira kijkijoulahng pakair kioang sohnpadahkkok irair oauwe.
28.9: A anjoauwohr Jesus uhda mijara pwehng ira “Popohl.” Ara sohla ipoa rukdi mwowoa koldi ehnnok pwongi Ih.
28.10: A Jesus pwehng ira, “Kamwa joah mijik, kamwa alwe pwehng rioaihok arai en inla Galilee, pwa ioar wijahwa ma kamai pirin suhpene.” Rong jang Jilepen Joaujoauwo
28.11: Nehn en lihok ara kijkijoula ipen sohnpadahkkok, epwi jounpeihok ma jiljiloa joaujoauwo lelloang nehn kahnihmmwo pwa irai en pwehng jamwrou laplappok me ohroj ma wiawi.
28.12: Jamwrou laplap apel koaunnok pokonpene pwa irai en wia lamlamki da ma pirin wiawi. Irai en kioang jounpeihok uhwen mwani koalik oau.
28.13: Irai pwehng jounpeihok, “Kamwai pirin pwa, ‘Nihn Jesus sohnpadahkkok indoa inpwonngo nehn amai moair pirapoahla palwarro.’
28.14: A ma koapina rongda, kamai pirin kadehde, a kamwai jehpirin perki mehkij.”
28.15: Jiloapoahk oaloa nihrai mwanihok, irai wiahda doahroar ma jamwrouwok padahkihoang irai. Sikesik pase lohkjili ipen mihn Jew jang rehnno indoa lel rehnnoauwe. Jesus Pwokkoang Nah Sohnpadahkkok (Mark 16:14-18; Luke 24:36-49; John 20:19-23; Wihwia 1:6-8)
28.16: Sohnpadahk eijek emenno injang pohn dolin Galilee, wijahu Jesus pwehng irai en inlahng.
28.17: Nehn irai kapangda Jesus wijahu, irai rukdi pwongi Ih; a epwi irai pwen kahjikkoar kamehlele!
28.18: Jesus sohdo iparai pwehng irai, “Manman ohroj nehnloannge apel jampah ne liklikkoang Ngoahi.
28.19: Doari, kamwai alwe wija ohroj padahkihoang sohn wei kan ohroj; pwa irai en wiahla Noai sohnpadahk: poapdaijihla irai in oadoan Koahs Jahm apel Nah apel Ngen Joaroawi.
28.20: Apel padahkihoang irai, ahr en peikkoang me ohroj ma Ngoah ne koajoanehdihoang kamwai. Doari, kamwai en kidal pwa Ngoah pirin pwilpwili kamwai anjoau ohroj lel in imwin kawa.”

1.1: Me ioar sapin Rongmwehu doahr Jesus Christ, Nihn Koahs,
1.2: doahr lallo ma ne insingdi ipen joukohp Isaiah: “Koahs pwa, ‘Ngoah pirin kadarwe Noai jounpakairro mwohn Koawoa, ma pirin koaunopda Oamw allo.’
1.3: Mine ngilloau ma kin poangpoangpoang nehn japwsoahn: ‘Kamwai koaunopda al kan ohroj oang Koaunno, kamwai kainenehla Ah al kan ma Ih pirin alu loaloa!’ ”
1.4: John ken pwokda nehn japwsoahn, poapdaiji armaj kan, padahkki oang irai, “Kamwai koaluhla, wiliakapwla apel poapdaijla, Koahs pirin mahkoahng dipamwai kan.”
1.5: Armaj dir jang koujapw ohroj nehn wein Judea apel jang Jerusalem inla pwa en rong en John ah kapahrak. Irai kin woahkda diparai kan, a ih poapdaijihla irai nehn Pillap Jordan.
1.6: John kin kol likkoau oau ma wiawihda jang in winen kamel, apel kin piroahki lopkoa kangir kilin kahu; a da kanah mwinge ioar padda apel jukehn loanglap in nehn woallo.
1.7: Doar me ioar Ah padahk: “Mine woal men ma pirin indoa mwerin ngoahi, ma laplapjang ngoahi douluhl; ma ngoahi johpwa warroang rukdi mwohn Ih pwa ngoan lapwadda joalin Ah sandello.
1.8: Ngoahi kin poapdaijihki kamwai pil, Ih pirin poapdaijihki kamwai Ngen Joaroawi.” Jesus Poapdaijla apel Oaloa Jongjong pehn Jehsen (Matthew 3:13—4:11; Luke 3:21,22; 4:1-13)
1.9: Mwerin en Jesus indoa jang Nazareth, kahnihmw siksik oau nehn wein Galilee, poapdaijla ipen John nehn Pillap Jordan.
1.10: Nehn anjoauwo ma Jesus doauda jang nehn pillo, Ih kapang nehnloannge rispijoang a Ngen Joaroawi indihdo doahr dinin mwurei men mine pohn Ih.
1.11: Ih pel rongda ngilloau indihdo jang nehnloannge pwa, “Koawoa ioar Noai jermwein kajampwal wa, ma Ngoah kin malauki.”
1.12: Doari, nehn anjoauwohr Ngen Joaroawi ken kahlwahlahng Jesus nehn japwsoahn.
1.13: Jesus ken mine wijahu rehn pahijek, Jehsen ken kajongjongi Ih. Mahn ingkel kan kin pel pwili Jesus wijahu; a sohnloang kan pel kin indoa pel jeuweje. Jesus Pangin Sohnloakjid Pahmen (Matthew 4:12-22; Luke 4:14,15; 5:1-11)
1.14: Mwerin John peidekkoang nehn kalpwuhj, Jesus inla Galilee lohkihjili Rongmwehu jang ipen Koahs, ma pwa,
1.15: “Ne lel anjoauwo, Wein Koahs ne koaroando! Kamwai koaluhla, apel wiliakapwla apel kamehlelehla Rongmwehuwo!”
1.16: Rehn oau Jesus allaluhla pohn poahrinjedin Jedin Galilee; Ih kapangda sohnloakjid roahmen, Simon apel riah Andrew, loakjidki nihra ukko nehn jeddo.
1.17: Jesus pwehng ira, “Kamwa indoa pwilihla Ngoahi; a Ngoahi pirin wiahkihla kamwa sohnloakjidi armaj.”
1.18: Anjoauwohr, ara kihdi nihra ukko pwilihla Ih.
1.19: Ih injang wijahu, pel kapangda riarihoau, James apel John, nihn Zebedee. Ara minmine pohn pohs oau winwina nihra ukkok.
1.20: Nehn en Jesus kapangda ara, Ih pangin ara. Ara ken kihdi jamarahu ma pwili mine pohn pohs oau ipen sohndoadoahk pwi, ara ken pwilihla Jesus. Woalmen ma Ngen Jaus Dilingla (Luke 4:31-37)
1.21: Irai inla Capernaum; nehn rehn in Sabbath Jesus dilda nehn jinakokehu sapdihda Ah padahk.
1.22: Armaj ohroj ma pwili rong ken pwuriamweikihla doahr Ah kin kihwe Ah padahk; pwa manman in Ah padahk johpwa doahroar en jounpadahk in Kojonneddok arai padahk.
1.23: Woal men ma ngen jaus dilingla inla nehn jinakokehu rahrahuki pwa,
1.24: “Jesus mihn Nazareth, da Koah nimen wiahng kamai? Koah indoahng koauwehla kamai! Ngoah kidal inje Koawoa, Koawoa ma Nihn Koahs Armaj Joarwihwa!”
1.25: Jesus pwehng ngen jausso, “Nennenla, koah diljang nehn armaj menen!”
1.26: Ngen jausso ken isikda woallo oaroh ken roarda, rahrahu diljang nehn ih.
1.27: Armaj ohroj pwuriamweikihla, peipeidekpene nehn pwungarai pwahpwahpwa, “Dahkij me? Joangoan padahk kapw dahioau me? Woalmene inenin manman. Ih pwen lalloar, pel ngen jaus kan pel peikkoang!”
1.28: Rongin Jesus ken pispis lohkjili wija ohroj nehn wein Galilee. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Armaj Dir (Matthew 8:14-17; Luke 4:38-41)
1.29: Doari, Jesus apel Nah sohnpadahkkok, pwilihki James apel John injang nehn jinakokehu inla umwen Simon apel Andrew.
1.30: Inen pahien Simon-o onohn nehn ummwo johmwehu karkar, nehn en Jesus lel wijahu arai pwehng Ih doahr iren liho.
1.31: Ih ken inla kolda poahn liho jeuwejehda pwa en uhda. Nehn anjoauwohr, karkarro injang ipen liho; ih ken sapda apwali irai.
1.32: Injoausikdi, nehn en joauwo pirin ken duhla, armaj kan wahpenehng Jesus min johmwehu apel min ngen jaus kan dilingla irai.
1.33: Sohn kahnihmmwo ohroj pwili pokonpene mijen ummwo
1.34: Jesus kemwehuwihla armaj dir ma anki joangoan johmwehu dir apel kaujjang ngen jaus dir ipen armaj kan. Ih ken kauhdi ngen jaussok arai en joah lallal, pwa irai kidal inje Ih. Jesus Lohkihjili Rongmwehu nehn Galilee (Luke 4:42-44)
1.35: Pwohrdahng rehnno, injohrehn, Jesus pwohrda inlahjang in ummwo, inla likin kahnihmmwo wijahkij pwa en kalahpwukla kapkap.
1.37: nehn irai kapangda, irai pwehng, “Maing, armaj ohroj raprapahki Koawoa.”
1.38: A Ih japoang irai, “Kisai dauluhlwehng nehn koaujoan koaroan kan, pwa Ngoah en pel lohkihjili Rongmwehu wijahk, pwa ioar Ngoah indoahki.”
1.39: Ih ken allaluhjili nehn Galilee pwon, kapkapahrakjili nehn jinakoke kan apel kahkaujjang ngen jaus ipen armaj kan. Jesus Kemwehuwihla Woal Lepahmen (Matthew 8:1-4; Luke 5:12-16)
1.40: Woal lepahmen pel indoa ipen Jesus, poadpwomwla mwohn Ih, poaki en jeuweje Ih, “Maing, ma Koah nimen, Koah kak kamwkelehda ngoahi.”
1.41: Doari Jesus ipwilkihda, kailla poah pukkoang woallo, Ih pwa, “Ngoah nimen. Ken mwakelkelda!”
1.42: Anjoauwohr lepahu ken jarjang ipen woallo; doari ih ken mwakelkella.
1.43: -44 Jesus kainoapwihdi, pwehng Ih, “Rong, pwa koah en johpwa pwehng emen. Inla kajalehioang jamwrou a koah wia oamw meiroang joanngo ma Moses koajoanehdi, en wia oamw mihn kadehde oang irai.” Doari Ih ken kadarla woallo.
1.45: Woallo inlahr lohkihjili wija ohroj ah ne mwakelkelda; ma kahrehda Jesus johla kak aluhjili nehn pokon janjal nehn kahnihmmwok, Ih kin kalkalahpwukjili likin kahnihmmwo. A joah, pwa armaj dir kin pokondo Ipoa jang wija ohroj.

2.1: Mwerin rehnpwi, Jesus pel pwuroahng inla Capernaum. Rongin Ah minmine in umwahu lohkjili;
2.2: ma kahrehda armaj dir pokondo in ummwo apel koaisla loaloa pel in wanihmmwo. Ih ken padahkki oang irai Mahjanno.
2.3: Nehn Ah padpadahk, woal mwoasor men ne wijwijik allaluhdohng Ipoa; ih mine nehn roajoa mihn wijik oau, wijik in pahmen.
2.4: Doari, nehn ahr johkak kadilihda apel sohlahng ipen Jesus ki koais in pokonno, irai pwukulda pohn ummwo kainenehdi wijahu ma Jesus mine, kadardihoang nehn ummwo ipen Jesus roajoahu ma woal mwoasorro mine puwoa.
2.5: Nehn en Jesus kapang arai pwojon, Ih pwehng woal mwoasorro, “Noai jeri! Dipoamw kan ne lapwda.”
2.6: Jounpadahk in Kojonneddohpwi pwili mwindi nehn ummwo, irai lemlemehng pein arai,
2.7: “Imdoahr woalmene Ah kak wia joangoan sikesik oauwe? Pwa Ih lahlahwe Koahs. Inje ma kak lapwadda dihp kan, jaudi Koahs kalahpwuk?”
2.8: Anjoauwohr Jesus kidalda ahr lamlam; Ih pwehng irai, “Da kamwai wiahki joangoan lamlam pwiai nehn mohngiongimwai kan?
2.9: Dahioau moangoai en pwehng woal mwoasor mene, ‘Dipoamw kan ne lapwda,’ ke, ‘Uhda, oaloa kioammwen, alu’?
2.10: A Ngoah en kamehlele oang kamwai en kidal pwa Nihn-Armaj anki manmanin mahkoahng dihp pohn jampah.” Ih ken pwehng woal mwoasorro,
2.12: Woal mwoasorro uhda mwohn mijarai, pwoakda kiahu, anjoauwohr ken inla. Irai ohroj pwuriamweikihla mehlel apel kapkapingahki Koahs, pwa, “Kamai kahjikkoar kapang mehkij ma doahroar me.” Jesus Pangin Levi (Matthew 9:9-13; Luke 5:27-32)
2.13: Jesus pel pwuroahng pwurlahng in oaroahr in Jedin Galilee. Armaj dir pel pokonpene Ipoa, Ih ken pel sapda padahk oang irai.
2.14: Nehn Ah allaluhla wijahu, Ih kapangda jounrik daksis men, oadoa Levi nihn Alphaeus, ma onnonohn nehn ah oahpisso. Jesus pwehng, “Indoa pwilihla Ngoahi.” Levi ken uhdahr pwilihla Jesus.
2.15: Doari Jesus ken mwindihoang mwinge in umwen Levi-o. A jounrik daksis pwi apel armaj dipan dir pwili Jesus apel Nah sohnpadahkkok mwindihoang in sehpillo, pwa irai dir kin pwilpwili kahkahkauj Jesus.
2.16: Epwi jounpadahk in Kojonneddo, ma kijehn Pharisee-ok, nehn irai kapangda Jesus Ah pwili mwinge ipen joangoan armaj dipan pwiai apel ipen jounrik daksis pwiai, irai idoakkoang Nah sohnpadahkkok pwa, “Da Ih kin pwilihki mwinge ipen joangoan armaj pwiai?”
2.17: A nehn en Jesus rongda me, Ih pwehng irai, “Jaudi armaj sihkei ioar anahne jounwini, a armaj johmwehu. Ngoah joah indoahng pangin armaj pwung, a armaj dipan kan.” Peidek doahroar Kaijihjol (Matthew 9:14-17; Luke 5:33-39)
2.18: Pehn oau nihn John jounpoapdaij sohnpadahkkok apel Pharisee-ok kaijihjol. A armaj pwi indoa ipen Jesus idoak Ipoa, pwa, “Amwda nihn John jounpoapdaijjok apel nihn Pharisee-ok kin kaijihjol, a nihmw kan johkin pwili?”
2.19: Jesus ken japoang irai, “Pwa da? Kamwai lemleme ma sohnkapar in kamdipw in koapwoapwoaud oau pirin kaijihjol nehn en woal kamwohddo minmine iparai? Irai johkak.
2.20: A oau anjoau ma pirin indoa ma woal kamwohddo pirin wijik jang irai; doari, ioar anjoauwo irai pirin kaijihjol.
2.21: “Joh armaj kin winahng dipwin likkoau kapw pohn likkoau in joakid mering, pwa dapwa likkoau kappwo pirin pworpene, soahrjang ekij likkoau merinngo doari soahroakko pirin koalikla.
2.22: Pel joh armaj kin widekihoang wain kapw nehn pehk in kilin mahn mering, pwa wain kappwo nen koauwehla pehk merinngo; ara koaroj, wainno apel pehkko, nen ohla mwahl. Ioar ma wain kapw pwen mwehuwoanngoar pehk kapw.” Peidek Doahr Sabbath (Matthew 12:1-8; Luke 6:1-5)
2.23: Rehn in Sabbath oau Jesus wudla nehn mwoaswel in wihd oau. Nah sohnpadahkkok pwili Ih; irai ken dolihdi wehn wihd pwi.
2.24: Pharisee-ok ken pwehng Jesus, “Kapang! Nihmw sohnpadahkkok wia me ma uhwoang kojonned in Sabbath.”
2.25: Jesus japoang irai, “Kamwai johkin wadek da David wiahdahu anjoauwo ma ih apel pwilihoahk mwakohkohla?
2.26: Ih dilda nehn Umwen Koahs, kangla pilahwa joarwihok, nehn mwein Jamwrou Laplap Abiathar. Doahr kojonneddo, jamwrouwok oar ioar mweimweioang kang pilahwa pwiai. A David kangla apel kioang pwilihoahk irai en pwili kang.”
2.27: Jesus pel pwa, “Sabbath wiawihdahng mihn kemwehupen armaj, a jaudi armaj oang mihn kemwehupen Sabbath.
2.28: Ioar mehwa Nihn-Armaj ioar Koaun apel Koaun in Sabbath.”

3.1: Jesus pwuroahng dilda nehn jinakokehu, wijahu ma woal mwoasor poah men pwili minmine.
3.2: Armaj pwi ma pwili mine wijahu nimen kadpoahki Jesus mehkij japwung, irai kin mwajmwajahnnoar Jesus ma Ih pirin kemwehuwihla min mwoasor poahu rehnin Sabbath.
3.3: Jesus ken pwehng woal mwoasor poahu. “Sohdahdo uhda mijen pokonne.”
3.4: Ih ken idoak iparai pwa, “Da kojonneddo mweidoahng kisai en wia rehn in Sabbath? Kisai en wia mehkij ma mwehu ke nauna? Kisai en jeuweje mourin armaj ke koauwehla?” Irai nennenla johpwa wia mehkij.
3.5: Jesus ken lioasla kapkapang irai, ih ken injinjuwedkihla irai koapsakai apel lamlam japwung. Ih ken pwehnglahng woal mwoasor poahu, “Kailwe poahmmwen.” Min mwoasorro kaillahr poahu, poahu ken mwehula douluhl.
3.6: Pharisee-ok ken diljang nehn jinakokehu pokonpene ipen epwi ma kin wia nihn Herod pwihnno; irai ken pilahnehda pwa irai en kojukdi Jesus. Pokon Koalik oau in Poahrinjed in Jeddo
3.7: Jesus apel Nah sohnpadahkkok inla in poahrinjed in Jedin Galilee, a pokon koalik oau kaujla Ih. Armajjok indoa jang Galilee, jang Judea,
3.8: jang Jerusalem, jang Idumea, jang oaloap Jordan, apel jang kahnihmw in Tyre apel Sidon. Armaj pwiai pokonpene ipen Jesus pwa ihr rongda joang kapwuriamwei kan ma Ih kin wihwia.
3.9: Ih pwehng Nah sohnpadahkkok irai en koaunopda oau pohsso, ma Ih en doauda puwoa, pwa pokonno en joah kadroapwihla Ih.
3.10: Pwa Ih kin kemwehuwihla armaj johmwehu dir, ioar mehwa irai kin kadroapwihla Ih nehn irai kin nimen pukkoang Ih.
3.11: Pel armaj ma ngen jaus dilingla irai, nehn irai kin kapangda Ih irai kin kipdi mwohn Ih, rahrahu, pwahpwahpwa, “Koah ioar Nihn Koahs wa!”
3.12: A Jesus ken iroahdi ngen jaussok en johpwa pwa inje Ih. Jesus Pilda Wahnpoaroan Eijek Roahmen (Matthew 10:1-4; Luke 6:12-16)
3.13: Jesus indahla pohn dol oau; Ih ken pangin iraihok ma Ih kin ipwilki en indoa Ipoa.
3.14: Ih ken pilda min eijek roahmen ma Ih panginki wahnpoaroan, Ih pwa, “Ngoah pilda kamwai pwa kamwai en kin pwilpwili Ngoahi. Ngoah pirin pel kadarwe kamwai pwa kamwai en lohkihjili Rongmwehu;
3.15: kamwai pirin pel anki manman in kaujjang ngen jaus kan ipen armaj.”
3.16: Doari, ioar oadoan min eijek roahmennok ma pilpilda: Simon (Jesus kioang oadoa Peter);
3.17: James apel John, nihn Zebedee (Jesus kioang oadoara, Boanerges, woahwoahn mour in addoauwe nihn palar);
3.18: Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, James nihn Alphaeus, Thaddaeus, apel Simon sohn pwihnin Zealot,
3.19: apel Judas Iscariot, woallo ma pangla Jesus. Jesus apel Beelzebul (Matthew 12:22-32; Luke 11:14-23; 12:10)
3.20: Jesus injang wijahu inlahng in umwahu. A pokon koalik oau pel pokonpene wijahu, ma kahrehda Ih apel Nah sohnpadahkkok johla kak mwinge ki johla anjoau.
3.21: Nehn epwi Ah peneineihok rongda me, irai inla ipoa pwa irai en oaloa apwali Ih; pwa armaj kan pwahpwahpwa, “Ih ne japwungla nehn moange.”
3.22: Epwi jounpadahk in Kojonneddok ma indihdo jang Jerusalem siksikoa pwa, “Beelzebul ne dilingla Ih.” Epwi pwa, “Koaun in ngen jaus kan ma kioang Jesus manman in kajroahjang ngen jaus.”
3.23: Ih panginpene armajjok pwehng irai karajraj pwi: “Imdoahr Jehsen ah kak kajroahla Jehsen?
3.24: Ma wei oau pirin pwalpijoang wiahda pwihn pwi ma pirin uhpene nehn pwungarai, weiho johkak pwoaida, pwa ih pirin mwoarpijoang.
3.25: Ma peneinei oau pirin pwalpijoang wiahda pwihn pwi ma pirin uhpene nehn pwungarai, peneineiho johkak pwoaida pwa ih pirin mwoarpijoang.
3.26: Doari ma wein Jehsen pirin pwalpijoang wiahda pwihn pwi ma pirin uhpene nehn pwungarai, ih johkak woaroai, pwa ih pirin mwoarpijoang apel johrla.
3.27: “Joh emen kak koauwehla umwen woal sihkei men pwa en pirapoa ah koapwoa kan ma ih johpwa koldi piroahpene woal sihkeiho. Ioar wioapoawahr doari ih kak pirapoa ah koapwoa kan.
3.28: “Ngoah pwehng kamwai in mehlel pwa armaj kan kak oaloa mahkpen diparai kan ohroj, pel dipen lahlahwe.
3.29: A emen ma pirin lahlahwe Ngen Joaroawi, johpwa kak oaloa mahk in dihp oauwe, pwa ih ne wiahda dihp oau ma johpwa kak lapwda.”
3.30: (Jesus pwa me pwa epwi ihr pwahpwahpwa pwa, “Ngen jaus ne dilingla Ih.”) Inen Jesus apel Riah kan (Matthew 12:46-50; Luke 8:19-21)
3.31: Inen Jesus apel riahk leldo. Irai mine likin ummwo nimen lalloang Ih.
3.32: Pokonno ma mwindi pidekihpene Ih, pwa, “Koah kidal pwa inoammwo apel rioammwok minmine likinno, irai nimen suhwoang Koawoa.”
3.33: A Jesus japoang irai, “Inje inoai, apel inje rioai kan?”
3.34: Ih pel kapkapangjili pohn irai ma minmine ipoa, doar Ih ken pwa, “Ioar inoai apel rioaikoa me.
3.35: Emen ma kin kapwaihahda kupwuren Koahs, ioar arai rioai apel inoai.”

4.1: Jesus pel sapda padahkjili in poahrinjed in Jedin Galilee. Pokon koalik oau pokonpene Ipoa kahrehda Ih ken doauda mwindi pohn pohs oau. Pohsso peipeipei nehn jeddo, a pokonno mine in poahrinjeddo.
4.2: Ih ken padahkihoang irai joang dihrdir in karajraj, doahroar Ah kin kalap wia nehn Ah padahk. Ih pwehng irai:
4.3: “Kamwai rong. Armaj men mine ma inlahng kamwroa ah liporrohk.
4.4: Doari, nehn ah kamwkamwroa ah liporrohk, epwi mwoardi oang nehn alin nehn mwoaswello, mahnsang pwi sangdo kangjang.
4.5: Epwi liporro kipdi nehn wija sakaikai ma pwirejjo poadpoad. Liporrohk pispisin koapda pwa pwirejjo poadpoad.
4.6: A anjoauwo ma joauwo dakda, suhkoahk pispisinnoar mengla pwa koalohraiok johpwa lel nehn wija loal.
4.7: Epwi liporrohk kipdi nehn pwungen suhkoa soaksoak. A suhkoa soaksoakkok koapda kajasihkeihla irai; ioar irai ken johpwa uhwahki.
4.8: A epwi liporrohk nehn pwirej mwehu; irai koapda, koalikla, uhwa mwehu; epwi uhwa min jilihjek, a epwi weneijek, a epwi epwiki.”
4.9: Jesus pel pwa, “Doari, Armaj men ma mine sioa mihn rongrong, a ih en rong.” Kahrpoan Karajraj kan (Matthew 13:10-17; Luke 8:9,10)
4.10: Doari, nehn en Jesus kalahpwukla, arai eijek roahmenno apel epwi ma pwili rong indoa ipoa pwa irai en poaki en kawoahwoahng irai karajraj kan.
4.11: Ih ken japoang irai, “Oang kamwai mweimweioang en kidal manman rir kan doahr wein Koahs. A oang irai kan ma minmine likin, irai pirin kidal joang ohroj jang in karajraj.
4.12: Pwa, ‘Irai en kapkapang, a pwen johpwa kapang, Irai en rongrongrong, a pwen johpwa woahwoahki, pwa ma irai kapang, rong, apel woahwoahki, irai nen okdeklahng Koahs apel oaloa lapwdahn diparai kan.’ ” Jesus Kawoahwoahda Karajraj in Jounkamwoarro (Matthew 13:18-23; Luke 8:11-15)
